Thuthak tomkim ~ The Tedim Post (31 Aug) – ZOMI DAILY
Skip to main content
Skip to primary sidebar
Skip to footer
Additional menu
ZOMI DAILY
Online News & Magazine
Thuthak tomkim ~ The Tedim Post (31 Aug)
posted on 31 August 2020 at 9:51 pm Lomkholna: Myanmar, News, TedimPost, Zomi
NewsIn Brief: Thuthak tomkim ~ The Tedim Post (31 Aug)
Tonzang Township, Cikha khuapi, India gam pan hong ciah khempeuh aki koihna Quarantine Center ading Zomi Covid-19 Response Committe(ZCRC)in MMK 300,000 val man van leh nate August 30, 2020 ni-in piak khiatna nei uh hi, cih thu kiza hi.
2019-2020 hun sungin Political Partyte lak pan facebook ading sum tam a zang penpen nga om hi, ci-in Irrawaddy Newsin a kankhiatna uh pulak uh hi. USDPin US dollar 3,100, UBPin dollar 600, PPPin dollar 500, CNLDin dollar 200 leh NLDin dollar 100 cih bangin zang uh hi, cih pulak khia uh hi.
2020 kiteelpiah Myanmar gambup a demding mimal vekpi gawm pen 6,800 val hi, cih thu kiza hi. Shan State pan a demding mimal 1,000 val tawh a tam penpen na mun hiin Yangon Division pan mimal 900 val tawh anih naah om hi.
COVID-19 natna hun sung tengin kumpi lam pan kha khat meisap unit 150ta hong maapna uh tungtawnin Myanmar gamah innkuan 3,400,000 bangin meisap noptuam pih uh hi, ci-in August 28, 2020 ni-in Union Minister U Win Khinein gen hi.
USA gam Lousiana State leh Texas Stateah Hurricane huihpi nunna hangin mi 14in sihlawhin inn tein 5 valah mei kisia ci hi.
USAin Wechat Application zatlohding khamna aneih leh China(Sen) mipitein zong Apple bawl iphone cihte ka zang keiding uh hi, ci-in China thunei ten gen uh hi.
August 30, 2020 ni Leitung bupah Covid-19 natna ngah Tein 250 val(25,057,670), asi Tein 8 val (843,826) leh adam kik Tein 160 val (16,470,973) phata hi.
More: Opinion: A lunglut huai Zogam MP Candicatete ~ Pu Go Sawm Khup
August 29, 2020 ni-in Arsenal teamin Liverpool teamte zoin FA Community Shield ngah uh hi. Arsenal teamte adingin Community Shield 16 vei a ngahna uh ahih banah Manchester United zomah Community Shield tamvei angah pen team zong ahi uh hi. Source : 7day news, , RFA, Eleven Media, The Myanmar Times, Irrawady News. Thukai khawm : Lia Lu Lun, Lia Shang Shang.

Thuthak tomkim ~ The Tedim Post (13 July) – ZOMI DAILY

ZOMI DAILY
Online News & Magazine
Thuthak tomkim ~ The Tedim Post (13 July)
posted on 13 July 2020 at 11:23 am Lomkholna: News, TedimPost, Zomi
NewsIn Brief: Thuthak tomkim ~ The Tedim Post (13 July)
Myanmar gam Kineih siam minthang Academy Kyaw Hein Kum 73in July 11 ni-in Australia gam, Kanbara Khuapiah hong nusia hi. Ama sihni pen kineih siam minthang Dwe sihzawh kum 13 cin ni tawh kituak citciat hi. Academy Kyaw Heinin Myanmar Film Academy Award 5 vei ngah ngei hi.
2020-2021 laisin kumah Zato siamah(Nurse) dingin mimal 4,300 kisamding hi ci-in Union Minister U Myint Htwein gen hi. Zato siamah pen 2017-2018 kumin 1,700 leh 2018-2019 kumin 3,500 kiim sapna kinei ci hi.
June 29, 2020 ni-in Myanmar Army leh RCSSte kikapna hangin khuasung mi khatin sihlawh ahihmanin Shan State, Kyaukme khuapiah mipi 1000 valin lungphona nei uh hi.
Myanmar gamah Covid-19 natna hong tunzawh kha 3 sungin mimal 470in kisih bawlna(Suicide) hangin si uh ci hi.
Covid-19 natna kidal nadingin Myanmar gam tungah USAin US Dollar Million 16.5 huh ung, ci-in US Embassy zum thunei ten gen uh hi. Abeisa Kum 20 sungin USAin Myanmar gam tungah US Dollar Billion 1.3 val huh khin uh ci hi.
2020-2021 kum pilsinna sanginnte pen July 21 ni-in hong kikding cih kumpi lam pan geelna tungtawnin sangkah hunding pen nikhat nai 4 sungta bek hiding hi, ci-in Education Department pan thunei ahi Dr. Tin Maung Winin gen hi.
Myanmar Army leh AAte kidona hangin Rakhine State leh Chin State, Paletwaah galtai mi 81,637 bang om hi, ci-in UN(United Nations)in gen hi. Chin State, Paletwaah galtai mi mimal 8000 val bang om ci hi.
USAin Japan tungah US Dollar Billion 23 man Gal vanleng F-35A namte 63, F-35B namte 22 leh F-135 namte akigawm 105 zuak dingin kithukimna nei uh hi.
India Bollywood kineih siam minthang Abhishek Bachchan Kum 77in Covid-19 natna ngah ci hi. Tulaitak Mumbai Zatoah zato alup laitak hi.
Nepal gam, nitumna lamah guah tamluatna hangin tuikhang gawp a mi 40 bangin sihlawh khin uhin mipi 10000 sim bangin inn leh lo nusiain tai uh hi.
India gamah July 11, 2020 ni nai 24 sungin Covid-19 natna ngah 27000 kibehlap hi. Tulaitak India gam pen Leitung bupah Covid-19 natna ngah tampen 3 na hi-in India gambupah natna ngah Tein 8 val (849,553), asi Tul 20 val(22,674) leh adam kik Tein 5 val(534,621) phata uh hi.
July 10, 2020 ni-in Singaporeah kiteelna om a, abeisa hun a azo ahi People's Action Party(PAP) mahin zo leuleu hi. PAP partyin Singapore gam pen kum 60 sung bang a makaih khin ahi hi.
2020 kumsungin huih siangtho lohna hangin Asia gam, khuapi 11ah mimal 153,600in sihna thuak uh a, sumtang US Dollar 82.4 billion bang supna om hi, ci-in huih lam tawh kisai thukan ahi Greenpeace kipawlnain gen hi.
More: Tedim District leh Tuithang Town vai Minister Pu Pau Lun tawh dotna dawnna
July 12, 2020 ni Leitung bupah Covid-19 natna ngah Tein 120 val(12,741,287), asi Tein 5 leh lang val (565,719) leh adam kik Tein 70 val (7,023,260) phata hi. Source : 7day news, Eleven Media, Myanmar Times, DVB News.
Reader Interactions

Next: USA, Indiana panPi Cingh Za Pum (Thuklai, Suanthuk)in hongnusia

Malaysia, Taiping khuasungah Operasi lutin gamdangmi 45 kiman

Facebookte neihsamah ahi Instagram kilimzat semsem, khasim mi 800 Million ten zangden – ZOMI DAILY

Facebookte neihsamah ahi Instagram kilimzat semsem, khasim mi 800 Million ten zangden
posted on 1 October 2017 at 4:24 pm Lomkholna: News, Sawltak, Tech
Facebookte neihsamah ahi Instagram kilimzat semsem, khasim mi 800 Million ten zangden
Facebook Companyte neihsamah ahi Instagram pen kilimzat semsem a, aniniin User kibehlap ziahziahden hi. Instagram pen Photo-sharing App cin lawmlegual tetawh Photo kihopsawntheih nadingin akibawlkhia hi a, ahi zongin Video zong kiUpload thei veve hi.
Facebook's vice president of global marketing solutions asemlaitak ahi Carolyn Eversonin New Yorkah akibawl Advertising Event khatah agenkhiatnaah Instagram pen tulaitak khasimin Monthly Active Users akigawmin mi 800 Million phaden hi cin genkhia hi.
Abeisa April khasungin apulak khiatna uhah khasimin Instagram azangpen mi 700 Million hikhin a, tuazawh kha 5 sungin khasim Monthly Active Users 800 Millionah akhangtota ahihi.
Hih atunga pen khasim Monthly Activer User ahihi. Tuabanah nisim azangden Daily Active User zong khangmahmah hi. Tulaitak Instagram nisimin azangpen Daily Active User 500 Million tak ahihi.
Facebook Company ten 2012 kumin Instagram alei uh ahihi. Akilei laitak un US$1 Billion tawh alei uh hi a, Cash leh Stock pawlkhat tawh apiak uh ahihi. Tuciangciang hih Instagram alei uhpen kisikna, supna omhetloding kici hi.
Instagram pen adiakdiakin khangno ten limzat mahmah phadiak uh a, Facebook ten sumtampi tawh hih Instagram aleikhiat uhpen Investment hoihmahmah khat himawk hi cin Analysts ten genkhia uhhi.
More: Facebook azangden mipite Category khenpi 4in kikhenthei, nang koisungah kihel?
Facebook ten Instagram aleikhitzawh puahphatna Update tampi bawlkhin uhhi. Tualakah adiakin Snapchat tawh akibangpian Instagram Stories cih Feature thakpen kilimzat mahmah hi. Instagram Stories tungtawnin Users ten Photo leh Video kiPost khiathei a, ahi zongin Instagram Stories tungtawnin aki Post khiate pen nai 24 (24 hours) khitciangin mangcipkik ziau hi. Zomi Daily ii Instagram ahzong mankalkalin Photo pawlkhat kiUpload zelzel hi. Hih linkah Follow nabawl ve maw….. Sawltak #zomidaily

Next: Australia Football Champions lakah Zomi 1 kihel

Facebook azangden mipite Category khenpi 4in kikhenthei, nang koisungah kihel? – ZOMI DAILY

Facebook azangden mipite Category khenpi 4in kikhenthei, nang koisungah kihel?
posted on 31 July 2017 at 10:06 am Lomkholna: News, Sawltak, Tech
Facebook azangden mipite Category khenpi 4in kikhenthei, nang koisungah kihel?
Facebook pen 04 February 2004 kumin Mark Zuckerberg leh asangkahpih alawmte pawlkhatin hong patkhiat uh hi a, tuahun laitakin Harvard University sangnaupang tebekin azattheih dingin kibawl hi. 2006 kum ciangin kum 13 acingkhin a utpeuhpeuhin Register bawltheihdingin hongkhahkhia uhhi.
Tuahun akipan Facebook pen minthang mahmah, kilimzat mahmah a, tun Social Media Site khempeuh lakah aminthangpen hongsuakta hi. Tulaitak nisimin Facebook azang ‘daily users” pen mi 890 million bang phaden ciliang hi.
Tukum abeisa June khasungin Facebook Users mi 2 Billion valta hi cin Mark Zuckerbergin ama Facebook Timelineah tangko khia hi. Users ten Login bawl akul Social App khempeuh lakah Facebook pen azang atampenpen hongsuakta hi. Adang aminthang zawdeuh Social Appte ii User pen YouTube's 1.5 billion, WeChat's 889 million, Twitter's 328 million, Snapchat's 255 million cihbangbek ahihi.
Banghangin hizahliangin Facebook kilimzat mahmahhiam cih USA, Utah State, Provo khuasung aom Brigham Young University ten Research nabawl uhhi.
Researchers ten Facebook azangte hoihtak akankhiat uhciangin khenpi 4 (Group 4)in kikhenthei ci uhhi. Facebook User tepen tua Category 4 lakpan khatzawkzawkah kihel hamtang uh cihi. Tualeh bangci bangin Category khensuk uhhiam, endih ni.
Facebook Users tepen anuai abangin Category 4in khensuk uh a, min atuamtek vawh uhhi. Tuate pen: Relationship builders, Selfies, Town criers, Window shoppers
Relationship builders:
Hih Category sungah akihel ten Facebook pen lawmlehgual zonnain nei uhhi. Midang khatpeuh ii laigelh pen dawngkik tangtang, kuppih tangtang uh a, apualamah aki theihgei alawm agual tetawh apualamah akithuahdan mahbangun Facebook tungah kithuahkhawm uhhi. Lawmta taktak ahi uhhi.
Selfies:
Hih Category sungah akihel ten Facebook pen amauleh amau kipholakna, kipulakna “Self promote”in zang uhhi. Photo, Video leh Text tuamtuam Post khia uh a, midangte lunglutna attention, likes, comments cihbangpeuh adeihman bekbek uh ahihi. Midangte phattuamna apia hetloding annek laitak, khuasung vaklaitak cihbangpeuh suaksaksak leldih uhhi.
Town criers:
Hih Category sungah akihel tepen Selfies Category tetawh kilehbulh uhhi. Amau Photo leh innkuansung thu khawngpeuh mipi muhdingin mawkgelh khiatkhiatlo uhhi. Tuanengnengte sangin leitungah tulaitak bangthuthak piang, alauhuai bang natna om, bangci kidopding cihte akipan mipite phattuam nadingin Information thupite hawmkhiaden uhhi. Amau ii Facebook Profile nangawn laihthethu seselo, laihmanloliangin mipite adingin theihhuai Information Sharing pen thupi sakzaw uhhi. Social Obligation neimahmah uhhi.
Window shoppers:
Hih Category sungah akihel tepen Town crierste mahbangin Social Obligation neimawhlo uhhi. Ahi zongin amau Facebook Timeline tungkhawngah bangmah gelhkhia ngei khollo uhhi. Midang ten Facebookah bangteng Post khia uh cih etsimska zelzel uh a, Comment piakding cihthadah, Like mekziauding nangawngzong kinngiatlo uhhi. Mikhat ii laigelh, Photo, Video khahkhiatte amuhlam, a etlam zong kuama theihding utlo hi.
Hih Facebook Users Category 4te lakpanin nang koisungah naki helkha hiam? Pawlkhatte Category nihsungbang ahzong kihelkha theiding uhhi.
More: Suicide leh Murder Videote a encikdingin Facebookin nasemding mi 3000 behlapding
Ihki helkhakna Category theicianin eileh ei kiphawkthakna, kipuahphatna “self awareness”in ihzat theihding thupiding hi. Facebook tungah ih laigelhkhiat, ih Comment piakten laigelhpa lungsim hongki langsak pahpah cih phawk huaihi. Mimal khatlekhat, pawlpi, beh, khua, party khatlekhat peuh akitot, akinialnial nadingin Facebook Timeline khawngah lai agelhgelh ihhih khakding kietphatzelzel huai hi. Na laigelhkhiatin laisim mipite adingin bang ngimna neihiam, ngimna hoihlo “ill-intentioned” ihneihkhak lohding thupipen hi. Genkhialh aomleh Sorry! Sawltak #zomidaily

Suicide leh Murder Videote a encikdingin Facebookin nasemding mi 3000 behlapding
posted on 6 May 2017 at 1:39 pm Lomkholna: News, Sawltak, Tech
Suicide leh Murder Videote a encikdingin Facebookin nasemding mi 3000 behlapding
Abeisa hunsungah Facebook tungtawnin amauleh amau kithahlupna, ahih keileh gitloh gamtatna leh tualthahna (Suicide & Murder) cihte tamlua ahih manin, tuate a encikdingin Facebook Companyin mi 3000 bang nasemdingin behlapding cihi.
Facebook's CEO and Co-founder ahi Mark Zuckerbergin Wednesday niin agenkhiatnaah kalsimin Reports tulthen millions tampi kingahdenin tuate a encikding, Global Community Operations Teamah ahuhdingin mi 3000 kibehlapding cihi.
Tulaitak Global Community Operations Teamah nasem bekbekpen mi 4500 aomkhinsa hi a, tuatengin zolo uh ahih manin mi 3000 aki behlapding ahihi.
Nungdiakin US, Clevelandah migilo khatin mikhat athahlupna Video pen Facebook tungah khahkhia hi. Tua Video pen Report akibawl hangin nasem kicinglo uh ahih manin, alunlapin kilakhiapah “delete” theilo ahih manin tawlpikhatsung mah Facebook tungah kienthei veve hi.
Tuakhit asawtloin Thailandah papi khatin ata kha 11 aphapan pen khailum in, tua akhailupna pen Facebook Livein khahkhia mawk hi. Tuakhit ciangin amahzong amahleh amah kithailum hi.
Hih atunga kithahlupna Video nihte pen Facebook Companyah Report akibawl hangin nai 24 sung (nikhatsung) bang kiDelete pahloin kientheimawk hi.
Tuabang thupiangte hangin Facebook abawlkhiapa Mark Zuckerbergin Global Community Operations Teamah mi 3000 nasemdingin kibehlapding cih atangkokhia ahihi.
Mark Zuckerberg ngiatin ama Facebook Profile tungah Wednesday niin “If we're going to build a safe community, we need to respond quickly” cih gelhkhia hi.
Mark Zuckergergin agenbehnaah abeisa asawtnailo hunkhatin Facebook Live User khat amahleh amah kithahlupsawm, Suicide sawm cih akitheih ciangin amanlangin kikhawlsakthei cihi. Ahi zongin nungdiak thupiangte ahihleh bangmah kisemmanlo cihi.
More: Nungakno khakin Facebook pan aguaktanglim khakkha ahih manin Blackmail thuak
Ahi zongin Facebook azangbekbek pen leitungbupah mi Billion 2 bang phadek takmawk ahih manin, tua mi 3000 aki behlap zenzen hangin tuipisungah guahtui malkhattawh kibanglel dinghi cin Sarah Roberts kici UCLA pan Assistant Professor khatin genkhia hi. ZD Sawltak #zomidaily

Piancilna
Piancilna 1
1A kipat cil-in Pasianin vantung le leitung a piangsak hi.
mial bikbek a, tua tui tungah Pasian' Khain na a sem hi.
3Pasian in, “Khuavak om hen,” ci hi; tua ciangin khuavak om pah hi.
4Pasian
in tua khuavak hoih hi, ci-in a mu hi. Pasianin khuamial panin
5Pasianin khuavak pen “Sun” ci a, khuamial pen “Zan” ci hi. Nitak hong bei-
in, zingsang hong tung a, ni khat ni ahi hi.
6Pasian in, “Tuite' laizangah van kuumpi om hen la, tua van kuumpiin tui le
tui kikhensak hen,” ci hi.
nuai-a om tuite a khen hi. Tua mah bangin a piang pah hi.
8Pasianin van kuumpi pen “Vantung” ci hi. Nitak hong bei-in zingsang hong
tung a, ni nih ni ahi hi.
9Pasian in, “Vantungte nuai-a om tuite mun khatah kikhawm hen la, lei keu
kidawk hen,” ci hi. Tua mah bangin a piang pah hi.
10Pasianin lei keu pen “Leitung” ci a, a kikaikhawm tuite pen “Tuipi” ci hi.
Pasianin tua pen hoih hi, ci-in a mu hi.
11Pasian
in, “Leitungin kung tuamtuamte piangsak hen la, tang a nei
kungnote, agah sungah tang a om singgah kungte, amau' nam ciatin
leitungah piangsak hen,” ci hi. Tua mah bangin a piang pah hi.
12Leitungin kung tuamtuamte piangkhiasak a, kungnotein amau' nam ciatin
tang piangsakin, singkungin a sungah tang a om gahte piangsakin, amau'
nam ciatciatin piangsak hi. Pasianin tua pen hoih hi, ci-in a mu hi.
13Nitak hong bei-in zingsang hong tung a, ni thum ni ahi hi.
14Pasian in, “Sun le zan a khen dingin vantungah khuavakte om hen; tuate
pen pawi hun le khuahun, ni le kumte khen nading hi hen la,
15leitung khua a vaksak dingin vantungah khuavak hi uh hen,” ci hi. Tua mah
bangin a piang pah hi.
16Pasianin khuavak lian nih bawl a, khuavak lianzaw pen sun a ukding,
17-18Leitungah
khua a vaksakding, sun le zan a ukding, khuamial panin
pen hoih hi, ci-in a mu hi.
19Nitak hong bei-in zingsang hong tung a, ni li ni ahi hi.
20Pasian
in, “Tuitein a nungta ganhing honpite piangsak hen la, vantung
kantanin leitungah vasate leengta hen,” ci hi.
sungah tampi a pha, nuntakna a nei a gamtang thei ganhing namkim le kha a
ci-in a mu hi.
22Pasianin amaute thupha pia a,
“Ci pha-in tampi pha-in, tuipi sung dim
unla, leitungah vasate tampi pha un,” ci hi.
23Nitak hong bei-in zingsang hong tung a, a ni nga ni ahi hi.
24Pasian in, “Nuntakna a nei ganhingte amau nam ciatin leitungin piangsak
hen: Innsa, gamsa, le a bokvak ganhingte amau nam ciatin piangta hen,” a ci
25Innsa, gamsa, le a bokvak ganhing khempeuh amau nam ciatin Pasianin a
piangsak hi. Pasianin tua pen hoih hi, ci-in a mu hi.
ngasate tung, huihlak vasate tung, ganhingte tung, le leitung a a bokvakte
khempeuh tungah ukna neisak ni,” a ci hi.
bangin amah a piangsak hi. Amahin pasal le numei a piangsak hi.
28Pasianin amaute thupha pia a, Pasianin amaute tungah, “Ci pha-in tampi
pha unla, leitung dimin zo un. Tuipi ngasate tung, leitungah a gamtang, a
nungtate khempeuh tungah ukna neita un,” a ci hi.
29Pasian
in, “En un, leitung maitang khempeuhah a om, tang a piangsak
tungah kong pia khinta hi. Tuate an-in na neiding uh hi.
30Leitung
an dingin kung hing khempeuh ka hong pia khinta hi,” a ci hi. Tua mah
bangin a piang pah hi.
31Pasianin a bawlsate khempeuh en a, hoih sa mahmah hi. Nitak hong bei-in
zingsang hong tung a, a ni guk ni ahi hi.

hi.

Piancilna 3
1Tu-in
sangin ngiansiam zaw hi. Amahin numei kiangah, “Pasian in, ‘Huan sung
singgah khat peuhpeuh ne loding,' hong ci ahi hiam?” ci hi.
2Numeiin gulpi kiangah, “Huan sung singgahte ka ne theiding uh hi.
3Ahih hangin Pasian in, ‘Huan laizang a om singgah na ne keiding uh hi,
zong na lawng keiding uh hi. Tua bang hih le-uhcin na siding uh hi,' hong ci
hi,” a ci hi.
4Ahih hangin gulpiin numei kiangah, “Na si keiding uh hi.
ding a, a pha le a sia thei-in, Pasian tawh na kibatding lamtak uh Pasianin
thei hi,” a ci hi.
6Tua
ahih ciangin singkung a hoihna, mi a pilsak dingin tua agah a
deihhuaina a muh ciangin, a singgah loin a ne hi. Amahin singgah kimkhat a
pasal pia a, a pasalin zong a ne hi.
7A nek khit phetun amau tegelin khua phawk uh a, a guaktangin a omlam uh
kithei uh hi. Amautein theitehte khui tuahin puansilh dingin a bawl uh hi.
a, Topa Pasian' muh loh dingin mipa le a zi, huan sung singte lakah a bu uh
hi.
9Ahih hangin Topa Pasianin mipa samin ama kiangah, “Koi lai-ah om na hi
hiam?” a ci hi.
10Amah in, “Nangma gin na huan sungah ka za a, ka lau hi. Bang hang hiam
cih leh ka guaktangin om ka hih manin ka bucip hi,” a ci hi.
11Amah in, “Na guaktanga na omna kuain hong gen ahi hiam? Na nek loh
dinga kong thupiak singgah ne kha na hi hiam?” ci hi.
12Mipa in, “Kei tawh a om dinga nong piak numeiin singgah hong pia a, ken
ka ne hi,” ci hi.
13Tua
ciangin Topa Pasianin numei kiangah, “Bangci a hici gamtat na hi
hiam?” a ci hi. Numei in, “Gulpiin kei hong khem a, ka ne hi,” ci hi.
samsiatna na ngahzaw hi. Na gilpi-in lam na paiding a, na nuntak sung
tawntungin leivui na neding hi.
15Nang
in ama khetul na sunimding hi,” a ci hi.
16Tua
ciangin numei kiangah, “Naupaiina-ah na gimna nakpitakin ka
khangsakding a, na a sapipi-in nau na neiding hi. Ahi zongin na pasal mah
na deihding a, amahin nang tungah hong ukding hi,” a ci hi.
17Tua ciangin mipa kiangah, “Nangin na zi' thu mangin, ‘Nangin na ne kei
leitangin samsiatna ngah hi. Na nuntak tawntung gimpi-in na semin na
18Ling le kiakte, nang a dingin hong pokhiasakding a, nangin gamlak kungte
na neding hi.
19Lei-ah na ciahkik matengin khua-ul kai-in na na sep ciang bekin an na ne
leivui na hih manin, leivui mah na suakkikding hi,” a ci hi.
20Mipain a zi' min pen Eve, ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen mihing
khempeuh' nu ahi hi.
21Topa Pasianin mipa le a zi a dingin savun puan bawl a, amaute silhsak hi.
22Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in, “En un, mipa pen eite khat tawh kibang a, a
nadingin i vaihawmding hi,” ci hi.
24Amah
in mipa hawlkhia hi. Kherub-te le mun khempeuh a nga thei
nisuahna lamah a koih hi.

Kain' Suanlekhakte
17Kainin a zi luppih a, amah gai-in Enok a nei hi. Kainin khuapi khat sat a,
Methushael'pa hi a, Methushael pen Lamek'pa ahi hi.

neite' pianna pupi ahi hi.

23Lamekin a zite kiangah, “Adah le Zillah aw, ka aw ngai un. Lamek' zite aw,
khanglai mi khat ka that khin hi.

Piancilna 10
(1Khang 1:5-23)
1Hihte pen Noah' tapa Shem, Ham, le Jafeth-te' suanlekhakte ahi hi. Tuiciin
2Jafeth' tapate: Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, le Tiras ahi hi.
3Gomer' tapate: Ashkenaz, Rifath, le Togarmah ahi hi.
4Javan' tapate: Elishah, Tarshish, Kittim, le Dodanim ahi hi.
5Hihte pen tuipi gei-a teng mite' pulepa ahi uh hi. Amaute' leitangah amau'
kam pau ciat zangin, a beh, a minamin a om uh hi.
6Ham' tapate: Kush, Egypt, Put, le Kanaan ahi hi.
7Kush' tapate: Seba,
Havilah, Sabtah, Raamah, le Sabteka ahi hi. Raamah'
tapate: Sheba le Dedan ahi hi.

(1Khang 1:28-31)

Abraham' tapa Ishmael' suanlekhakte ahi hi.

pen Nebaioth hi a, tua ciangin Kedar, Adbeel, Mibsam,
14Mishma, Dumah, Massa,

amaute' min ahi hi.

sang-in si a, a behte tawh kivui khawm hi.)

hi a,

tua ciangkangte' mai-ah omkhawm uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin

tuuhon sunga a vomte khempeuh' lam ngasak hi. Amahin ama a' honte a
tuamin koihkhia-in, Laban' tuuhonte tawh koihkhawm lo hi.

ciangin a ginalo zawte Laban a' hi a, a thahat zawte Jakob-a' ahi hi.

Piancilna 36
Esau' Suanlekhakte
(1Khang 1:34-37)
1Hihte pen Esau (Edom) suanlekhakte ahi hi.
2Esauin Kanaan numeite zi-in la hi. Hit mi Elon' tanu Adah, Hiv mi Zibeon'
tapa Anah' tanu Oholibamah,
3le Nebaioth' sanggamnu, Ishmael' tanu Basemath ahi hi.
4Adahin Esau tawh Elifaz nei a, Basemathin Reuel nei hi.
5Oholibamahin Jeush, Jalam, le Korah nei hi. Hihte pen Kanaan gam sunga a
neih Esau' tapate ahi hi.
6Tua ciangin
Esauin a zite, a tapate, a tanute, le ama innkuan sunga mi
khempeuh; a bawngte, a ganhingte khempeuh; le Kanaan gam sunga a lam a
paikhia hi.
ganhingte uh hangin tawlkhat a omna uh leitangin amaute vak zo lo hi.
10Esau' tapate: Esau' zi Adah' tapa Elifaz, Esau' zi Basemath' tapa Reuel ahi
hi.
11Elifaz' tapate: Teman, Omar, Zefo, Gatam, le Kenaz ahi hi.
12(Timna pen Esau' tapa Elifaz' zineu hi a, amahin Elifaz tawh Amalek nei
hi.) Hihte pen Esau' zi Adah' tapate ahi hi.
13Reuel' tapate: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, le Mizzah ahi hi. Hihte pen Esau'
zi Basemath' tapate ahi hi.
14Esau'
zi, Zibeon' tapa Anah' tanu Oholibamah tapate: Jeush, Jalam, le
15Esau' suante hih bang ahi hi. Esau'ta masa Elifaz' tate: Teman, Omar, Zefo,
Kenaz,
hi a, Esau' zi Adah' sunga piangte ahi hi.
17Esau' tapa Reuel' tapate: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, le Mizzah hi a, Edom
gam sungah a om Reuel' suante ahi hi. Amaute pen Esau' zi Basemath' sung
panin a piangte ahi hi.
18Esau' zi Oholibamah' tapate: Jeush, Jalam, le Korah ahi hi. Hihte pen Esau'
zi, Anah' tanu Oholibamah' sung panin a piangte ahi hi.
19Hihte pen Esau (Edom) suante hi a, amaute' sung pan beh lutangte ahi uh
hi.
Seir' Suanlekhakte
(1Khang 1:38-42)
20Tua gam a teng Hori mi Seir' tapate: Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah,
21Dishon, Ezer, le Dishan hi a, Edom gam sunga Seir' suante ahi Hori mite'
22Lotan' tapate: Hori le Heman ahi hi. Lotan' sanggamnu Timna ahi hi.
23Shobal' tapate: Alvan, Manahath, Ebal, Shefo, le Onam ahi hi.
24Zibeon'
tapate: Ai-ah le Anah ahi hi. Amah pen apa Zibeon' late a cin
laitakin gamlakah a sa ciktui a mupa Anah ahi hi.
25Anah' tate: Dishon le Anah' tanu Oholibamah ahi hi.
26Dishon' tapate: Hemdan, Eshban, Ithran, le Kheran ahi hi.
27Ezer' tapate: Bilhan, Zaavan, le Akan ahi hi.
28Dishan' tapate: Uz le Aran ahi hi.
29Hori mite' beh lutangte: Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah,
Edom Kumpite
(1Khang 1:43-54)
33Bela si a, Bozrah khua mi Zerah' tapa Jobabin ama tangin a uk hi.
34Jobab si a, Teman mite' gammi Hushamin ama tangin a uk hi.
35Husham si a, Moab gam sungah Midian mite a zo Bedad' tapa Hadadin
36Hadad si a, Masrekah khua mi Samlahin ama tangin uk hi.
37Samlah si a, Eufratis gun gei-a Rehoboth khua mi Shaulin ama tangin a uk
hi.
38Shaul si a, Akbor' tapa Baalhananin ama tangin a uk hi.
39Akbor' tapa Baalhanan si a, Hadarin ama tangin uk a, ama khuapi min Pau
ahi hi. Ama zi' min Mehetabel hi a, Mezahab' tanu Matred, Matred tanu
40Amau' innkuan le a tenna, amau' min tawh kizui-in, Esau' suan sung pan
minamte' min: Timna, Alvah, Jetheth,
41Oholibamah, Elah, Pinon,
42Kenaz, Teman, Mibzar,
43Magdiel,
le Iram ahi hi. Hihtein amau' neih, amau' tenna leitang min
dingin amau' min mah vawh pah uh a, Esau' suan, Edom mi a kicite ahi uh
hi.
Piancilna 37
Josef le A sanggamte
1Apa tawlkhat a tenna Kanaan gamah Jakob teng hi.
manin a sanggamte tawh tuuhoncing hi. A pa' zite Bilhah le Zilpah' tapate
tawh tangval ahi uh hi. Josefin apa uh kiangah amaute' siat gamtatnate a
gen hi.
4Ahih
hangin apa un a sanggamte khempeuh sangin amah a itzawkna a
sanggamtein a muh uh ciangin, amautein Josef mudah uh a, nuamtakin
amah hopih thei lo uh hi.
5Tu-in Josefin mang khat man a, amahin a sanggamte' lakah a gen ciangin
amautein amah muhdah semsemna-in nei uh hi.
6Amahin amaute kiangah, “Keima mat hih mang ngai un:
7Eitein lo lai-ah buhlom i hen a, keima buhlom tho-inding tang hi. Tua
kiimah note' buhlom kikhawm a, keima buhlom mai-ah kun uh hi,” a ci hi.
8A sanggamtein ama kiangah, “Kote' tungah nangin hong ukding a, kote'
tungah ukna aana neiding na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute
in a mangte le a thugente' hangin amah mudah semsem uh hi.
genin, “Mang dang khat ka man hi. Ni, kha, le aksi sawm le khatte kei' maiah hong kun uh hi,” a ci hi.
10Ahih hangin amahin apa le a sanggamte' kiangah a gen ciangin apain
amah taii-in, “Nangma mat hih mang a bangci mang ahi hiam? Kei le na nu
le na sanggamte, nangma mai leilakah a kun dingin hong paiding ka hi uh
hiam?” a ci hi.
11A sanggamtein amah haza uh a, ahih hangin apain hih thute a ciamteh hi.
12Khatvei apa uh' tuuhonte acing dingin Shekhem gei-ah a sanggamte a pai
hi.
13Israelin Josef kiangah, “Na sanggamtein Shekhem-ah tuuhoncing uh hi lo
ahi hiam? Hong pai in, amau' kiangah hong sawl ning,” a ci hi. Amahin a
kiangah, “Hiah om ing,” a ci hi.
14Tua ahih ciangin amah in, “Tu-in va pai inla, na sanggamte le tuuhonte a
hi.
15Gamlakah a vak kawikawina mi khatin mu a, “Bang zongzong na hi hiam?”
ci-in a dong hi.
16“Ka sanggamte a zong ka hi hi. Amautein koi lai-ah tuuhoncing uh hiam,
hong gen in, hong thum ing,” amahin ci hi.
17Mipa in, “Amaute paikhia zo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh, ‘Dothan-ah pai
ni,' a cih uh ka za hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin a sanggamte' nungah Josef
pai a, Dothan-ah amaute a mu hi.
18Amautein gamlapi-ah amah na mu uh a, amaute' nai-ah amah hong tun
ma-in amautein amah thahding na vaihawm uh hi.
19Amaute khatlekhat in, “Hih lai-ah mangmanpa hong pai hi.
20Tu-in
gamsa khatin amah netum khin hi, i ciding hi. A mangte bang a suak hiam i
muding hi,” a kici uh hi.
21Ahih hangin Reubenin tua thu a zak ciangin, “Amah that kei ni,” ci-in,
nadingin Reubenin amaute' kiangah, “Amah that kei un. Hih gamlak dum
a puantualpi bansau a hawkkhiatsak uh hi.
24Amautein Josef la-in dum sung khatah a lawn uh hi. A dum pen a hawm hi
a, a sungah tui om lo hi.
25Tua ciangin amaute an ne dingin tu uh hi. A khuadak uhleh Gilead panin
Ishmael mite a kalaohte uh tawh singnai, lingsi, le myrrh paknamtui pua-in
Egypt-ah puaksuk dingin a pai mu uh hi.
26Tua ciangin Judahin a sanggamte kiangah, “I sanggampa thatin amah i
ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah i sanggampa, eima cilesa ahi hi,” a ci hi. A
28Tua ciangin Midian mi sumbawltein hong nawk hi. Amautein Josef kai to-
sawmnihin amah zuak uh a, amautein Egypt-ah Josef a paipih uh hi.
in a puan balkek a,
30a sanggamte kiangah ciahkikin, “Tangvalpa om nawn lo hi. Kei bangciding
ka hi hiam?” a ci hi.
31Tua ciangin amautein Josef' puan la-in, keel khat go uh a, a sisan sungah a
puan diah uh hi.
32Amautein a puantualpi bansau apa uh kiangah puak uh a, “Hih puan ka
mu uh hi. Na tapa' puan hi hiam, hi lo hiam tu-in thei in,” a ci uh hi.
33Amahin Josef' puan ahihlam thei a, “Ka tapa' puan ahi hi. Gamsa khatpeuh
om lo hi,” a ci hi.
34Tua ciangin Jakobin ama puan balkekin, a kawngah puanhampi teng a, a
tapa' hangin ni tampi sung a kap hi.
35A tapate le a tanute khempeuhin amah hehnem uh a, ahih hangin amah
hehnep zawhin om lo a, “Hi lo hi. A kapsa-in ka tapa kiang Leinuai-ah ka pai
ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua bangin ama hangin apa kap hi.
ah ulian ahi Potifar' tungah Josef na zuak uh hi.
Piancilna 38
1Tua
2Tua lai-ah Judahin Kanaan mi Shua' tanu mu hi. Amahin tua nu tenpihin
luppih a,
3tua nu gai-in tapa khat nei a, amahin a min Er a phuak hi.
4Tua nu gai leuleu-in tapa khat nei a, tua nuin a min Onan a phuak hi.
5Tua nuin tapa khat nei leuleu-in a min Shelah a phuak hi. Tua nuin amah
tawh Shelah a neih laitakin Khezib-ah amah a om hi.
6Judahin a tapa masa Er a dingin zi khat la a, tua nu' min Tamar ahi hi.
7Ahih hangin Judah'ta masa Er pen Topa' muhna-ah hoih lo a, Topain amah
that hi.
8Tua ciangin Judahin Onan kiangah, “Na sanggampa' zi tawh lumkhawm
inla, tua nu' tungah pasal' sanggamte' tavuan sem inla, na sanggampa a
dinginta nei in,” a ci hi.
a sanggampa' zi tawh a lupkhawm ciangin a sanggampa' tungahta pia kha
10Ama gamtatna Topa' muhna-ah lungkimhuai lo a, Topain amah zong a that
hi.
11Tua ciangin Judahin a monu Tamar' tungah, “Ka tapa Shelah a gol mateng
na pa' inn-ah meigongnu-in va om in,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a
Tamar pai-in a pa' inn-ah a om hi.
12Tua
hun sungin Judah' zi, Shua' tanu si hi. Judah a dahna hun a ven'
13“Na
teekpa a tuute mul met dingin Timnah-ah paito hi,” ci-in Tamar'
kiangah a kigen ciangin,
14a
kitengsak nai lo hi.
15Judahin tua nu a muh ciangin amahin a mai tuam ahih
manin numei
16Lampi gei-a tua nu' kiangah amah pai a, “Hong pai in, lumkhawm ni,” a ci
“I lupkhop man dingin kei bang hong piading na hi hiam?” a ci hi.
17Amahin dawngin, “Keelhon panin keelno khat hong puak ning,” a ci hi.
Tua nu in, “Nong puak mateng khapna khat nong piading hiam?” a ci hi.
18Amah in, “Bang khapna nang hong piading ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua nuin
dawngin, “Na min gelhna le na khauhual le na khutsunga om na ciangkhut,”
a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amahin tua nu tungah tuate pia-in, amah luppih a,
amah tawh tua nu a gai hi.
20Numei' khutsung panin a khapna a lakik dingin Judahin Adullam mi a
lawmpa a ganno tawh a sawl ciangin, amahin tua nu mu zo lo hi.
21Amahin tua lai mun mite dong a, “Lam gei Enaim a om numei paktat nu
koi-ah om ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Hih lai-ah numei paktat om ngei lo
hi,” na ci uh hi.
22Tua ahih ciangin Judah kiangah amah ciahkikin, “Amah ka mu kei hi. Tua
lai mun mite in, ‘Hih lai-ah numei paktat om ngei lo hi,' zong hong ci uh hi,”
a ci hi.
23Judahin dawngin, “Eite hong kinuihsan khading ahih ciangin a nate ama a
dingin kem mai hen. Hih ganno ka puak a, nangin tua nu na muh lohna na
thei hi,” a ci hi.
24Tua
“Amah paikhiatpih un; amah kihaltum hen,” a ci hi.
25Amah a kipaikhiatpih laitakin amahin a teekpa kiangah kam khak a, “Hih
nate a neipa tawh nau ka nei hi,” a ci hi. Tua nu in, “Ciamteh in, hong thum
ing, min gelhna le khauhual le ciangkhut, hih nate kua-a' ahi hiam?” a ci hi.
ciangin, tua numei, kei sangin thuman zaw hi,” a ci hi. Tua nu tawh amah
lumkhawm kik nawn lo hi.
27Tua nu a suah hun a tun ciangin a naubu sungah nih om hi.
28Nausuak dingin a nat ciangin, khatin a khut dawksak hi. Naudom nuin
khausan khat la-in a khut tungah khih a, “Hih pen hong pai masa,” ci pah hi.
29Ahih
hangin a khut a dawh tum kik laitakin, en in, a sanggampa hong
suakkhia hi. Amah in, “Nang a dingin a vang nangmahmahin bawltawm!” a
Piancilna 39
Josef le Potifar' Zi
panin Egypt mi, inncing mangpa, Faro' nuai-a mangpa Potifarin amah na lei
hi.
2Topain Josef ompih a, amah nasep a zo mi khat suak hi. Amah, Egypt mi a
topa' inn sungah om a,
3Topain amah a
mavansakna a topain mu hi.

a innsung ukpa-in bawlin a neih khempeuh a uk dingin a koih hi.
5Amahin a innsung uk leh a neih khempeuh a ukin a bawl a kipan Topain
hitaleh a neih khempeuh tungah Topa' thupha om hi.
6Tua ahih ciangin amahin a neih khempeuh Josef' khut sungah ap hi. Josef
dingin ngaihsun lo hi. Tu-in Josef ngaihbaangin a mel hoih hi.
7Tawlkhat
khit ciangin a topa' ziin Josef zawl mit a, “Kei tawh hong
lumkhawm in,” a ci hi.
8Ahih hangin amahin nialin a topa' zi kiangah, “En in, kei hong nei ahih
9Hih inn sungah kei sangin amah lianzaw lo hi. Nang, ama zi na hih manin,
hi hiam?” a ci hi.
10Amahin ni khat khit ni khat Josef a zol hangin, amah tawh lupkhopding
12tua nuin a puan-in amah man a, “Kei tawh hong lumkhawm hoh in,” a ci
hi. Ahih hangin amahin tua nu' khut sungah a puan nusia-in tai-in tua inn
panin a paikhia hi.
13Tua nu in, amahin a khut sungah puan nusia-in inn panin a taikhiatna a
muh ciangin,
14ama innsung mite samin amaute kiangah, “En un, amahin eite hong no
15Ka aw sangsakin ka kikona a zak ciangin amahin ka kiangah a puan nusia
a, tai-in inn panin paikhia hi,” a ci hi.
16Tua ciangin Josef' topa inn-ah hong ciah mateng amahin a kiangah a puan
koih hi.
mi nasempa keimah a no dingin hong sungtang hi.
18Ahih hangin ka aw sangsakin ka kiko phetin amahin a puan kei kiangah
nusia-in inn panin taikhia hi,” a ci hi.
19“Na nasempain kei hong bawlna dan hih bang hi,” ci-in a ziin ama kianga
a genna a topain a zak ciangin nak heh mahmah hi.
pa' muhna-ah amah maipha a pia hi.
22Thong kempain thong sunga thongkia mi khempeuh Josef' et dingin ap a,
pain don lo hi. Ama hih peuhmah Topain daupaisak hi.
Piancilna 40
Josefin Thongkiate' Mang Khiatsak
1Tua zawh tawlkhat khit ciangin, Egypt kumpipa' an piapa le a anhuanpain
2An piapipa le anhuan pipa ahi, ama nuai-a mangte nih tungah Faro heh a,
3Josef a kikhumna thong sung, inncing mangpa' inn sungah amahin amaute
a koih hi.
4Inncing
mangpain amaute Josef kemsak a, amahin amaute' na sem hi.
Kikhumna sungah amaute tawlkhat om uh hi.
5Zan khat amau tegelin mang man uh hi. Thong sunga a om an piapa le
anhuan pa, amau' mang a tuam tuak, a mang khiatna zong a tuam tuak mah
ahi hi.
6Zingsang
amaute na lungkham uh hi.
7Tua ahih ciangin a topa' inn sunga amah tawh a kikhumin a om Faro' nuai-a
mangte amahin dong a, “Bang hangin tuni-in maimial na hi uh hiam?” a ci
hi.
8Amautein ama kiangah, “Mang ka man uh a, tuate a khiatheiding om lo
hi,” na ci uh hi. Josefin amaute kiangah, “Mang khiat theihnate Pasian' hong
piak hi lo ahi hiam? Kei kiangah hong gen un, hong thum ing,” a ci hi.
9Tua ahih ciangin an piapipain Josef kiangah a mang gen a, “Ka mangin ka
mai-ah leenggui khat om a,
10tua leenggui tungah hiang thum om hi. A sel phetin pakkhia pah a, a bomte
11Ka khut sungah Faro' hai ka tawi hi. Keimahin leenggahte loin Faro' hai
sungah ka suk a, Faro' khut tungah a hai ka pia hi,” a ci hi.
12Tua
thumte, ni thum ahi hi.

16An huanpipain a khiatna a hoihlam hi, ci-in a muh ciangin, amahin Josef
kiangah, “Kei zong mang khat ka man hi: Ka lu tungah mohlawh thum om a,
hangin ka lu tunga lawh sung panin vasatein ne uh hi,” a ci hi.
18Josefin dawngin, “A khiatna hih bang ahi hi: Lawh thumte, ni thum ahi hi.
19Ni thum sungin Faroin nang hong lakhia-in na lu hong tanding a, sing
tung khatah nang hong khaiding hi. Vasatein na sa neding uh hi,” a ci hi.
20A ni thum ni, Faro' suah ni hunin, amahin a nasemte khempeuh a dingin
pawi khat kham a, an piapipa le an huanpipa lakhia hi.
21Amahin an piapipa an piak nasepah koihkik a, amahin Faro' khut sungah
a hai pia hi.
22Ahih hangin Josef' khiat mah bangin an huanpipa a khailum hi.
23Ahi zongin an piapipain Josef phawk nawn lo a, amah mangngilhta hi.

Piancilna 42
1Egypt-ah
an a omna thu Jakobin a theih ciangin a tate kiangah, “Bang
hangin khatlekhat ki-enen mawk na hi uh hiam?
2Egypt-ah an om hi, ci-in ka za hi. Eite si loin i nuntak nadingin paisuk unla,
ei a'ding an va lei un,” a ci hi.
3Tua ahih ciangin Egypt-ah an lei dingin Josef' sanggamte sawm paisuk uh hi.
4Ahih hangin Jakobin Josef' sanggampa Benjamin, a sanggamte tawh paisak
6Tu-in Josef pen tua gam a ukpa hi a, gammi khempeuh tungah an a zuakpa
mai-ah hong kun uh hi.
7Josefin a sanggamte a muh ciangin thei a, ahih hangin amahin midang
hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in, “An lei dingin Kanaan gam panin hong pai hi
ung,” ci uh hi.
8Josefin a sanggamte thei a, ahih hangin a sanggamtein amah thei lo uh hi.
9Josef
in a mangin amaute a mat khitna a phawk hi. Amahin amaute
kiangah, “Note, thukan na hi uh a, hih gam thaneemna a en dingin hong pai
na hi uh hi,” a ci hi.
10Amautein Josef kiangah, “Hi lo hi, topa aw; an lei dingin na nasemte a
hong pai hi ung.
11Kote
khempeuh mi khat'ta ka hi uh hi. Kote, a thutak ka hi uh a, na
nasemte thukan hi lo uh hi,” a ci uh hi.
12Amahin amaute kiangah, “Hi lo hi, hih gam ginat lohna a en dingin hong
pai na hi uh hi,” a ci hi.
13Amaute in, “Ko, nangma nasemte, sanggam pasal sawm le nih ka hi uh a,
Kanaan gam sungah mi khat'ta ka hi uh hi. A moi pen tu laitakin kapa uh
tawh om a, khat pen om nawn lo hi,” a ci uh hi.
mah ahi hi. Note, thukan na hi uh hi.
16Note' sungah thuman om hiam, ci-in a kimuh nading, na thugente uh a kitel
bangin note, thukan na hi taktak uh hi,” a ci hi.
17Amahin thong sungah ni thum sung amaute a koih hi.
18A ni thum ni-in Josefin amaute kiangah, “Keimahin Pasian zahtak ka hih
lai unla, a dangte pai-in na innkuan uh a gilkialte a dingin an pua unla,
gente uh kitelding a, note na si keiding uh hi,” a ci hi. Amaute tua
bangmahin gamta uh hi.

eite i mawh hi. Amahin eite kiangah hong thum napi-in eitein a thu i ngaih

hi.

Josef' Sanggamte Kanaan-ah Ciahkik

Piancilna 48
1Tua zawh a sawt loin, “Napa a ci na hi,” ci-in Josef kiangah kigen ahih
ciangin amahin a tapa nihte Manasseh le Efraim a paipih hi.
2Jakob kiangah, “Na tapa Josef na kiangah hong pai hi,” ci-in kigen hi. Tua
ciangin Israelin a tha sanin a lupna tungah a tu hi.
3Jakobin Josef kiangah,
4kei kiangah, ‘En in, nang hong pungsakin, mihing hon khatin hong bawlin,
leitang ka piading hi,' hong ci hi.
panin a suak na tapa nihte keima-a' ahi hi. Reuben le Simeon-te mah bangin
Efraim le Manasseh zong keima a' hiding hi.
Amau' gamh luahna-ah amau' sanggamte' min tawh amaute kilo khawm
ding hi.
Efrath tun ma diak,
(Bethlehem) paina lampi-ah amah ka vui hi,” a ci hi.
8Israelin Josef' tapate a muh ciangin amah in, “Hihte kua ahi hiam?” a ci hi.
9Josefin a pa' kiangah, “Pasianin hih lai-ah kei hong piak ka tapate ahi hi,”
a ci hi. Amah in, “Kong thum hi; amaute thupha ka piak theih nadingin ka
kiangah hong paipih in,” a ci hi.
10Tu-in Israel' mitte a khanghamna hangin maang a, amahin khua mu thei lo
namin a kawi hi.
11Israelin Josef kiangah, “Na maitang a hong mu kik dingin ka kingaihsun
kei hi. Tua hi napi, Pasianin na tate zong kei hong musak hi,” a ci hi.
a kun hi.
13Josef
in amau tegel la-in, Efraim' taklam khut, Israel' veilam khutah,
Manasseh' veilam khut, Israel' taklam khutah a paipih hi.
14Israelin a taklam khut zanin a nauzaw Efraim' lu tungah nga a, Manasseh a
ta upa ahih manin, a khut kipaihpehsakin Manasseh' lu tungah a veilam khut
a nga hi.
15Amah
in Josef thupha pia-in, “Ka pate Abraham le Isaacin a na a sep
Pasian, tuni dongin ka nuntak tawntungah lam hongpi Pasian,
16siatna
thupha pia hen la, amaute sungah keima min le kapa Abraham le Isaac' min
kizomsak hen la, leitungah amaute mi honpi khatin khangsakta hen!” a ci hi.
17Apain a taklam khut Efraim' lu tungah a koih Josefin a muh ciangin, tua
in amah lungkim lo sak hi. Efraim' lu panin Manasseh' lu tungah koih dingin
amahin a pa' khut a la hi.
18Josefin apa kiangah, “Hi lo hi,pa aw; hih pen a suak masa ahi hi. Na
taklam khut ama lu tungah koih in,” a ci hi.
19Ahih hangin apain nial a, “Ka thei hi, kata aw; ka thei hi. Amah zong mi
lianzawding a, a suanlekhakte, minam lianpi khat suakding hi,” a ci hi.
20Tua
sungah thupha na hiding uh a, ‘Pasianin Efraim le Manasseh bangin note
hong bawl hen,' kiciding hi,” a ci hi. Tua bangin Jakobin Manasseh' mai-ah
Efraim a koih hi.
21Tua ciangin Israelin Josef kiangah, “En in, kei a siding ka hita hi. Ahih
22Tua tham loin, ka namsau le ka thal tawh Amor mite' khut tung panin ka
lak mualpang khat, na sanggamte' tung sangin nang' tungah kong piazaw hi,”
a ci hi.
Piancilna 49
Jakobin A Tapate' thu A Genkholhna
1Tua ciangin Jakobin a tapate sam a, “A hong tungding hunte-ah note' tunga
2“Jakob' tapate aw, hong kikhawmin za unla, napa Israel' thugen ngai un.
3“Reuben, nang pen kata upa, ka vangliatna le ka tacil na hi a, a kiphasak
pen, a vanglian pen na hi hi.
cih leh ka zi na luppih a, ka lupna na mindaisak hi.
5“Simeon le Levi, unau hi a, a hiam uh ngongtat nadingin a zang uh hi.
6Amau' kikhopna-ah ka kihel keiding a, amau' pawl tawh ka kizom keiding
tawh amautein mawlpih dingin bawngtalte' zagui a sattat uh hi.
7Amau' sinsona lauhuai a, amau' hehna kihtakhuai hi. Samsiatna ngahta uh
ka thehthangding hi.
8“Judah aw, na sanggamtein nang hong phatding hi. Na galte' gawl na meek
ding a, na sanggamte na mai-ah hong kunding uh hi.
9Judah pen humpinelkai tawh kibang a, a sa matsa a nek khit ciangin a kua-
ah a ciahkik tawh kibang hi. Humpinelkai bangin kizia-in a lumsuk hi. Kuain
10Judahin kumpi ciangkhut len tawntungding a, a suan a khaktein zong
a, zahtakna tawh ama mai-ah kunding uh hi.
11A sakolno leenggui-ah khih a, a lano leenggui limci penah khih hi. Amahin
sawp hi.
12Leenggahzu a neknekna-in a mit san gega a, bawngnawi a neknekna-in a ha
pak hi.
13“Zebulun,
ding a, Sidon ciang dongah a gamgi omding hi.
14“Issakhar, a hat la tawh kibang a, vangik nih kikalah a lum hi.
17Dan pen lampi-ah gulpi hiding a, sul gei-ah gulgu nei hiding hi. Sakol'
khetul petin a tuangpa a nungkiat hi.
18“Nong hotkhiatding ka ngak hi, Topa.
20“Asher' lo-ah an tampi piangding a, amahin kumpi anlimte bawlding hi.
21“Naftali, a kikhah sakhipi hi a, sakhino suakkhiasak hi.
22“Josef, agah pha hiang ahi hi. Ciktui gei-a om agah pha hiang hi a, a
gimsak uh hi.
24Ahih
hangin ama thal ling loin om a, a khutte kizaptelsak hi. Jakob'
(Israel Suangpi, Tuucingpa' min),
25nang hong huhding na pa' Pasianin tunga om vantung thuphate, nuai-a
tuithukna sunga om thuphate, khawilevulh le tuletate, nangma tungah hong
pia hi.
sanggamte' kiang panin a kituam koihpa' tungah hong tung tahen.
27“Benjamin, a ne bakbak keivom hi a, zingsangin a sa matsa ne-in, nitakin a
ngahsa teng hawm hi,” a ci hi.
28Hihte
amau tawh a kituak ciatin apain amaute thupha pia-in a gente ahi hi.
Jakob' Sihna le Kivuina
29-30Tua ciangin Jakobin a tate thuhilhin amaute kiangah, “Kei, ka mipihte
in Hit mi Efron' tung panin a lo tawh a leikhop, Kanaan gam, Mamre
nisuahna lamah a om Makpelah lo-a leihawm, Hit mi Efron' lo-a leihawm han
31Tua lai munah amautein Abraham le a zi Sarah vui uh hi. Tua lai munah
amautein Isaac le a zi Rebekah vui uh hi. Tua lai munah keimahin Leah ka
vui hi.
32Lo le tua sunga om leihawm Hit mite' tung panin a kilei ahi hi,” a ci hi.
33Jakobin a tapate thuhilh a man khit ciangin, a lupna tungah laitat a, a
nunung pen a hu sang-in ama mipihte kiang a zuanta hi.
Piancilna 50
1Tua ciangin Josef a pa' tungah pukin, ama tungah kap a, amah a nam hi.
hi. Egypt mite ama hangin ni sawmsagih sung a kap uh hi.
4Ama hangin kahna hun a bei ciangin Josefin Faro' innkuante kiangah, “Tu-
in note' mai-ah maipha ka ngah leh Faro' kiangah thu nong va gensakding
uh kong thum hi.
5Kapain kei hong kiciamsak a, ‘Kei a siding ka hita hi. Kanaan leitangah
ahih ciangin tu-in kei hong paitosak inla, kapa hong vuisak in, ci-in kong
thum hi. Tua ciangin kei kong ciahkikding hi, ci hi, va cihsak un,” a ci hi.
6Faroin dawngin, “Paito inla, nang hong kiciamsak bangin napa va vui in,” a
ci hi.
7Tua ahih ciangin apa a vui dingin Josef paito hi. Amah tawh Faro' nasemte
khempeuh, a innsung upate, Egypt gam upate khempeuh zong,
8Josef' innkuante khempeuh, a sanggamte, a pa' innkuante bangmahin paito
uh hi. A tate uh, a tuuhonte uh le a ganhing honte bek uh Goshen gamah
kinusia hi.

ahi hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua mun pen Abelmizraim, kici hi. Tua
dingin bawlsak uh hi.

21Tua ahih ciangin lau kei un. Note le na tate uh a dingin an kong piading

Josef' Sihna

23Josefin khang thumna ahi Efraim' tate mu hi. Manasseh' tapa Makhir' tate
zong Josef' innsung mahah suak uh hi.
24Josefin a sanggamte kiangah, “Kei a siding ka hita hi. Ahih hangin Pasian
in note hong kemding a, hih leitang panin amahin Abraham, Isaac, le Jakob
tunga a ciamsa leitangah note hong paikhiatpih toding hi,” a ci hi.
25Tua ciangin Josefin Israel tapate' kiciamna bawlin, “Pasianin note hong
kemding a, notein hih lai panin ka guhte na pua toding uh hi,” a ci hi.

Paikhiatna
Paikhiatna 1
Egypt-ah Israel-te' Thuakna
1Jakob tawh Egypt-ah a hong pai, amau' innkuan ciat tawh ahi Israel' tapate'
minte:
2Reuben, Simeon, Levi, le Judah,
3Issakhar, Zebulun, le Benjamin,
4Dan le Naftali, Gad le Asher ahi hi.
5Jakob' suanlekhakte khempeuh mi sawmsagih hi a, Josef pen Egypt-ah na
om khinzo hi.
6Tua ciangin Josef le a sanggamte le tua khangmi khempeuh si uh hi.
7Ahih hangin Israel' suanlekhakte pungin nakpitakin khang uh hi. Amaute
9Amah
in a mipihte kiangah, “En un, Israel mite eite a dingin tam lua-in
thahat lua uh hi.
hih gam panin taikhia khading uh hi,” a ci hi.
11Tua
Rameses khuapite lam uh hi.
12Ahih
kizelthang zaw uh hi. Egypt mitein Israel mite kihta uh hi.
13Tua ahih ciangin amautein Israel mite a gim mahmahin na semsak uh a,
amau' nuntakna haksasak uh hi. Israel mite' sepna khempeuhah amautein a
gim mahmahin semsak uh hi.
15Tua ciangin Egypt kumpipain Hebru mi nau a domsakte, khat' min Shifrah,
adang khat' min Puah a kicite kiangah,
ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
17Ahih hangin naudomtein Pasian zahtak uh hi. Egypt kumpipain amaute a
thupiak bangin gamta lo uh a, nau pasalte nungtasak uh hi.
18Tua
“Bang hangin hih bangin gamta a, nau pasalte nungtasak na hi uh hiam?” a ci
hi.
19Naudomtein Faro' kiangah, “Hebru numeite le Egypt numeite a kibatlohna
naudomte a tun ma-in amaute na suak khin pahpah uh hi,” na ci uh hi.
semsem uh hi.

Paikhiatna 2
Moses' Suahna
1Tu-in Levi' suante khatin Levi numei khat mah zi-in la hi.
2Tua numei gai-in tapa khat nei a, nau hoih khat hi, ci-in a muh ciangin, kha
thum sung a seel hi.
4Amah bang a
sanggamnu ading hi.
5Tu-in Faro' tanu a kisil dingin gun-ah hong pai a, a nasem numeite gun gei-
ah a vak lai takun amahin phaikungte lakah a lawh mu a, tua lawh a la
6Amahin a hon ciangin naungek mu hi. Naungek kap ahih manin tua nuin
hehpihhuai sa a, “Hih naungek, Hebru mite'ta khat ahi hi,” a ci hi.
7Tua
ciangin a sanggamnuin Faro tanu kiangah, “Keimah pai-in Hebru
ka va sapsakding hiam?” a ci hi.
8Faro' tanuin ama kiangah, “Va pai in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin numeino
pai-in naupang' nu va sam hi.
9Faro' tanuin ama kiangah, “Hih naupang la inla, kei a dingin hong khoisak
in; na thaman kong piading hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin nupiin naupang lain a khoi hi.
10Naupang khang a, amahin Faro tanu' kiangah paipih a, amah pen tua nu'
amah in, “Tui sung panin amah ka kai khia hi,” a ci hi.
11Ni
khat, Moses a khan khit ciangin, ama mipihte kiangah pai-in amau'
gimnate va mu hi. Egypt mi khatin ama mipih Hebru mi khat a sat zong a
mu hi.
sehnel sungah a seel hi.
13A zing ciangin amah paikik a, Hebru mi nih na kilai uh hi. Amahin a gamta
khial mipa kiangah, “Bang hangin na lawm sat na hi hiam?” a ci hi.
14Amahin dawngin, “Kote' tungah ulianding le thukhen dingin kuain nang
hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Moses lau a, “A thu hong kithei taktak hi,” ciin ngaihsun hi.
khatah tu hi.
tui tawi uh a, apa uh' tuuhonte tui pia dingin kuangzawn dim uh hi.
in amaute huh a, a tuuhonte uh tui piaksak hi.
18Apa uh kiangah amaute a tun ciangun amah in, “A bangci-a tuni-a hong
hici ciah baih na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi.
19Amaute in, “Egypt mi khatin tuucing dangte' khutsung panin kote hong
uh hi.
20Amahin a tanute kiangah, “Amah koi lai-ah om ahi hiam? Bang hangin tua
mipa nusia na hi uh hiam? Amahin an hong nek theih nadingin va sam un,”
a ci hi.
tanu Zipporah a pia hi.
22Tua nuin tapa khat nei a, amahin a min Gershom a phuak hi. Bang hang
hiam cih leh amah in, “Gam dangah peemta ka hi hi,” a ci hi.
23Tua
24Pasianin amau' thumna za hi. Pasianin Abraham, Isaac, le Jakob tawh a
thuciamna a phawk hi.
25Pasianin Israel mite mu a, amaute' omzia zong a thei hi.
Paikhiatna 3
1Tu-in Mosesin Midian siampi ahi, a sungpa Jethro' tuuhon kem hi. Amahin
kilang hi. Amah khuadak a, sawlpang a kuang a mu hi. Ahi zongin kangtum
lo hi.
3Moses in, “Bang hangin sawlpang kangtum lo hiam, kei pai-in hih a lamdang
ka muh va en dih ning,” ci hi.
4Tua thu a thei dingin amah a paina Topain a muh ciangin, sawlpang kawm
panin Pasianin amah sam a, “Moses, Moses!” a ci hi. Amah in, “Hiah om
ing,” ci hi.
5Tua ciangin amah in, “A nai-ah hong pai kei in. Na khe panin na khedapte
hi,” a ci hi.
6Tua ciangin amah in, “Kei pen na pa' Pasian, Abraham' Pasian, Isaac' Pasian,
le Jakob' Pasian ka hi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Mosesin Pasian a muhding
7Tua ciangin Topa in, “Egypt-ah a om ka mite' gimna mu khinin, amaute a uk
nasem ukte' hangin amau' kikona ka za khin hi. Amau' thuaknate ka thei a,
khia-in a hoih a tanzau leitang, bawngnawi le khuaizu a luanna leitang,
Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite, le Jebus mite' omnaah amaute a paipih dingin kong paisuk hi.
9Tu-in, en in, Israel mite' kikona kei kiang hong tung khin a, Egypt mitein
amaute a netniamna ka mu khin hi.
10Hong
pai in, nangin Egypt panin ka mi Israel-te na paikhiatpih theih
nadingin Faro' kiangah nang kong sawlding hi,” a ci hi.
11Ahih hangin Mosesin Pasian kiangah, “Faro' kiangah pai-in Egypt panin
Israel mite a paikhiatpih dingin kei, kua ka hi hiam?” ci hi.
12Amah in, “Nang tawh kong om taktakding hi. Hih pen nangma a dingin
paikhiatpih khit ciangin, nangin hih mualtungah Pasian na biading hi,” a ci
hi.
13Tua ciangin Mosesin Pasian kiangah,
“Israel mite kiangah kei va pai-in
amaute kiangah, ‘Na pate uh' Pasianin note' kiangah kei hong sawl hi,' va ci
leng, amaute in, ‘Ama min bang ahi hiam?' ci-in hong dong leh, amaute'
tungah bang ciding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi.
14Pasianin Moses kiangah, “Keimah ka hi hi,” ci hi. Tua ciangin Pasian in,
“Israel mite tungah hih thu genin, ‘Keimah a kicipain note kiangah kei hong
sawl hi,' ci in,” a ci hi.
15Pasianin Moses kiangah, “Hih thu Israel mite tungah gen in: ‘Topa, na pate
uh' Pasian, Abraham' Pasian, Isaac' Pasian, le Jakob' Pasianin note kiangah
khang tawntungin phawkding ka hi hi.
16Pai in, Israel upate kaikhawmin amaute kiangah, ‘Topa, na pate uh' Pasian,
Abraham, Isaac, le Jakob' Pasian keima tungah hong kilang khinin, “Note le
17Egypt gam panin note hong lakhia-in Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Amor mite,
Perez mite, Hiv mite, le Jebus mite' leitang, bawngnawi le khuaizu a luanna
leitangah note kong paipihding ka kiciam hi,” ci hi,' va ci in.
18“Amautein nangma thu hong ngaiding uh hi. Nang le Israel upate, Egypt
kumpipa kiangah pai-in ama tungah, ‘Topa ahi Hebru mite' Pasian, kote'
kiangah hong kilangzo hi. Tu-in kong thum uh hi, Topa ka Pasian uh' tungah
va ci un.
21“Keimahin Egypt mite' muhna-ah hih mihingte maipha ka piading hi. Note
na paikhiat uh ciangin, a hawm guakin na pai keiding uh hi.
le na tanute uh tungah tuate na koihding uh hi. Tua bangin notein Egypt
mite' na na sutding uh hi,” a ci hi.
Paikhiatna 4
1Tua ciangin Mosesin dawngin, “Ahih hangin amautein kei hong um loin ka
tungah Topa hong kilang lo hi,' hong ciding uh hi,” a ci hi.
2Topain ama kiangah, “Na khut sungah bang om ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah
in, “Ciangkhut,” ci hi.
3Tua ciangin amah in, “Lei-ah lawn in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amahin
4Ahih hangin Topain Moses kiangah, “Na khut zan inla a mei-in man in,” ci
a suakkik hi.
5Tua ciangin amah in, “Amautein a up theih nadingun Topa, amaute' Pasian,
Abraham' Pasian, Isaac' Pasian, le Jakob' Pasian, nang' tungah hong kilang
khinzo hi,” a ci hi.
6Tua ciangin Topain ama kiangah, “Na khut, na ang sungah koih in,” ci kik
hi. Amahin a khut a ang sungah koih hi. Amahin a lak khiat kik ciangin, a
7Tua ciangin Pasian in, “Na khut na ang sungah koih kik in,” ci hi. Tua ahih
8Pasian in, “Amautein nang hong up kei a, lim masa a thudon kei uhleh
zong, amautein lim nunung um khading uh hi.
9Amaute
10Ahih hangin Mosesin Topa kiangah, “Oh, ka Topa aw, tumasiah hitaleh na
nasempa tungah thu na gen a kipan hitaleh, kei thugen a siam ka hi kei hi.
Ka kam pau ol-in, ka pau awk hi,” a ci hi.
11Tua ciangin Topain ama kiangah, “Kuain mipa' kam bawl ahi hiam? Kua
in amah pau thei losak, bilngongsak, musak, mittawsak ahi hiam? Topaahi
keimah hi lo ka hi hiam?
12Tua ahih ciangin tu-in pai in. Keimahin na thugenna-ah kong huhding a,
na thugending nang kong hilhding hi,” a ci hi.
13Ahih hangin amah in, “Oh, ka Topa aw, hong thum ing; midang khat sawl
zaw in,” a ci hi.
“Levi mi na sanggampa
Aaron om hi lo ahi hiam? Amahin hoihtakin thu a gen theihna ka cian theih
hi. En in, nangmah a dawn dingin amah hong paikhia a, amahin nang hong
15Nangmahin ama kiangah thu na gending a, thute amah na theisakding hi.
hi.
16Amahin nang' tangin mite tungah thu gending hi. Amahin nang a dingin
tawiding hi,” a ci hi.
18Tua
ciangin a sungpa Jethro' kiangah Moses pai-in ama kiangah, “Hong
nungta lai uh hiam hong musak in,” a ci hi. Jethroin Moses kiangah, “Cidam
takin va ciahkik in,” a ci hi.
19Midian
gam sungah Topain Moses kiangah, “Egypt-ah ciahkik in. Bang
hang hiam cih leh nang a hong that nuam mi khempeuh si khinta uh hi,” a ci
hi.
20Tua ahih ciangin Mosesin a
zi le a tapate la a, la khat tungah amaute
tuangsakin, Egypt gamah ciah kik hi. Pasianin a tawi dingin a gen ciangkhut,
21Topain
Moses kiangah, “Egypt-ah na ciahkik ciangin, nangma hih theih
in mite paisak loding hi.
22Nangmahin Faro' kiangah, ‘Topain hih bangin ci hi: Israel pen ka tapa a
suak masa hi a,
23nangma kiangah, “Amahin kei hong biak theih nadingin ka tapa paisak in,”
kong ci hi. Amah paisakding na nial leh, en in, na tapa a suak masa ka that
ding hi, ci hi,' ci in,” a ci hi.
24Lampi-ah a giahna khatah Topain Moses dawntuahin thah a sawm hi.
25Tua ciangin Zipporahin meisuang khat la-in a tapa' vun dawn at khiatsak a,
tua tawh Moses lawngin, “Nang pen kei' tungah sisan tawh ka pasal na hi
taktak hi!” a ci hi.
hangin “Sisan tawh ka pasal na hi hi,” a ci hi.
27Tua laitakin Topain Aaron kiangah, “Moses a dawn dingin sehnel gamah
pai in,” ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah pai-in, Pasian' mualah Moses dawnin a
nam hi.
28Topain
khempeuh Mosesin Aaron' tungah a gen hi.
29Tua ciangin Moses le Aaron pai-in Israel upate khempeuh a kaikhawm uh
hi.
30Topain Moses kianga a gensa thute khempeuh Aaronin gen a, Mosesin
mite' muhna-ah na lamdangte a lak hi.
31Mitein um uh hi. Israel mite kiangah Topa hawhin, amau' thuaknate amah
in a muh khitna thu amautein a zak uh ciangin, amautein a lu uh kunin
Pasian a bia uh hi.

3lo

hi,' ci-in gen in,” a ci hi.
5Topain a hun khat seh a, “Zing ciangin Topain hih gam sungah hih na hong
semding hi,” a ci hi.
6A zing ciangin Topain hih na sem hi. Egypt mite' ganhing khempeuh si a,
ahih hangin Israel mite' ganhing khat zong si lo hi.
7Faroin a en dingin mi sawl a, Israel-te' ganhing khat zong na si lo hi. Ahih
hangin Faro' lungsim khauh lai a, amahin mite paisak lo hi.

siding uh hi,” ci hi,' ci-in gen in,” a ci hi.

a ganhingte inn-ah taisak hi.

nusia hi.

na khut zan in,” a ci hi.

Paikhiatna 11
1Topain Moses kiangah, “Faro le Egypt tungah gimna khat ka tungsak lai
2Pasal peuhmahin a vengte kiang pan, numei peuhmahin zong a vengte'
thu gen in,” a ci hi.

Moses pen Egypt leitang tung, Faro' nasemte' muhna, le mite' muhna-ah lian
mahmah hi.
4Moses
in Faro' kiangah, “Topain hih bangin ci hi: Zankim pawlin Egypt
mite' lakah ka paiding hi.
5Kumpi tokhom tunga tu Faro' tacil a kipanin an gawina nunga a om nasem
khempeuh siding hi.

7Ahih hangin Egypt mite le Israel mite a kilamdangin Topain bawl hi, ci-in
nangawn zong tau loding hi, ci hi” a ci hi.

mahmahsa-in a paikhia hi.
9Tua ciangin Topain Moses kiangah, “Egypt tungah nalamdang tam ka bawl
theih nadingin Faroin na thu hong ngai lo laiding hi,” a ci hi.
10Moses le Aaronin hih na lamdangte khempeuh Faro' mai-ah a bawl uh
hi. Topain Faro' lungsim khauhsak a, amahin Israel mite a leitang panin
paikhiasak lo hi.

1Egypt gam sungah Topain Moses le Aaron kiangah,
sungah a kha masa hiding hi.

14“Hih pen note a dingin phawkna ni hiding a, notein Topa' tungah pawi

kip khatin na nei tawntungding uh hi,” a ci hi.
15Topa in, “Notein ni sagih sung silngo sawh loh anlum na neding uh hi. A
ni masa ni-in notein na inn panun silngo na hemkhiading uh hi. Bang hang
hiam cih leh khatpeuhin a ni masa ni panin a ni sagih ni dong silngo sawh a
16A ni masa ni le a ni sagih ni-in a siangtho biak kikhopna khat na neiding
uh a, tua ni nih sung na bangmah na sem keiding uh hi. Ahi zongin na
milipun an huanin na ne theiding uh hi.
khatin na nei tawntungding uh hi.
18Kha masa, tua kha sawm le li nitakin notein silngo sawh loh anlum na ne
ding uh a, tua kha ni sawmnih le khat nitak dong na neding uh hi.
20Silngo a kisawh peuhmah na ne keiding uh hi. Na omna khempeuh uhah

dalnate bawl inla, siangthosak in,' nong ci hi,” a ci hi.

dingin siampite le mite paisuaksak kei in,” a ci hi.

Thunuama Piakna
1“Mi khat' biakna pen thunuama biakna ahih a, amahin a nu hitaleh apa
hitaleh bawnghon lak panin a piak leh, amahin Topa' mai-ah a sitbaang lo
2Tua ciangin amahin a biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in kikhopna buk
tungah a si thehding uh hi.
3Thunuama
biakna panin Topa'tungah mei tawh biakna-in a gilpi tuam a
thaute le a sungkuate' tunga a om a thau khempeuh tawh,
4a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau le a kalte tawh a lakkhiat khopding ahi a
sintuamte piading uh hi.

Aaron le A Tapate Apna
(Pai 29:1-37)
1Topain Moses kiangah,
2“Aaron le amah tawh a om a tapate, a puante, a nilh sathau, khialhna hanga
biakna a bawngtal, a tuutal nihte le silngo sawh loh anlum lawh la inla,
3kikhopna bukkongah Israel mihonte khempeuh khawm in,” a ci hi.
4Topain
5Moses
in mihonte kiangah, “Tu-a ka hih dingte penTopain hih dingin a
thupiak ahi hi,” a ci hi.
6Tua ciangin Mosesin Aaron le a tapate paipihin tui tawh amaute a sil hi.
7Amah
in a puantungsilh amah silhsak a, a kawnggak tawh gakin, a
puantualpi silhsak a, a siampipuan silhsakin, siampipuan' khau, hoihtakin a
8Amahin ama tungah a awmdal bulhin, a awmdal sungah Urim le Thummim
a koih hi.
9Amah
in Aaron' lu tungah a dialpi khimsakin, a dialpi tung a mai
lamah, Topain Moses a thupiak bangin amahin kham peek, a siangtho
kumpi lukhu a khusak hi.
10Tua ciangin Mosesin nilh sathau la-in, biakbuk le a sunga om khempeuh
nuhin tuate a ap hi.
nazat khempeuh le kuang le a ngaknate, ap dingin sathau a nuh hi.
12Amah
in nilh sathau kimkhat Aaron' tungah sung a, ap dingin amah a
sathau a nilh hi.
13Topain
Moses a thupiak bangin, Mosesin Aaron' tapate paipih a,
puantungsilhte silhsakin, kawnggak tawh amaute gak a, amau' lu tungah
lukhute a khih hi.
tapatein tua bawngtal lu tungah amau' khut nga uh hi.
15Kilemna bawl nadingin Mosesin a bawngtal go a, a si la-in a kiima biakna
site sungkhia-in a ap hi.
16A sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh le a sintuamte le a kal nihte a thau
17Ahih hangin, Topain Moses a thupiak bangin a omlai a vun, a sa le a ek,
18Tua ciangin Mosesin meihal biakna tuutal pia a, Aaron le a tapatein tuutal
lu tungah amau' khut nga uh hi.
19Mosesin tua tuutal go-in, biakna tau tung kimkotah a si theh hi.
20Tuutal a kisemnen ciangin, Mosesin a lu le a ki-atnente le a thau a hal hi.
21Topain Moses a thupiak bangin, a sungkuate le a khete tui tawh a kisawp
22Tua

25Tua ciangin amahin a thau, a mei thau le a sungkuate tunga om a thau

27Amahin hihte khempeuh, Aaron le a tapate' khut sungah koih a, amautein
vei-a biakna-in Topa' mai-ah tuate a vei uh hi.

30Tua ciangin Mosesin nilh sathau kimkhat le biakna tau tunga om a si la-in,
Mosesin Aaron le ama tapate, a puante uh tawh a apkhawm hi.

tapatein neding uh hi,' ka cih mah bangin, kikhopna buk kongah a sa huan
unla, tua lai munah tua sa le kipsakna biakna lawh sungah a om anlum ne
unla,
32a sa le anlum na khamvalte uh mei tawh na halding uh hi.

Nadab le Abihu' Khialhna
1Tu-in Aaron' tapate Nadab le Abihuin amau' paknamtui beel tuak la-in, a
sungah mei koih uh a, a tungah paknamtui koihin, Topain amau' tungah tua
banga thu a piak ngei loh a siang lo mei, Topa' mai-ah a pia uh hi.
2Topa' omna mun panin mei hong paikhia-in amaute kang a, Topa' mai-ah a
si uh hi.
3Tua
ciangin Mosesin Aaron' kiangah, “Topa in, ‘Ka kiang nai-a a omte
kiangah keimah a siangtho-in ka kilakding a, mi khempeuh' mai-ah keimah
hong kiminthangsakding hi,' ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi. Aaron pau loin a om hi.
4Moses
in Aaron' pa' sanggampa Uzziel' tapate Mishael le Elizafan samin
sanggamte uh puakhia un,” a ci hi.
5Tua
pualamah amau' puantungsilh mah uh tawh amaute a puakhia uh hi.
Siampite' Nasep le Kaihte
6Tua ciangin Mosesin Aaron le a tapate Eleazar le Ithamar kiangah, “Na lu
uha na sam uh phiahsak kei unla, na puante uh balkek kei un. Tua bangin na
Ahih hangin na mipih uh, Israel mihon buppi pen, Topa' meiin a katlup mite'
7Kikhopna buk kong panin a pualamah paikhia kei un. Na pai uhleh na si
ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' nilh sathau note' tungah om hi,” a
ci hi. Moses' gen bangin amaute a gamta uh hi.
8Topain Aaron kiangah,
9“Nang
leenggahzu hitaleh khamtheih zu hitaleh ne kei un. Na nek uhleh na siding
khat hiding hi.
10Notein a siangtho le a mawkmawk, le a nin le a siang na khending uh hi.
11Topain
12Moses
in Aaron le a omlai a tapate Eleazar le Ithamar kiangah,
notein Israel mite a hilhding na hi uh hi,” a ci hi.

14Ahih hangin a kivei a iik le a kipia a pheite pen nang le na tapate le na
15Topain
a thupiaksa bangin a kipia a phei le a kivei a iikte
ahihlehTopa' mai-ah vei-a biakna-in vei dingin amautein meihal biakna
sathau tawh hong paipihding uh a, tua pen nang le na tapatein a
tawntungin na kaihding uh ahi hi,” a ci hi.
na kihal khin mawk hi. Aaron' tapa a omlai Eleazar le Ithamar-te' tungah
17“Notein mihonte a dingin Topa' mai-ah kilemna bawlin, amau' mawhna a

hi uh hiam?
18En un, biakbuk sungah a sisan kipaipih lo hi. Ka thupiaksa bangin notein
biakbuk sungah na nek dingun a kilawm ahi hi,” a ci hi.

Ganhing a Siang le a Nin
(Thkna 14:3-21)
1Topain Moses le Aaron tungah,
3Ganhingte lak panin a khecin a ka, eknel a hai peuhmah na ne theiding uh
hi.
na nek theih loh dingte uh: Kalaohin eknel a hai hangin a khecin ka lo ahih
5Sakikh ganhingin eknel a hai hangin a khecin ka lo ahih ciangin note a
dingin a nin ahi hi.
6Bilpiin eknel a hai hangin a khecin ka lo ahih ciangin note a dingin a nin
ahi hi.
ahi hi.
8Notein tuate' sa na ne keiding uh a, a sisate zong na lawng keiding uh hi.
hitaleh tui sungah a om phe le lip a neite peuhmah na ne theiding uh hi.
10Ahih hangin tuipi sung, gun sunga om phe le lip a nei lo, tui sunga a hontat
11Tuate pen note a dingin a kihhuai hiding hi. Notein tuate' sa na ne kei
ding uh a, a sisate zong na kihding uh hi.
12Tui sunga a omte sung panin phe le lip a nei lo peuhmah note a dingin a
13“Vasate
lak panin notein na kihding uh, a kine loding, a kihhuaite:
Muvanlai, mupi, luimu,
14mumeika, musan nam khempeuh,
15va-ak nam khempeuh,
16vasa-kalaoh, pengpelep, vatawt, musi nam khempeuh,
17keising, tuimu, gun vakang,
18gam vatawt, tui vatawt, musane,
19gun vapi, gun vazonei nam khempeuh, huihtun, le bak ahi hi.
20“Khe li tawh a pai, kha a nei ganhing khempeuhte, note a dingin a kihhuai
ahi hi.
21Ahi
ne theiding uh hi.

A Hoih lo Gamtatna Kikham
1Topain Moses kiangah,
2“Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Kei penTopa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
note na gamta keiding uh hi. Notein amau' gamtatnate na zui keiding uh hi.
ding uh hi. Kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
5Tua ahih ciangin notein ka thukhamte le ka biakna ngeina kipte na zuiding
uh hi. Tuate a zui mi peuhpeuh nungtading hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi hi.
6“Note kuamahin na kinaipih na behte uh mawhpih dingin na naih keiding
uh hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi hi.
7Na nu mawhpihna tawh na pa' tungah maizumna na tun keiding hi. Amah
pen na nu ahih manin na mawhpih keiding hi.
8Nangmahin na pa' zi dangte zong na mawhpih keiding hi. Tua pen na pa'
9Nangmahin na sanggamnu, na pa' tanu, ahih kei leh na nu' tanu, inn-a suak
10Nangmahin na tapa' tanu ahih kei leh na tanu' tanu na mawhpih keiding
hi.
11Na pa' zi' tanu, na pa' tanu pen na sanggamnu ahih manin na mawhpih kei
ding hi.
12Na ni na mawhpih keiding hi; tua nu pen na pa' sanggam numei ahi hi.
pen na nu tawh a kinai beh numei ahi hi.
14Na pa' sanggampa' tungah mindaina na tun keiding hi; tua pen ama zi na
15Na monu na mawhpih keiding hi; tua nu pen na tapa' zi ahi hi; amah na
16Na sanggampa' zi na mawhpih keiding hi; tua pen na sanggampa' mindai

leh, amapa a daisak ahi hi. Tua nu mei tawh kihallumding hi.

zong balkek loding hi.

sawmsagih le tulli le zaguk a pha hi.

sawmnga le tulli le zali a pha hi.

31Kikhopna buk sungah amau' sep dingte in: Biakbuk khuampeekte, a zawlte,
a khuampite, khuam bullente tawh,
32a kimkota om buktual a khuampite a bullente tawh, khetphimte, a khaute,
a nazatte khempeuh le a nengnengte hi a, amaute' puak dingin a kiseh nate a
minin na loding hi.
33Hih pen siampi Aaron' tapa Ithamar' khutnuai-ah Merari mitein kikhopna
buk sungah a sepding teng uh ahi hi,” a ci hi.
34-48Topa' thupiakna bangin Moses le Aaron le mihonte' makaitein Levi mite
sung panin beh thumte - Kohath-te beh, Gershon-te beh, le Merari-te beh
sunga om pasal mi phazah sim uh hi. Kikhopna buk sungah na a sem thei
hi:
Kohath mi pasal a behtangun tulnih le zasagih le sawmnga a pha hi.
Gershon mi pasal a behtangun tulnih le zaguk le sawmthum a pha hi.
Merari mi pasal a behtangun tulthum le zanih ahi hi. Moses le Aaron le Israel
makaitein a sim, Levi mi a kisim peuhmah, van puak nasep le kikhopna buk
kiseh a, Topa' thupiak bangin Mosesin amaute a sim hi.

loding hi.
tau nasep notein na semding uh hi.
6En un, Israel mite kiang panin na sanggam uh Levi mite ka la khin a, amaute

letsongin kong piak hi a, midangtein hong sep leh kithatding hi,” a ci hi.
8Tua ciangin Topain Aaron kiangah, “En in, kei tungah hong kipia biakna a

siangtho pen hiding hi.
10A siangtho pen mun khatah na neding uh hi. Pasal peuhmahin ne thei
ding hi; note a dingin a siangtho ahi hi.
11“Amau'
letsong biakna, Israel mitein vei-a biaknate khempeuh uh zong
nomau-a' ahi hi. Nang le na tapate le na tanute' kaih tawntung dingin tuate
kong pia hi. Na inn sunga om a siangtho mi peuhpeuhin ne theiding hi.

hi.

1Israel mite, a mihon buppi, a kha masa sungin Zin gamlak tung uh a, Kadesh
munah phual sat uh hi. Tua lai-ah Miriam si a, tua lai mahah kivui hi.
2Tu-in mihonte a'ding tui om lo ahih manin Moses le Aaron' langah amaute
kikhawmin kituah uh hi.

hizaw hohta le ung!

Thupiak Sawmte
(Pai 20:1-17)
1Moses
in Israel-te khempeuh samin amaute kiangah, “Israel-te aw, tuni-a
2Topa i Pasianin eite tawh Horeb-ah thuciamna khat bawl hi.
3Topain i pute i pate bek tawh hih thuciamna a bawl hi loin, tuni-a a hinglai
4-5Note' tungah Topa' thu a gen dingin Topa le note' kikalah ka din laitakin,
6“‘Kei
Pasian uh ka hi hi.
7“‘Keimah longal pasian dang na nei keiding uh hi.
8“‘A
kiseek milim hitaleh, tunga vantung hitaleh, nuai-a leitung hitaleh,
leinuai-a om tui sung hitalehah a om na khat peuhpeuh a sun khat peuhpeuh
note a dingin na bawl keiding uh hi.
9Amaute' mai-ah kun loin, amau' na na sem keiding uh hi; bang hang hiam
cih leh keimah Topa note' Pasian, a aam Pasian ka hi a, kei hong mudahte'
10ahih hangin kei hong itin ka thupiakte a zui mi a tul tampite' tungah itna
kip a lakpa ka hi hi.
11“Topa note' Pasian' min a sia lamin na zang keiding uh hi; bang hang hiam
cih leh Topain ama min a sia lamin a zang mi a mawh lo hi, ci loding hi.
ni tang un.
13Ni guk sung na semin na nasepding khempeuh uh na hihding uh hi.
14Ahih hangin a ni sagih ni pen Topa note' Pasian' Sabbath ni ahi hi. Tua ni-
in note bangin na nasem numei le na nasem pasalte uh a tawlngak theih
nadingin note, na tapate, na tanute, na nasemnute, na nasempate, na
bawngtal, na la, na ganhing khat peuhpeuh uh le na huang sung uha om zinte
in na khat peuhpeuh sem loding uh hi.
15Egypt-ah nasem na hihna uh le tua lai panin Topa na Pasian un a vangliatna
ciangin Sabbath ni na tan'ding uh Topa note' Pasianin thu hong pia hi.

Pasianin hong piak leitang tungah na khan uh sau-in na
nopsak theih nadingun Topa note' Pasianin hong thupiak bangin na nu napa
uh zahtak un.
17“‘Mi na that keiding uh hi.
18“‘Nulepa mawhna zong na bawl keiding uh hi.
19“‘Na na gu keiding uh hi.
20“‘Na vengte uh langkhatah zong a man loin teci na pang keiding uh hi.
21“‘Na vengte uh zi zong na deihgawh keiding uh hi. Na vengte' inn, a lo, a
nasempa, a nasemnu, a bawngtal, a la, ahih kei leh na vengte' na khat
peuhpeuh na deihgawh keiding uh hi,' ci hi.

Mi that a Kithei lopa' Thu Khenna
1“Topa na Pasian un note' neih dingin a hong piak leitangah mi khat kithatin
gamlakah lum a, a that a kitheih kei leh,
2na upate uh le na thukhente uh hong paikhia-in, a kithat mipa' omna kiima
khuapite a gamlatna tehding uh hi.
3Tua ciangin a kithat mipa' omna tawh a kinai pen khuapi upatein a kisin
nai lo, kol a kai nai lo bawngla khat lading uh hi.
4Tua khuapi upatein a kikho nai lo, khaici a kivawh nai lo, tuiluang a omna
ngawng attanding uh hi.
5Topa na Pasian un Levi mi siampite ama na a semding le Topa' min tawh
ngawng a kitan bawngla tungah a khut uh silding uh a,
7amautein teci pangin, ‘Kotein hih mipa ka that kei uh a, a kithahlam zong
ka thei kei uh hi.

Anpalte le Sawm-ah-khat Piakna Zia
1“Topa na Pasian un luah dingin a hong piak leitangah va pai-in, tua leitang
luahin a tungah na ten uh ciangin,
omsak nadingun Topa na Pasian un a teelna munah na paiding uh hi.
3Tua hun laitakin na a sem siampipa kiangah pai-in ama kiangah, ‘Topain
kote piak dingin ka pu ka pate uh tungah a ciam leitangah ka tun khitna uh
tuni-in Topa na Pasian kiangah kong ko uh hi,' na ciding uh hi.
4“Tua
a,Topa note' Pasian biakna tau mai-ah koihding hi.
5“Topa note' Pasian mai-ah note in, ‘A vak kawikawi kote' pupi pen Aram mi
hi a, amah Egypt-ah paisukin tua munah a peem lai-in mi tawmno ahi hi. Tua
lai-ah amah a lian, a thahat, tampi a pha minam khat a suak hi.
bawl uh hi.
7Tua ciangin ka pu ka pate uh Pasian ahi Topa Pasian' tungah ka kiko uh
a, Topain kote' aw hong za-in, ka gimnate uh, ka sepnate uh le hong
netniamnate uh a mu hi.
8Topain a vangliatna le a thahatna, launa lianpi, lim le na lamdangte tawh
gah a min masa kong paipih uh hi,' na ciding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa note'
Pasian' mai-ah na koihsukding uh a, Topa note' Pasian' mai-ah na biading
uh hi.
11Topanote' Pasianin note le na innkuanpihte uh tungah hong piak na a hoih
lungdam khawmding uh hi.
12“Sawm-ah-khat piak kum ahi, a kum thumna kumin, amautein na khuapite
uh sungah an ne-in, gilvahin a om theih nadingun Levi mite, peemtate,pa nei
lote, le meigong numeite tungah na piak uh, na khawhsa uh sawm-ah-khat na
piak khit uh ciangin,
13Topa note'
Pasian' mai-ah, ‘Ka innsung panin a siangtho dingteng ka
khempeuh tawh kizui-in Levi mite, peemtate,pa nei lote, le meigong numeite
ka mangngilh zong om lo hi.
14Dahin ka kah sungin zong sawm-ah-khat ka ne kei a, ka nit sungin zong ka
khenkhia kei a, misite tungah zong ka pia kei hi. Topa ka Pasian' thu ka
nangma mi Israel-te le na hong piaksa leitang thupha hong pia in,' na ciding
uh hi.
16“Tuni-in Topa na Pasian un hih thukhamte le ngeina kipte na zuihding uh
nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh na hihding uh limtakin na ngaihsunding uh hi.
ding uh na gen khin uh hi.

(Siam 26:3-13; Thkna 7:12-24)
1“Note
in Topa na Pasian uh thu mangin, tuni-a kong gen ama thupiakna
3“Khuapi sungah thupha ngah mi na hiding uh a, lote-ah zong thupha ngah
mi mah na hiding uh hi.
4“Note' sung pana piangte, le na leitang uh pana piangte, le na ganhing uh
pana piang, na bawngte uh pungin na tuuhonte uh tungah thupha omding
hi.

zongin bangmah mu lo uh hi.
24Amautein Joshua kiangah, “Topain leitang khempeuh eite' khut sungah
lungmang uh hi,” a ci uh hi.

pen Akhor Kuam, kici hi.

thuciamna palsatin, notein pasian dangte' na semin tuate na biak
uhleh, Topa na Pasian un note tawh kisai-in a ciam na hoih khempeuh a tun
piak leitang hoih panin note manlang takin na beiding uh hi,” a ci hi.
Joshua 24
Joshua' Vaikhakna
1Tua ciangin Joshuain Israel minam khempeuh Shekhem-ah kaikhawmin a
upate, a makaite, a thukhente, le Israel uliante a sam hi. Tua ciangin Pasian'
mai-ah amau ciat kipia uh hi.
2Tua
ciangin Joshuain mi khempeuh tungah, “Israel Pasian, Topain hih
bangin thu gen a, ‘Tanglai-in Eufratis gun galkhatah na pu na pate uh teng
ngei a, tuate lakah Abraham le Nahor'pa Terah pen khat bek ahi hi. Na pu na
pate un pasian dangte bia uh hi.
3Tua
khempeuhah ka paipih a, a suanlekhakte tampi ka phasak hi. Ama tungah
Isaac ka pia a,
ka pia a, ahih hangin Jakob le a tate Egypt-ah a paisuk uh hi.
5Tua ciangin Moses le Aaron ka sawl a, a gam sunga ka sepnate tawh Egypt
6Egypt panin na pu na pate uh ka paikhiatpih a, tuipi a tung uh hi. Egypt
mitein leeng le sakol tung tuangte tawh na pu na pate uh San Tuipi-ah delh
uh hi.
7Kei
hi. Egypt tungah ka bawlna na thei uh a, sehnel gam sungah sauveipi na om
uh hi.
hi. Amautein note hong do-in, note' khut sungah amaute kong pia a, notein
amau' leitang na luah uh a, note' mai-ah amaute ka susia hi.
9Tua
hong do hi. Amahin mi sawlin note hong samsia dingin Beor' tapa Balaam a
samsak hi.
honkhia hi.
11Tua ahih ciangin Jordan galkhatah pai-in Jerikho na tung uh a, Jerikho
mitein note hong do uh hi. Amor mite, Perez mite, Kanaan mite, Hit mite,
Girgash mite, Hiv mite, le Jebus mitein zong note hong do uh a, ahi zongin
12Amor kumpi nihte note mai-ah a hawlkhia tunpite keimahin note mai-ah
hang uh hi lo hi.
13Notein na sep loh uh leitang, na sat loh uh khuapite, note tungah kong pia
a, tuate sungah na teng uh hi. Na suan loh uh leenggui lo pan agah leh oliv
huan pan agah na ne uh hi,' ci hi.

15Topa' na na sepnop kei uhleh, Gun galkhat a a na na sepsak uh na pu na
pate uh pasian ahi a, note' tenna gam Amor mite' pasian ahi zongin, a na na
in ahihleh Topa' na ka semding uh hi,” a ci hi.
16Tua ciangin mitein dawngin, “Adang pasian-te' na a sem dingin Topanusiat
hong paikhiatpih, eite' muhna-ah tua lim liante a bawl, i paina lampi
ahi hi.
18Topain eite' mai-ah tua gam a teng Amor mite khempeuh hawlkhia hi. Tua
ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi.
19Ahih hangin Joshuain mite kiangah, “Topa' na na semzo keiding uh hi.
ahi hi. Note' thupalsatna ahi a, na khialhna uh ahi zongin hong maisak lo
ding hi.
20Topa nusia-in gamdang pasian-te' na na sep uhleh, note tungah a hoih hong
hong beisakding hi,” a ci hi.
21Tua ciangin mitein Joshua kiangah, “Hilo hi; Topa' na ka semding uh hi,”
a ci uh hi.
22Tua ciangin Joshuain mite kiangah, “Ama na a sem dingin Topa na teel
khitna uhah note a dingin note mah teci na hi uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin
amaute in, “Kote, teci ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi.
23Amah in, “Tua ahihleh note' lakah a om gamdang pasian-te koihkhia unla,
Israel Pasian, Topa' lamah na lungsim uh nga un,” a ci hi.
24Mitein Joshua kiangah, “Topa i Pasian' na ka semding uh a, ama thu ka
mangding uh hi,” a ci uh hi.
25Tua
phut hi.
27Tua ciangin Joshuain mi khempeuh kiangah, “En un, hih suangtum pen
note' langkhatah teci hiding hi,” a ci hi.
28Tua ahih ciangin Joshuain a milipin amau' gamh ciatah, mite a ciahsak hi.
Joshua le Eleazar-te' Sihna
(Thukhente 2:6-10)
29Hih thute khit ciangin Topa' nasem, Nun' tapa Joshua si a, a khan kum za le
kum sawmkhat a pha hi.
Timnathserah mun a ama gamhluah leitangah a vui uh hi.
31Joshua'
khang sungin Israel mitein Topa' na sem a, Israel mite a dingin Topain a sep
na khempeuh a thei uh hi.
32Israel mitein Egypt panin a puak uh Josef' guhte pen Shekhem'pa Hamor'
a, tua leitang pen Josef' suanlekhakte' luah a suak hi.
33Tua ciangin Aaron' tapa Eleazar a si hi. Amautein Efraim mualtung gam
sunga a om, ama tapa Finehas tungah a kipia Gibeah khua-ah a vui uh hi.
Thukhente
Thukhente 1
1Joshua a sih khit ciangin Israel mitein Topa tungah thu dong uh a, “Kanaan
mite a sim dingin kua kuanto masading ka hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi.
2Topa in, “Judah minamte kuanto masading uh hi. En un, amau' khut sungah
tua leitang ka piazo hi,” a ci hi.
3Tua
ciangin Judah minamtein a sanggam uh Simeon minamte kiangah,
hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Simeon minamtein a zui uh hi.
4Tua
ciangin Judah minamte kuanto uh a,Topain amaute' khut sungah
bang a zo uh hi.
5Amautein Bezek-ah Adonibezek tuakin amah tawh kido uh a, Kanaan mite
le Perez mite a zo uh hi.
6Adonibezek tai hi. Ahih hangin amautein delhin man uh a, a khutpite le a
khepite attan uh hi.
7Tua
ciangin Adonibezek in, “A khutpi le a khepi a ki-attan kumpi
sawmsagihtein ka sabuai nuai-ah an nengkia tawm ngei uh hi. Ka
gamtatnasa bangin Pasianin kei hong thuk hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amautein
Jerusalem-ah amah paipih uh a, tua munah amah a si hi.
Judah Minamtein Jerusalem le Hebron Zo
8Tua ciangin Judah mitein Jerusalem simin la uh a, a mite thatin a khuapi
hal uh hi.
9Tua khit ciangin Judah mite, mualtung gam, Negeb gam, le lei niamna-a
10Tua ciangin Hebron (Hebron pen a nidangin Kiriatharba)-ah a teng Kanaan
mite a sim dingin Judah mite kuansuk uh a, amautein Sheshai le Ahiman le
Talmai a zo uh hi.
(Joshua 15:13-19)
12Tua ciangin Kaleb in, “Kiriathsefer simin a lazopa tungah a zi dingin ka
tanu Aksah ka piading hi,” a ci hi.
13Tua ciangin Kaleb' naupa Kenaz' tapa Othniel inla a, amahin a zi dingin a
14Tua nu tawh a kiten ciangin apa kiang panin lo khat a nget nading a zi
hahsawl hi. A zi zong a la tung panin kum a, Kalebin ama kiangah, “Bang ut
na hi hiam?” a ci hi.

Thukhente 2
Bokhim-ah Topa' Vantung Mi
1Tu-in Gilgal panin Bokhim-ah Topa' vantungmi paito hi. Amahin Israel mite
kiangah, “Egypt panin note kong paipihto a, na pu na pate uh tungah piak
2hih gam a teng mite tawh thuciamna na bawl keiding uh hi. Amau' biakna
taute na susiading uh hi,' ka hong ci hi. Ahih hangin notein ka thupiakna na
mang kei uh hi. Bang hangin lehgamtat na hi uh hiam?
3Tua ahih ciangin tu-in keimahin note' mai-ah amaute ka hawlkhia keiding
hi. Amaute pen note' lang suakding uh a, a pasian-te uh note a dingin thang
antah hiding hi,” a ci hi.

pia a, amautein a galte uh nangzo nawn lo uh hi.

hi. Tua ahih ciangin amautein lungkhamna tuak uh hi.

Thukhente 3
Israel-te Ze-etna Dingin A Kisit Minamte
1Tu-in
Israel-te ze-et nadingin Topain minam pawlkhat a siit hi.
3Tua a siit minamte: Filistia ulian ngate, Kanaan mi khempeuh, Sidon mite, le
4Moses tungtawnin a pu a pate uh a thupiak, Topa' thupiaknate Israel-tein a
mang uh hiam, cih a kitheih nadingin amaute pen Israel-te a kize-etna ahi hi.
5Tua ahih ciangin Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite, le
6Amautein a zi dingun a tanute uh la uh a, amau' tanute a tapate uh tungah
a pia uh hi. Amautein a pasian-te uh a bia uh hi.
7Topa' muhna-ah Israel-te a sia gamta-in, Topa amau' Pasian mangngilh uh a,
Baal-te le Asherah milimte a bia uh hi.

tapa Othniel, amaute a honkhia dingin a khangsak hi.
10Topa' Kha ama tungah tung a, amah, Israel mite' thukhen a suak hi. Galsim
Kushanrishathaim a pia hi.

a thau mahmah mi khat ahi hi.

Thukhente 4
Deborah le Barakin Sisera Zo

ciangin Topain Hazor-ah a uk, Kanaan kumpipa Jabin' khut sungah
amaute a pia hi. Ama galkapte a ukpa pen, Harosheth-ha-goiimah a teng
3Tua ciangin Israel mite huhna a ngen dingin Topa'tungah a kiko uh hi. Bang
4Tua hun lai-in Lappidoth' zi kamsang numei Deborahin Israel-te thu khen
hi.
ama kiangah, “Topa, Israel-te' Pasianin nang thu hong pia-in, ‘Pai in, Tabor
sawm bang lain hong ci hi lo ahi hiam?
7Keimahin Jabin' galkapmang Sisera, Kishon gun-ah nang hong dawntuah
dingin a leengte le a galkapte tawh ka kaikhiading a, na khut sungah amah
kong piading hi,' hong ci hi,” a ci hi.

kei,' na ci in,” a ci hi.
