Thukhente 5
Deborah le Barak' La
1Tua ciangin Deborah le Abinoam' tapa Barakin tua ni-in la sa uh a,
2“Makaitein Israel-te makai uh a, mite amau mahmah utna tawh kipia uh hi.
3Ngai un, kumpite aw, na bil uh ngat un, uliante aw. Topa tungah la ka sa
ding a, Israel-te' Pasian, Topa' tungah la ngaih ka sading hi.
4Topa aw, Seir panin na paikhiat ciang, Edom gam panin na paikhiat ciang,
leitung ling a, vantung panin guah zu hi. Hi hi, meiitein tui hong khia a,
5Topa' mai-ah mualte kiling hi, Israel Pasian, Topa' mai Sinai galkhatah.
6“Anath' tapa Shamgar' hun lai, Jael' hun lai-in, a hon hona khualzinte om
nawn lo a, khualzinte lam gei-ah pial uh hi.
7Israel
sunga lo khote khawlcip uh a, bangmah sem thei lo uh hi. Nang,
8A thak pasian-te a kiteel ciangin, kulhkongpi sungah gal om pah hi. Lum ahi
pai hi. Topa phat un.
10“A thu gen un, no la puang tungah a tuangte, sualphah puanhoih tungah a
tute le lampi-ah a paite aw.
11Tui phuala lasakna a tumte' ginnain Topa' gualzawhna gen a, Israel sunga
lo khotein zong a gualzawhna mah genkik uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa' mite
kulhkongpite-ah paisuk uh hi.
12“Khanglo in, khanglo in, Deborah! Khanglo in, khanglo in, la khat sa in!
Tho in, Barak, na galmatte paikhiatpih in, Abinoam' tapa aw.
13Tua ciangin ulianpa' mi a omlaite paisuk uh a, ama a'ding a dosak dingin
Topa' mite paisuk uh hi.
14Efraim panin amaute dingkhia-in tua kuamah pai uh a, nang, Benjamin, na
panin ulianpa' ciangkhut a tawite hong paisuk uh hi.
nakpi taka lungsim ngaihsutna a om hi.

a om hi.

18Zebulun

tuite' gei, Taanak-ah do uh a, amautein a kinusia ngunte ngah lo uh hi.
20Vantung panin aksitein do uh a, amau paina ciat panin Sisera do uh hi.
21Kishon
22Tua ciangin sakol khe, a kop taina, a sakol hangte' koptaina a ging hi.
Topa a huh dingin hong kuan lo uh hi,' a ci hi.

25Siserain tui ngen a, Jaelin bawngnawi pia hi. Ulian hai sungah tua nuin
26Amah
in puanbuk khetphim a khutin zam a, a taklam khutin nasemte'
khetbuk a zam hi. Sisera khatvei sat a, a lutang satkhamin, amahin
phelkhamin a paang a sun hi.
27Amah tuk hi, amah puk hi. Tua nu' khe kiangah amah taang loin om hi.
Ama khe phungah amah tuk hi, amah puk hi. A tukna munah, amah a si-in
puk hi.
28“Tawlet panin Sisera' nu khuadak a, a kikalh simsiam kawm panin Sisera'
hiam? A leeng khegingte bang hangin hici zekai ahi hiam?' a ci hi.
29A numeite a pilpennuin amah a dawng hiam, dawng lo hi. Amah le amah
kidawng a,
30‘Amaute
in vankinusiate mu-in hawm hi lo ahi hiam? Mi khat ciangin
kinusia puan kinim a kizemte, a kinim a kizem puan nihte ka ngawng ading
maw?' a ci hi.
31“Tua ahih ciangin na gal khempeuh si khin uh hi, Topa! Ahih hangin na
lawmte pen a vangliatna tawh a suak ni bangta hen,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin
Thukhente 6
1Topa' muhna-ah Israel-te a sia gamta uh a, Topain Midian-te' khut sungah
2Israel-te
tungah Midian-te gualzo uh hi. Midian-te' kiang panin a buk
nadingun leihawmte le munmuanhuaite a bawl uh hi.

bawngtal ahi a, la ahi zongin siit nei lo uh hi.

hong pai-in kote a dinginpa le siampi hong hi in. Nang a dingin mi khat' inn
minam le beh siampi hihding hoihzaw ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi.

omsakin, amaute paikhia uh hi.

hi.

5Tua ciangin Mahlon le Khilion si a, tua nupi a tapa nihte le a pasalin sihsan

9Topain na pasal kik uh inn tuakah hong nuamsasakta hen!” a ci hi. Tua

Ruth 2
Ruthin Boaz' Lo-ah Ansang Tawm
1Tu-in Naomiin a pasal' tanaute, Elimelek innkuansung mi, Boaz min nei a
2Tua ciangin Moab mi Ruthin Naomi kiangah, “Lo-ah hong kuansakin la,
in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Pai in, ka tanu aw,” a ci hi.
3Tua ahih ciangin amah kuankhia-in pai a, anlate' nung lo sungah ansangte a
tawm hi. Elimelek-te innkuan Boaz' lo-ah va kuankha hi.
4Boaz zong Bethlehem panin hong kuanin amahin anlate kiangah, “Topain
note hong ompihta hen!” a ci hi. Amautein dawngin, “Topain nang thupha
hong piata hen,” a ci uh hi.
5Tua ciangin Boazin anlate a uk a nasempa kiangah, “Hih ka muh ngei loh
numei kua'ta ahi hiam?” a ci hi.

7Tua
numei in, ‘Kong thum hi; ansang hong tawmsakin anlate' nungah
hi,” a ci hi.

in bangmah hong cih loding ahih manin ka nasem numeite' nai-ah om cinten
in.
9Amaute' anlakna lo mitsuan inla, amaute' nungah zui in. Nang hong bawlsiat
tangvalte' tui tawisa dawn in,” a ci hi.
10Tua ciangin amah a mai-in lei-ah puk a, leilakah kunin ama kiangah, “Kei
mai-ah maipha ngah thei ka hi hiam?” a ci hi.
11Ahih hangin Boazin tua nu dawngin, “Na pasal a sih khit a kipan na teeknu
a dingin na sepnate khempeuh, le na nu le napa le na pianna gam nusia-in
12Topain na gamtatnasate a pha tawh hong thuk a, a liimnuai beel dinga na
paina Israel-te' Pasian, Topain thaman a cingin hong piading hi,” a ci hi.
hang hiam cih leh kei pen na nasem numeite hi lo napi-in na nasemnu'
tungah migitna kam nong pau hi,” a ci hi.
14Annek hun ciangin Boazin tua nu kiangah, “Hih lai-ah hong pai in; anlum
ne inla, leenggahzu sungah na an diah in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin anlate
gei-ah amah tu a, tuapain ankante tua nu a pia hi. Amahin a kham mateng
ne a, a khamval zong pawlkhat omlai hi.

Saul le A Tapate' Sihna
(1Khang 10:1-14)
1Filistia-tein Israel-te sim uh hi. Filistia-te' mai-ah Israel-te tai uh a, Gilboa
2Filistia-tein Saul le a tapate pha uh hi. Filistia-tein Saul' tapate Jonathan,
Abinadab, le Malkhishua a that uh hi.
4Tua ciangin Saulin a galhiam puapa kiangah, “Hih dawibia mite hong pai-in
inla, tua tawh hong dawtlet in,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin a galhiam puapain hih
6Tua bangin Saul, a tapa thumte, a galhiam puapa, le a mi khempeuh, a ni
kikhatin a sikhawm uh hi.
7Tua
Israel mite tai-in Saul le a tapate a sih khitna thu a zak uh ciangin amautein
a khuapite uh nusia-in tai uh ahih ciangin Filistia-te hong pai-in tuate sungah
a teng uh hi.
8A zing ciangin a kithat mite' na a la dingin Filistia-te hong pai ciangin Saul
le a tapa thumte Gilboa Mual tungah a si mu uh hi.
9Amautein Saul' lu tankhia-in a galhiam hawkkhia uh a, a milimte uh le mite
sawl uh hi.
10Amaute
khuakulhah ama luang a suang uh hi.
11Ahih hangin Jabeshgileadah a teng mitein Saul' tungah Filistia-te' hihna a
zak uh ciangin,
panin Saul' luang le a tapate' luangte va la uh hi. Amautein Jabesh-ah
tunpihin tua lai-ah a hal uh hi.
13Amautein a guhte la-in Jabesh khuasung makeng kung nuai-ah vui uh a, ni
sagih sung an a tang uh hi.

David' Sihna
(1Khang 29:26-30)
10Tua ciangin David si a, David khuapi sungah kivui hi.
11Israel-te tungah Davidin kum sawmli sung uk hi. Amahin Hebron-ah kum
sagih sung ukin, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmthum le kum thum sung uk hi.

13Tua ciangin Solomon' nu Bathsheba kiangah Davidin Haggith tawh a neih

2 Kumpi Nihnate 8
1Tu-in Elishain a tapa a hinkiksak numei kiangah, “Ding in; na innkuan tawh
hong tungding hi,” ci khinzo hi.
Tua nu a innkuan tawh pai-in Filistia-te gamah kum sagih sung a peem hi.
kumpipa kiangah a inn le a leitang a ngen dingin a pai hi.
4Tua laitakin Pasian' mipa' nasem Gehazi tawh kumpipa kiho a, “Elisha' sepsa
na lian khempeuh hong gen in,” a ci hi.
5Elishain a sisa mi a hinsakna thu kumpipa kiangah a gen laitakin, a tapa a
ciangin Gehazi in, “Ka topa, Kumpipa aw, hih lai-ah a numei om a, Elishain
a hinkiksak a tapa zong hih lai-ah om hi,” a ci hi.
6Kumpipain numei kiangah a dot ciangin tua nuin ama kiangah a gen hi.
Tua ahih ciangin kumpipain a uliante khat sawlin, “Leitang a nusiat ni a
piakik in,” a ci hi.
7Syria kumpipa Benhadad cina-in a om laitakin Damaskas-ah Elisha hong pai
hi. Ama kiangah, “Hih lai-ah Pasian' mipa hong pai hi,” ci-in a kigen ciangin
8kumpipain ama nuai-a ulian Hazael kiangah, “Letsong khat kengin Pasian'
mipa a dawn dingin va pai in. Ama tungtawnin Topa thu va dong inla, ‘Hih
natna panin ka damkikzoding hiam, ci hi,' va ci in,” a ci hi.
kei hong sawlin, ‘Hih natna panin ka damkikzoding hiam?' ci hi,” a ci hi.
10Tua ciangin Elishain ama kiangah, “Pai in; ama kiangah gen in, ‘Na damkik
kiangah hong lak khin hi,” a ci hi.
gega hi. Tua ciangin Pasian' mipa a kap hi.

13Tua ciangin Hazael in, “Ui bang ahi lel na nasempain hih na lian a hih
dingin bang ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Elishain dawngin, “Syria tungah nang kumpi
na hihding thu Topain kei tungah hong lak khinzo hi,” a ci hi.
14Tua ciangin Elisha kiang panin amah kihemkhia a, ama kiangah, “Elishain
nang kiangah bang hong ci ahi hiam?” a na ci Benhadad kiangah va tung hi.
Tua ciangin amahin dawngin, “Amahin kei kiangah nang na damkik
taktaknading thu hong gen hi,” a ci hi.

Jehoram' tapa Ahaziahin ukding kipan hi.

Omri' tanu ahi hi.

2 Kumpi Nihnate 9
1Tua
kiangah, “Kithawi inla, hih sathau biing tawi-in Ramothgilead-ah va pai in.
2Na tun ciangin Nimshi' tapa Jehoshafat, a tapa Jehu tua lai-ah va zong in.
3Tua ciangin sathau biing la-in ama lu tungah sung inla, ‘Topain hih bangin
ci hi: Israel tungah kumpi-in sathau kong nilh hi, ci hi,' va ci in. Tua ciangin
kongkhak hong inla tai in; zekai kei in,” a ci hi.
5Amah a tun ciangin, galkap a uktein thu kikupna na nei uh hi. Tua ciangin
amah in, “A ukpa aw, nang tungah thugending khat ka nei hi,” a ci hi. Tua
ciangin Jehu in, “Kote lakah kua' tungah nei na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin
amah in, “Nangma tung hi, a ukpa aw,” a ci hi.
6Tua
ciangin tangvalpain ama lu tungah a sathau sungin ama kiangah, “Israel
Pasian, Topain hih bangin ci hi: ‘Israel mite tung, Topa' mite tungah kumpiin nang sathau kong nilh hi.

nang sathau kong nilh hi,” ci hi,' hong ci hi,” a ci hi.
13Tua ciangin nawhsa-in mi khempeuhin a puan uh la-in ama din nadingin

Joram in, “Sakol tung tuang mi khat la-in amaute a dawn dingin sawl inla,
‘Thuhoih ahi hiam?' cisak in,” a ci hi.

hong pai in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin galvilpain thu zasakin, “Kamtaipain
amaute kiang ban a, ahih hangin amah hong kilehkik lo hi,” a ci hi.

dingin pai uh a, Jezreel mi Naboth' lo-ah amah tawh kituak uh hi.
22Joramin Jehu a muh ciangin, “Jehu aw, thuhoih ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah
in dawngin, “Na nu Jezebel' paktatnate le aisannate tua zahin a tam laiteng
bang thuhoih om theiding ahi hiam?” a ci hi.

2 Kumpi Nihnate 10
1Tu-in Ahab' suanlekhak mihing sawmsagih Samaria-ah teng uh hi. Tua ahih
ciangin Jehuin laikhakte gelh a, khuapi ukte, upate, le Ahab' suanlekhak a
2“Tu-in hih lai na ngah phetun, na topa uh suante note tawh omin, leengte le
sakolte, kulh a nei khuapite zong, le hiamte na neihna uh thei un.
3Na topa uh suante sung pan a hoihpen le a kilawm pen teelin a pa' kumpi
tokhom tungah tusak unla, na topa uh innkuan a dingin do un,” a ci hi.
4Ahih hangin amaute nakpitakin lau uh a, “En un, kumpi nihtein amah nang
zo lo uh ahih ciangin eitein bangci nanzawhding ihi hiam?” a ci uh hi.
5Tua ahih ciangin kumpi inn a ukte le khuapi a uktein upate le a kemte tawh
kigawmin Jehu kiangah mi sawl uh a, “Kote nangma nasemte ka hi uh a,
uh hi; hoih na sak bangbangin hong hih in,” a ci uh hi.
omin, keima thu a mang dingin a kiging na hih uhleh, na topa uh Ahab'
Jezreel-ah hong puak un,” a ci hi. Tu-in kumpipa' suanlekhak mihing

9Zingsangin amah a paikhiat ciangin tua mite khempeuh kiangah, “Note na
paubaang kei uh hi. Kumpi Joram sawmsimin a thatpa keimah ka hi hi. Ahih
kiangah a gensa thu Topain sem khinzo hi,” a ci hi.

dingin hong paisuk ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi.

amaute mi sawmli le nih a sisa-in lawnsuk uh a, amahin amaute khat zong
hingkhawi lo hi.

Jaazaniah ahi uh hi.

uliante' hangin lau kei un; gam sungah tengin, Babylon kumpipa' na sem un.
25Ahih
Mizpah-ah amah tawh a om Judah mi le Khaldea mite simin a that hi.
26Tua ciangin a lian a neu-in mi khempeuh, le galkap a ukte kithawi-in Egypt-
(Jer 52:31-34)
sagihna kum, kha sawm le nihna, tua kha ni sawmnih le sagih ni, Babylon
kumpi a mat dangte khempeuh sangin a sangzaw-in amah a pahtawi hi.
nuntak sung nisimin kumpipa' sabuai-ah a manmanin an a ne hi.
tanh khat, a manmanin ngahthuapna ama tungah kumpipain a pia hi.
1 Khang Tangthu Masate 1
Adam' Suanlekhakte
(Pian 5:1-32)
1Adam'ta Seth, Seth'ta Enosh,

3Jared'ta Enok, Enok'ta Methuselah, Methuselah'ta Lamek,
4Lamek'ta Noah ahi hi. Noahin tapa thum nei a, tuate pen Shem, Ham, le
Jafeth ahi uh hi.
(Pian 10:1-32)

amau' min ciat pua-in minam tuamtuam a piang hi.

uh hi.

a piang hi.

mite ahi uh hi. Raamah' suante: Sheba mite, le Dedan mite ahi uh hi.

(Pian 36:1-43)

ahi uh hi.

kumpite: Beor' tapa Bela hi a, ama khuapi min Dinhabah ahi hi.

45Jobab a sih ciangin ama tangin Teman mite' gammi Hushamin uk hi.
47Hadad a sih ciangin ama tangin Masrekah khuami Samlahin uk hi.
Shaulin uk hi.

a, ama zi' min Mehetabel hi a, Mezahab' tunu hi a, Matred' tanu ahi hi.

30a tapa Shimea, a tapa Haggiah, le a tapa Asaiah ahi uh hi.

1 Khang Tangthu Masate 7
Issakhar' Suanlekhakte
1Issakhar' tapate: Tola, Puah, Jashub, le Shimron, li pha uh hi.
2Tola' tapate: Uzzi, Refaiah, Jeriel, Jahmai, Ibsam, le Shemuel-te hi a, amau'
zaguk pha uh hi.
3Uzziin tapa Izrahiah nei hi. Izrahiah le a tapate Mikhael, Obadiah, Joel, le
Isshiah, mi nga hi a, a vekpi-in ukpite ahi uh hi.
4Amaute' banah a pate uh a innkuan kuanin khangsimna-ah a kiciamtehna
bang hang hiam cih leh amautein zi tampi nei-inta tampi nei uh hi.
5Issakhar
minam sungah a om, khangsimna-ah a kiciamteh, a galhang a
thahat amau beh mi a vekpi-in tul sawmgiat le tulsagih ahi hi.
Benjamin' Suanlekhakte
6Benjamin' tapate: Bela, Bekher, le Jediael, thum pha uh hi.
7Bela' tapate: Ezbon, Uzzi, Uzziel, Jerimoth, le Iri, nga pha uh a, amau' beh
sungah innkuan lutang, a thahat galhangte ahi uh hi. Amau' khang simna a
kiciamtehna-ah tul sawmnih le tulnih le sawmthum le li pha uh hi.
8Bekher' tapate: Zemirah, Joash, Eliezer, Elioenai, Omri, Jeremoth, Abijah,
Anathoth, le Alemeth ahi uh hi.
9Hihte
khempeuh Bekher' tapate ahi uh hi. Amau' khang tawh kizui-in a
khang simna a kiciamtehna-ah, amau' beh sungah innkuan lutang, a thahat a
10Jediael'
tapa pen Bilhan ahi hi. Bilhan' tapate: Jeush, Benjamin, Ehud,
Khenaanah, Zethan, Tarshish, le Ahishar ahi uh hi.
11Hihte
khempeuh amau' beh sungah innkuan lutang hi uh a, a thahat, a
galhang, Jediael' suante gal simna-ah nasem dingin a baihsa-in a om mihing
tul sawm le tulsagih le zanih pha uh hi.
Naftali' Suanlekhakte
13Naftali'
tapate: Jahziel, Guni, Jezer, le Shallum hi a, Bilhah sung pana
piangte ahi uh hi.
Manasseh' Suanlekhakte
14Manasseh' tapate: A zineu Aram numei tawh a neih Asriel le Makhir ahi hi.
Makhir pen Gilead'pa ahi hi.
15Tua
ciangin Makhirin Huppim le Shuppim a'ding zi a la hi. Ama
sanggamnu' min Maakah ahi hi. Makhir' tapa a nihna' min Zelofehad hi a,
Zelofehadin tanu bek a nei hi.
16Tua ciangin Makhir' zi Maakahin tapa nih nei a, a min Peresh le Sheresh
ahi hi. Peresh' tapate Ulam le Rakem ahi hi.
17Ulam' tapa Bedan ahi hi. Hihte pen Manasseh' tapa Makhir' tapa Gilead'

ciangin Gilead' sanggamnu Hammolekhethin Ishhod, Abiezer, le
19Shemida' tapate Ahian, Shekhem, Likhi, le Aniam ahi uh hi.

suante: A tapa Shuthelah, a tapa Bered, a tapa Tahath, a tapa
Eleadah, a tapa Tahath,
Ezer le Elead ahi uh hi. Gath khua mite' bawng a sut dingin a kuan lai-in
Gath mitein amau tegel na that uh hi.

sanggamte hong pai uh hi.

24Ama tanu Sheerah hi a, Bethhoron nuainung le a tungnung le Uzzensheerah
khua a lam nu ahi hi.

tapa Tahan,
26a tapa Ladan, a tapa Ammihud, a tapa Elishama,
27a tapa Nun, a tapa Joshua ahi hi.
28Amau' neihsa gam le a tenna uh Bethel le a khuapite, le nisuahna lamah
Naaran, le nitumna lamah Gezer le a khuapite, Shekhem le a khuapite, le
Azzah le a khuapite ahi hi.
29Manasseh'
suantein Bethshean le a khuapite, Taanak le a khuapite,
Megiddo le a khuapite, Dor le a khuapite a uk uh hi. Hihte sungah Israel' tapa
Josef' suante a teng uh hi.
Asher' Suanlekhakte
30Asher' tapate: Imnah, Ishvah, Ishvi, Beriah, le a sanggamnu uh Serah ahi hi.
31Beriah' tapate: Heber le Malkhiel hi a, Malkhiel pen Birzaith khuapi a satpa
ahi hi.
32Heber pen Jaflet, Shomer, Hotham, le a sanggamnu uh Shua-te'pa ahi hi.
33Jaflet' tapate: Pasak, Bimhal, le Ashvath ahi uh hi. Hihte pen Jaflet' tapate
ahi uh hi.
34A sanggampa Shomer' tapate: Rohgah, Jehubbah, le Aram ahi uh hi.

37Bezer, Hod, Shamma, Shilshah, Ithran, le Beera ahi uh hi.

39Ulla' suante: Arah, Hanniel, le Rizia ahi uh hi.

1 Khang Tangthu Masate 25
1David
le nasepnaah a ukpitein zong laiza lasaknate, harp lasaknate, le
daltuahte tawh Pasian thu a gen dingin Asaf, Heman, le Jeduthun-te' tapate
pawlkhat nasepna-a dingin koihtuam uh hi. Na a semte le amau' nasepte:
2Asaf' tapate sung panin: Kumpipa' makaihna nuai-ah Pasian' thu a gen Asaf'
makaihna nuai-ah Asaf' tapate Zakkur, Josef, Nethaniah, le Asharelah ahi hi.
3Jeduthun'
sung panin Jeduthun' tapate: Lungdam kohna le Topaphatna-in
laiza lasakna tawh thu a gen, apa uh Jeduthun' makaihna nuai-ah Gedaliah,
Zeri, Jeshaiah, Shimei, Hashabiah, le Mattithiah, guk pha uh hi.
4Heman
sung panin Heman' tapate: Bukkiah, Mattaniah, Uzziel, Shebuel,
Jerimoth, Hananiah, Hanani, Eliathah, Giddalti, Romamtiezer, Joshbekashah,
Mallothi, Hothir, le Mahazioth ahi hi.
5Hihte
6Amaute
daltuahte, harp lasaknate, le laiza lasaknate tawh la lamsangah apa uh ukna
nuai-ah om uh hi. Asaf, Jeduthun, le Heman-te pen kumpipa' thupiakna nuaiah om uh hi.
7A Levi mipihte uh tawh Topa a'ding lasakna lamah sinna a nei a siam mi a
vekpi-in zanih le sawmgiat le giat ahi hi.
8Tua ciangin a neu a lian, sia le a sinte a kibangin, amautein amau' nasep
ding uh ai a san uh hi.
9Asaf'
behte a dingin ai masa Josef tungah tu hi. A nihna Gedaliah, a

14A sagihna Jesharelah, a tapate, le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi.
15A giatna Jeshaiah, a tapate, le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi.

33Tua ciangin Hezekiah si a, amautein David' suante' han paina mualpangah
amah vui uh hi. Judah mi khempeuh le Jerusalem-a tengtein a sih lai-in
uk hi.
2 Khang Tangthu Nihnate 33
(2Kum 21:1-18)

ah kum sawmnga le nga sung uk hi.
2Topain
Israel minamte' mai-ah a hawlkhiat minamte' zat a kihhuai
gamtatnate mah bangin, Topa'muhna-ah amah a sia gamta hi.

4Topa in, “Jerusalem-ah ka min om tawntungding hi,” a cihna Topa' biakinn

tawh na semkhawm hi. Amahin Topa' muhna-ah siatna tampi bawl a, amah
hehsak hi.

khempeuh, thukham khempeuh, ngeinate, le Moses tungtawnin a kipia

Israel-te ka khinkhia nawn keiding hi,” a cih Pasian' biakinn sungah amahin

(2Kum 22:1-2)

in ukding a kipatin kum giat pha a, amahin Jerusalem-ah kum
sawmthum le khat sung uk hi.
2Topa' mitah
lampial lo hi.
a man gamta a, a pu David' khekhap zui-in themkhat zong
Josiah' Puahphatte
(2Kum 23:1-20)
3Ama uk a kum giatna sung, naupang ahi laipi mahin, amahin a pu David'
Jerusalem panin mual dawna biaknate, Asherah milimte, le a kiseek le a
4Tua ciangin amahin Baal-te' biakna taute ama muhna-ah supaisak hi. Tua
milimte, le a kiseek le a kisung milimte sukhamin gawivui a, tuate' tungah
biakna a pia mite' han tungah tua a vuite a theh hi.
5Amahin amau' biakna taute tungah a siampite' guhte zong hal a, Judah le
Jerusalem a siangsak hi.
6Tua ciangin Manasseh, Efraim, le Simeon, le Naftali khuapi ciang dong, mun
awngte le a kiim a pamah,
Jerusalem-ah a ciahkik hi.
(2Kum 22:3-23:20)
8Tu-in ama uk a kum sawm le giatna, gam sung le biakinn a siansak khit
ciangin, Topa a Pasian' biakinn a puah dingin amahin Azariah' tapa Shafan,
le khuapi sung ukpa Maaseiah, le thu ciamtehpa ahi, Joahaz' tapa Joah a
sawl hi.
Levi mitein Manasseh le Efraim, le Israel a omlaite khempeuh, le Judah le
Benjamin khempeuh, le Jerusalem-a a teng mite tung panin a khop uh ahi,
Pasian' biakinn-ah a hong kipaipih sumte a pia uh hi.
10Amautein Topa' biakinn a vaan nasemte tungah tua sumte pia uh hi. Tua
ciangin Topa' biakinn-ah a sem nasemtein biakinn puahnading le a ngei
batsakkik nadingin pia uh hi.

leinading, le Judah kumpitein a siatsak, tep
innlamte tungah a sumte a pia uh hi.

ciangin mitein cihtakna tawh na sem uh hi. Amaute tungah a en
dingin Levi mi Merari-te beh sung pan Jahath le Obadiah, le Kohath-te beh
siamna a nei khempeuh,

hi.

Hilkiahin Moses tungtawnin a kipia thukham laibu a mu hi.

pia hi.

2 Khang Tangthu Nihnate 35
(2Kum 23:21-23)
1Josiahin Topa a dingin Jerusalem-ah Paisan Pawi bawl hi. Amautein a kha
masa a ni sawm le li ni-in Paisan Pawi tuuno go uh hi.
2Amahin siampite amau' panmunte-ah seh a, Topa' biakinn sunga nasepna-
ah amaute hanthawn hi.
mite tungah, “Israel kumpipa, David' tapa Solomonin a lam biakinn sungah
uh kisam nawn lo hi. Tu-in Topa na Pasian uh le ama mi Israel-te' na sem un.
4Note a khenkhenin na beh uh tawh kizui-in kithawi unla, Israel kumpipa
David' lamlahna le a tapa Solomon' lamlahna zui un.
5Tua
ciangin mi nautang na sanggamte uh beh kikhenna tawh kizui-in
kihelkim un.
Moses' tungtawnin Topa' thugen bangin na sanggamte uh a dingin kithawi
un,” a ci hi.

sawmthum ciang dong, le bawngtal tulthum a pia hi. Hihte pen kumpipa'
8Tua
tung, le Levi mite tungah a pia uh hi. Pasian' biakinn-ah ulianpite ahi

tuuno le keelno tulnih le zaguk, le bawngtal zathum a pia uh hi.
9Levi
mi ukpite Konaniah, Shemaiah, le a sanggam Nethanel, Hashabiah,
keelno tulnga, le bawngtal zanga a pia uh hi.
10Nasepnading a kithawi khit uh ciangin, siampite amau' munahding uh a,
kumpipa' thupiakna bangin Levi mite amau' khen sungah om uh hi.

laitakun siampitein amau' tung panin a ngah uh sisan a theh uh hi.

khempeuh, ama omna mun mitein Jerusalem-a om Pasian' biakinn a dingin

Jerusalem-ah Salte A Ciahkikna

uhah Pasianin a suahsak mite khempeuh kithawi uh hi.

Ezra 2
(Neh 7:5-73)
1Babylon kumpi Nebukhadnezzarin a zawhna gam panin Babylon-ah salin a
lakte sung panin hih mite Jerusalem le Judah-ah a ciahkikte hi a, amau' khua
ciatah a ciah uh ahi hi.
2Zerubbabel,
Jeshua, Nehemiah, Seraiah, Reelaiah, Mordekai, Bilshan,
Mispar, Bigvai, Rehum, le Baanah-te makai-in tua mite a ciahpih uh hi. Israel
mi phazahte:
3Parosh suante - tulnih zakhat sawmsagih le nih ahi hi.
4Shefatiah suante - zathum sawmsagih le nih ahi hi.
5Arah suante - zasagih sawmsagih le nga ahi hi.
7Elam suante - tulkhat zanih sawmnga le li ahi hi.
8Zattu suante - zakua sawmli le nga ahi hi.
9Zakkai suante - zasagih sawmguk ahi hi.
10Bani suante - zaguk sawmli le nih ahi hi.
11Bebai suante - zaguk sawmnih le thum ahi hi.
12Azgad suante - tulkhat zanih sawmnih le nih ahi hi.
13Adonikam suante - zaguk sawmguk le guk ahi hi.
14Bigvai suante - tulnih sawmnga le guk ahi hi.
15Adin suante - zali sawmnga le li ahi hi.
16Ater a kici Hezekiah suante - sawmkua le giat ahi hi.
17Bezai suante - zathum sawmnih le thum ahi hi.
18Jorah suante - zakhat sawmnih le nih ahi hi.
19Hashum suante - zanih sawmnih le thum ahi hi.
20Gibbar suante - sawmkua le nga ahi hi.
21Bethlehem khuami - zakhat sawmnih le thum ahi hi.
22Netofah khuami - sawmnga le guk ahi hi.
23Anathoth khuami - zakhat sawmnih le giat ahi hi.
24Bethazmaveth khuami - sawmli le nih ahi hi.
25Kiriathjearim khua, Khefirah khua, le Beeroth khuami - zasagih sawmli le
26Ramah khua le Geba khuami - zaguk sawmnih le khat ahi hi.
27Mikmash khuami - zakhat sawmnih le nih ahi hi.
28Bethel khua le Ai khuami - zanih sawmnih le thum ahi hi.
29Nebo khuami - sawmnga le nih ahi hi.
30Magbish khuami - zakhat sawmnga le guk ahi hi.
31Elam adang khat suante - tulkhat zanih sawmnga le li ahi hi.
32Harim suante - zathum sawmnih ahi hi.
33Lod khua, Hadid khua, le Ono khuami - zasagih sawmnih le nga ahi hi.
34Jerikho khuami - zathum sawmli le nga ahi hi.
35Senaah gammi - tulthum zaguk sawmthum ahi uh hi.
36Siampite
sawmsagih le thum ahi hi.
37Immer suante - tulkhat sawmnga le nih ahi hi.
38Pashhur suante - tulkhat zanih sawmli le sagih ahi hi.
39Harim suante - tulkhat sawm le sagih ahi uh hi.
40Levi
suante - sawmsagih le li ahi hi.
41Lasate sung panin Asaf' suante - zakhat sawmnih le giat ahi hi.
42Kongcingte nam sung panin Shallum suante, Ater suante, Talmon suante,
Akkub suante, Hatita suante, le Shobai suante, a vekpi-in - zakhat sawmthum
le kua ahi hi.
43Biakinn nasemte sung panin Ziha suante, Hasufa suante, Tabbaoth suante,
44Keros suante, Siaha suante, Padon suante,
45Lebanah suante, Hagabah suante, Akkub suante,
46Hagab suante, Shamlai suante, Hanan suante,
47Giddel suante, Gahar suante, Reaiah suante,
48Rezin suante, Nekoda suante, Gazzam suante,
49Uzza suante, Paseah suante, Besai suante,
50Asnah suante, Meunim suante, Nefisim suante,
51Bakbuk suante, Hakufa suante, Harhur suante,
52Bazluth suante, Mehida suante, Harsha suante,
53Barkos suante, Sisera suante, Temah suante,
54Neziah suante, le Hatifa suante ahi uh hi.
55Solomon'
Peruda suante,
56Jaalah suante, Darkon suante, Giddel suante,
57Shefatiah suante, Hattil suante, Pokherethhazzebaim suante, le Ami suante
ahi uh hi.
58Biakinn nasemte khempeuh le Solomon' nasemte' suanlekhak khempeuh a
vekpi-in zathum sawmkua le nih a pha uh hi.
59Temelah, Teharsha, Kherub, Addan, le Immer khuate panin a hong ciahkik,
Israel mi hinapi-in amau' behlephung a kan thei lo mite:
60Delaiah suante, Tobiah suante, le Nekoda suante, mi zaguk sawmnga le nih
ahi uh hi.
61Siampite
sung panin zong: Habaiah suante, Hakkoz suante, le Barzillai
pah) ahi uh hi.
62Hih mitein khang kiciamtehna-ah amau' min a zon uh hangin amau' min
lo uh hi.

amautein biakna an siangpente a nek loh nading uh gam ukpain a gen hi.

ahih ciangin a lawmte lakah a makai, Eliezer, Ariel, Shemaiah,

i Pasian' tungah ka ngen uh a, amahin ka thungetna uh hong pia hi.

Jerusalem-ah Ciahna
31Tua ciangin Jerusalem a zuan dingin kha masa a ni sawm le nih ni-in Ahava
32Jerusalem khua ka tun uh ciangin ni thum sung ka tawlnga uh hi.

ni li ni-in Uriah' tapa siampi Meremoth' tavuan lakna tawh i Pasian'

hi.

hong pai-in, “Hih gam a teng gamdang mite' nitna le Kanaan mite, Hit mite,

9Kote pen sal ka hi takpi uh hi; ahi zongin ka salsuahna uhah ka Pasian un
uh le Judah le Jerusalem-ah kidalna kulh ka neih theih nadingun kipat
tungtawnin kote thu hong pia-in, ‘Note va lutin na luahding uh gam pen, tua

na tanute uh amau' tapate tawh kitengsak kei unla, na tapate uh zi dingin
amau' tanute zong la kei un. Amaute' phattuamnading le a maavannading
nuamtakin na neding uh a, na tate un a luah tawntung dingun tua gam na
piasawn theiding uh hi,' ci-in nong thupiaknate ka zui kei uh hi.
13Tu-in kote' gamtatsiate le a lian ka mawhnate uh hangin hih bang gimna
14Hih banga ka thuak khit uh ciangin kotein na thupiaknate mang lo kikin, a
kihhuai-in a gamta mite tawh kitengin kizomkikding ka hi uh hiam? Tua
bang hi kik le-ung, a suakta, a nungta ka om nawn loh dongun kote' tungah
na hehna hong tungsakding hi lo na hi hiam?
15Israel Pasian, Topa aw, nang na thutang a, ahi zongin tuni-a a omlai ko teng
thei lo hi,” ci-in thu ka ngen hi.

9Tua

14A kikhawm mihonpite' tangin i makaite semsak inla, hih thu hangin eite'
tungah Pasian' hehna a dam matengin, i khuapite sung khempeuhah
ciat tawh a kiseh hunin i makaite kiangah va kilak uh hen,” a ci uh hi.
a, Meshullam le Levi mi Shabbethai bekin tua a nialte panpih uh hi.
16Tua hi a, thukham omsa bangin, a hong ciahkik salsuakte a gamta uh hi.
khempeuh a minin a kilokhia ahi hi. A kha sawmna a ni khat ni-in hih mite a
thukanding uh kipan uh a,
17a kha masa a ni khat ni-in gamdang numei a tenpih mite' thu a kan uh a zo
uh hi.
Maaseiah, Eliezer, Jarib, le Gedaliah-tein gamdang numei a tenpihna kimu
hi.
19Amautein a zite a makding uh kiciam uh a, amau' mawhna hangin biakna-
20Immer-te beh sung panin Hanani le Zebadiah ahi uh hi.
21Harim-te beh sung panin Maaseiah, Elijah, Shemaiah, Jehiel, le Uzziah ahi
uh hi.
22Pashhur-te beh sung panin Elioenai, Maaseiah, Ishmael, Nethanel, Jozabad
le Elasah ahi uh hi.
23Levi mite sung panin Jozabad, Shimei, Kelaiah (Kelita a kici), Pethahiah,
Judah, le Eliezer ahi uh hi.
24Lasate sung panin Eliashib ahi hi. Kongcingte sung panin Shallum, Telem, le
Uri ahi uh hi.
25Israel mi adangte sung pan: Parosh-te beh panin Ramiah, Izziah, Malkhijah,
Mijamin, Eleazar, Makhijah, le Beinaiah ahi uh hi.
26Elam-te beh panin Mattaniah, Zekhariah, Jehiel, Abdi, Jeremoth, le Elijah
ahi uh hi.
27Zattu-te beh panin Elioenai, Eliashib, Mattaniah, Jeremoth, Zabad, le Aziza
ahi uh hi.
28Bebai-te beh panin Jehohanan, Hananiah, Zabbai, le Athlai ahi uh hi.
29Bani-te beh panin Meshullam, Maluk, Adaiah, Jashub, Sheal, le Jeremoth
ahi uh hi.
30Pahathmoab-te
beh panin Adna, Khelal, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattaniah,
Bezalel, Binnui, le Manasseh ahi uh hi.
31Harim-te beh sung panin Eliezer, Isshijah, Malkhijah, Shemaiah, Shimeon,
32Benjamin, Maluk, le Shemariah ahi uh hi.
33Hashum-te beh sung panin Mattenai, Mattattah, Zabad, Elifelet, Jeremai,
Manasseh, le Shimei ahi uh hi.
34Bani-te beh panin Maadai, Amram, Uel,
35Benaiah, Bedeiah, Kheluhi,
36Vaniah, Meremoth, Eliashib,
37Mattaniah, Mattenai, le Jaasu ahi uh hi.

39Shelemiah, Nathan, Adaiah,
40Maknadebai, Shashai, Sharai,
41Azarel, Shelemiah, Shemariah,
42Shalum, Amariah, le Josef ahi uh hi.
43Nebo-te beh panin Jeiel, Mattithiah, Zabad, Zebina, Jaddai, Joel, le Benaiah
ahi uh hi.
44Hih mite khempeuhin gamdang numei tenpih uh a, amautein a zite uh a
tate uh tawh a makhawm uh hi.
Nehemiah
Nehemiah 1
Jerusalem a'ding Nehemiah' Thungetsakna
kha sungin kumpi khuapi Susa-ah ka om laitakin,
3Salsuahna
panin a suakta, tua gam a omsuaktein haksatna lianpi le
maizumna a ngahna uh, le Jerusalem kulh kicimin kulhkongpite meiin a
kattumna thu a hong gen uh hi.
4Hih thu ka zak ciangin tusukin ka kap niloh a, ni tampi sung an tangin,
5Ka thungetna-ah, “Aw vantung Pasian, Topa, nang hong itin na thupiakna a
zuite tungah thuciamna limtakin a zui, a lian a kihtakhuai Pasian aw,
6Israel mi ahi na nasemte' tangin sun le zanin kong thunget nilohna a ngai
mite ka khialhna uh, keimah le ka pu ka pate zong ka khialhna uh ahi ka
mawhnate uh kong pulak uh hi.
thupiaknate, thukhamte, le ngeina kipte ka zui kei uh hi.
8Na
phawkkik in.
10Topa aw, amaute pen na vangliatna le a thahat na khut tawh na hotkhiatsa
na nasemte le nangma mite ahi uh hi.
11Keima
hong thungetna le nangma min a zahtak nuam na nasemte'
hun laitakin kei pen kumpipa' an a piapa ka hi hi.

laitakin ka mai a khing hi.

Nehemiah 3
Kongpi a bawl uh hi. Amautein a khuamte le a zawlte bawlin a kongkhakte
sem uh a, tua ciangin Pasian' tungah ap uh hi.

in sem hi.

zawlte khungin a kongkhakte a kalhna bulh uh hi.
4Amaute' zomah Hakkoz' tapa Uriah, a tapa Meremothin ama khawk sung
puah hi. Tua zomah Meshezabel' tapa Berekhiah, a tapa Meshullam hi a, tua
zomah Baana' tapa Zadokin puah hi.

tote uh sawl bangin sem nuam lo uh hi.

2Amah
in a kikholhpihte le Samaria galkapte' kiangah, “Hih Jew mi
zo dingin kilamen ahi uh hiam? Amautein a kangtumsa ninbulomtang panin
suangtum bawlkik theiding ahi uh hiam?” ci hi.
3Ama kiangah a om Ammon mi Tobiah in, “Amautein bangbang ciangta le
4Tua ciangin keimah Nehemiahin thu ka ngen a, “Hong za in, kote' Pasian
5Amaute
in a langtangin kulh ciangte' mai-ah nang hong hehsak uh ahih
sumit kei in,” ka ci hi.
6Tua ahih ciangin kulh ka ciang uh a, nasep a kimciang bang kizo hi. Mitein
7Ahi zongin Sanballat, Tobiah, Arab mite, Ammon mite, le Ashdod mitein
khitna thu a zak uh ciangin heh mahmah uh hi.
vaihawmna khat nei uh hi.
9Tua ahih ciangin ka Pasian uh tungah thu ka ngen uh a, amaute a en dingin
sun le zanin galvil ka koih uh hi.
10Tua ciangin Judah gam mite in, “Nasemte a tha uh zawta a, ahi zong nin
tampi omlai hi. Eima tha tawh kulh cian' i zo ngei keiding hi,” hong ci uh hi.
11Tua ciangin ka galte un, “Amau' phawk loh kalun amaute lakah pai-in i that
ding a, a nasep uh i beisakding hi,” hong ci uh hi.
tak hong hilhkhol uh hi.
13Tua
namsau uh, a teipi uh, le a thal uh tawh, a innkuan kuanun ka mite ka
pangsak hi.
14Mite'
launa ka muh ciangin, uliante, mi ukte, le mi khempeuh tungah,
“Amaute kihta kei un. Na sanggamte, na tapate, na tanute, na zite uh, le na
inn na lote uh a dingin hong dosak, a lian a kihtakhuai Topa phawk un,” ka
ci hi.
15Amau' hong sawmna thu kotein ka phawkna uh le Pasianin amau' geelna a
tungah ka vekpi-un ka kuankik uh hi.
16Tua hun a kipanin ka khutnuai-a om mite kimkhatin na sem a, a kimkhat
in a teipite, a lumte, le a thalte uh tawi-in sik puan silhinding uh a, uliantein
kulh a ciang Judah mi khempeuh uk uh hi.

18Kulh ciangtein na a sep kawmun a kawng ciat uhah a namsau uh kuah uh
hi. Peengkul tumpa ahihleh keima kiangah om hi.
19Tua ciangin mi liante, mi ukte, le mi khempeuh tungah, “I nasepna lian a,
20Peengkul kitum na zakna peuhpeuh panun ko kiangah hong kikhawm un. I
Pasianin eite a dingin hong dosakding hi,” ka ci hi.
21Tua hi a, nisimin khuavak a kipan nitak aksi suah dong, mi kimkhatin teipi
tawi-in, mi kimkhatin na ka sem uh hi.
22Tua hun mahin mite kiangah, “Zanin galvil, sunin nasemin hong om theih
hong giak un,” ka ci hi.
23Tua ahih ciangin keimah a kipan ka behte, ka nasemte, le kei hong cingte, a
ka tawi den uh hi.
Nehemiah 5
1Tu-in
mi nautang numei le pasaltein a Jew mipihte uh tungah lungkim
2Mi pawlkhattein an lei nadingin a tanute uh le a tapate uh a piakna thu
hong gen uh hi.
3Pawlkhattein kial tun huhau-in an lei nadingin a lote, a leenggah lote, le a
innte uh a piakna hong gen uh hi.
4Pawlkhattein kumpipa tungah siah piak dingin a lote uh le a leenggui lote
uh khamin a piakna uh hong gen uh hi.
5Amaute
in, “Kote pen ka behte uh mah bangin cilesa kibang hi-in, ka
naupangte uh zong amau' naupangte mah bangin a hoih hinapi-in, ka tanute
uh le ka tapate uh sal suak dingin ka phum uh hi. Ka tanute uh pawlkhat
zong sal suakkhin a, ka lote uh le ka leenggui lote uh midangte a' suakkhin
ahih manin amaute tat nadingin ka hih zawh uh bangmah om lo hi,” hong ci
uh hi.
6Amaute' kikona le hih thute ka zak ciangin ka heh mahmah hi.
taii-in amaute kiangah, “No le no leiba manin salin na kila uh hi,” ka ci hi.
hi. Tua hinapi-in notein na mipihte uh na zuak uh a, tu-in amaute i tatkik
ding hi zel hi,” ka ci hi. Amaute pau loin om uh a, a gending mel uh thei lo
uh hi.
9Tua ciangin keimah in, “Note' gamtatna hoih lo hi. I gal ahi minam dangte'
kilawm hi.
10Kei le ka behte le ka nasemtein zong an le sum leitawi-in ka piakhia uh hi.
11Tuni mahmahin a lote, a oliv lote, a innte uh le a meetin na lak uh sum, an,
leenggahzu, le sathaute, amaute tungah pia kik un,” ka ci hi.
12Tua ciangin amaute in, “Hihte khempeuh ka piakikding uh a, amaute tung
hi,” hong ci uh hi. Tua ciangin siampite ka sam a, a ciamsa bangun a gamtat
nadingun siampite' mai-ah kiciamna ka bawlsak hi.
13Tua ciangin kei zong ka puan singin, “Hih thuciamna a tungsak lo peuhmah
la, hawmsuak hen!” ka ci hi. Tua ciangin a kikhawmte khempeuh in, “Hita
hen,” ci uh a, Topa a phat uh hi. Tua hi a, a ciamsa bangun mite a gamta uh
hi.
14Tua
sawm le nih sung, kei le ka behtein gam ukte' ngah ngei ante ka ne kei uh hi.
15Keima hun ma-in a uktein mite tungah van gikpi suan uh a, amaute' tung
panin nisimin an le leenggahzu ngun shekel sawmli man a la uh hi. Amau'
16Hih

ka nei den hi.

Nehemiah 7
Nehemiahin Jerusalem A Uk dingte Seh
1Kulh kiciang khinin, kongkhakte ka bulh khin uh a, kongcingte, lasate, le
2ka sanggampa Hanani le biakinn a uk Hananiahin a et dingin Jerusalem ka
citakzaw, Pasian a zahtakzaw khat ahi hi.
3Tua hi a, amaute tungah, “Sun mateng Jerusalem kongpite hongsak kei un.
munah, pawlkhatte amau' omna inn mai ciatah omsak un,” ka ci hi.
4Khuapi lianin zai a, ahi zongin a sungah mi tawm bek om a, innte a kilam
om nai lo hi.
(Ezra 2:1-70)
5Tua ciangin uliante, thukhente, le mite a innkuan kuanun ciaptehnading ka
khang ciaptehna laibu ka mu hi. Tua sungah a kigelh ka muhte:
sung panin hih mite pen Zerubbabel, Jeshua, Nehemiah, Mordekai, Bilshan,
Mispereth, Bigvai, Nehum, le Baanah-te' makaihna tawh Jerusalem le Judah
phazah:
8Parosh suante - mi tulnih zakhat sawmsagih le nih ahi hi.
9Shefatiah suante - mi zathum sawmsagih le nih ahi hi.
10Arah suante - mi zaguk sawmnga le nih ahi hi.
sawm le giat ahi hi.
12Elam suante - mi tulkhat zanih sawmnga le li ahi hi.
13Zattu suante - mi zagiat sawmli le nga ahi hi.
14Zakkai suante - mi zasagih sawmguk ahi hi.
15Binnui suante - mi zaguk sawmli le giat ahi hi.
16Bebai suante - mi zaguk sawmnih le giat ahi hi.
17Azgad suante - mi tulnih zathum sawmnih le nih ahi hi.
18Adonikam suante - mi zaguk sawmguk le sagih ahi hi.
19Bigvai suante - mi tulnih sawmguk le sagih ahi hi.
20Adin suante - mi zaguk sawmnga le nga ahi hi.
21Ater a kici Hezekiah' suante - mi sawmkua le giat ahi hi.
22Hashum suante - mi zathum sawmnih le giat ahi hi.
23Bezai suante - mi zathum sawmnih le li ahi hi.
24Harif suante - mi zakhat sawm le nih ahi hi.
25Gibeon suante - mi sawmkua le nga ahi hi.
26Bethlehem le Netofah khuami - zakhat sawmgiat le giat ahi hi.
27Anathoth khuami - zakhat sawmnih le giat ahi hi.
28Bethazmaveth khuami - sawmli le nih ahi hi.
29Kiriathjearim, Khefirah, le Beeroth khuami - zasagih sawmli le thum ahi hi.
30Ramah le Geba khuami - zaguk sawmnih le khat ahi hi.
31Mikmash khuami - zakhat sawmnih le nih ahi hi.
32Bethel le Ai khuami - zakhat sawmnih le thum ahi hi.
33Nebo adang khat khuami - sawmnga le nih ahi hi.
34Elam adang khat suante - tulkhat zanih sawmnga le li ahi hi.
35Harim khuami - zathum sawmnih ahi hi.
36Jerikho khuami - zathum sawmli le nga ahi hi.
37Lod, Hadid, le Ono khuami - zasagih sawmnih le khat ahi hi.
39Siampite
sawmsagih le thum ahi hi.
40Immer suante - mi tulkhat sawmnga le nih ahi hi.
41Pashhur suante - mi tulkhat zanih sawmli le sagih ahi hi.
42Harim suante - mi tulkhat sawm le sagih ahi uh hi.
43Levi
suante - sawmsagih le li ahi hi.
45Kongcingte nam sung panin Shallum suante, Ater suante, Talmon suante,
Akkub suante, Hatita suante, le Shobai suante - mi zakhat sawmthum le giat
ahi uh hi.
46Biakinn nasemte sung panin a hong ciahkikte: Ziha suante, Hasufa suante,
Tabbaoth suante,
47Keros suante, Sia suante, Padon suante,
48Lebana suante, Hagaba suante, Shamai suante,
49Hanan suante, Giddel suante, Gahar suante,
50Reaiah suante, Rezin suante, Nekoda suante,
51Gazzam suante, Uzza suante, Paseah suante,
52Besai suante, Meunim suante, Nefushesim suante,
53Bakbuk suante, Hakufa suante, Harhur suante,
54Bazlith suante, Mehida suante, Harsha suante,
55Barkos suante, Sisera suante, Temah suante,
56Neziah suante le Hatifa suante ahi uh hi.
57Solomon' nasemte' suanlekhakte sung panin: Sotai suante, Sofereth suante,
Perida suante,
58Jaala suante, Darkon suante, Giddel suante,
59Shefatiah
suante, Hattil suante, Pokherethhazzebaim suante, le Amon
suante ahi uh hi.
60Biakinn nasemte le Solomon' nasemte' suanlekhakte mi a vekpi-in zathum
sawmkua le nih a pha uh hi.
61Temelah, Telharsha, Kherub, Addan, le Immer khuate panin a hong ciahkik,
Israel mi hinapi-in amau' behlephung a kan thei lo mite:

hi.

hi a, sawl lohin, Jerusalem-ah amau' thu-in a tengtawm nuam

Nehemiah 13
Nehemiah' Puahphatte
1Tua ciangin amautein mipi' zakin Moses' laibute sim uh a, Pasian' mite'
kiphawkkhia hi;
samsiatna thupha-in hong heisak hi.
peuhmah khenkhia uh hi.

dingin a kiseh, Tobiah tawh a kimeltheih siampi Eliashib in,
5Levi mite, lasate, le kongcingte tungah piak dingin a kisawl an tawh biakna,
paknamtui, umlebeelte, sawm-ah-khat a kipia an, leenggahzu, le sathau, le

6Babylon kumpipa Artakzaksisin a uk kum sawmthum le nihna kumin ama
kiangah pai ka hih manin hih thu a pian' laitakin Jerusalem-ah ka om kei hi.

ka ciahkik hi. Tua ciangin Tobiah a dingin Pasian' biakinn
ka phawkkhia hi.

Late 75
Pasianin Thu a Manin A Khenna
1Pasian aw, nangma tungah ka lungdam mahmah uh a, nangma tungah ka
nuam mahmah uh hi. Nangma liatna thu ka gen uh a, a lamdang na bawlnate
ka sut kikkik uh hi.
2A hun ka sehsa ni ciangin thu a manin ka khending hi.
3Leitung le a tunga tengte khempeuh a kilin' ciangin a khuampite a kipsakpa
keimah ka hi hi.
4A kiphasakte tungah, “Kiphasak kei un,” a gilote tungah, “Kihisak kei un.
5Kihisak kei unla, kiphatsakna tawh kampau kei un,” ka ci hi.

uh a theih nading ahi hi.

hi.

ngai in.

ding uh hi.
29Notein pilna na deih kei uh a, Topa na zahtak nuam kei uh hi.
30Ka thugente na deih kei uh a, kong thuhilhna ngai nuam lo na hih manun,
31na gamtatna bangun na thuakding uh a, nomau' gamtatna mahin note
a, mihaitein lunghihmawhna a neih loh manun siatlawh uh hi.
33Ahi zongin ka thugenna a ngaitein lungnopna ngahding uh a, launa nei
loin nuamtakin om hithiatding uh hi,” a ci hi.

Na Khempeuh A Mawknapi

a mawknapi.

Thuhilhna 3
1Hih leitungah a piang thu khempeuh, Pasianin ama pian' hun dinga a sehsa
hunin a piansak ahi hi.
2Suah hun om a, sih hun om hi. Suan hun om a, bawhkhiat hun om hi.
3Gawh hun om a, khoi hun om hi. Phel hun om a, lam hun om hi.
4Kah hun om a, nuih hun om hi. Dah hun om a, laam hun om hi.
5Lupkhawm hun om a, tuamlup hun om hi. Kikawi hun om a, kikhah hun om
hi.
6Zon' hun om a, mansuah hun om hi. Kep hun om a, paihkhiat hun om hi.
7Balkek hun om a, phop hun om hi. Daih hun om a, pau hun om hi.
8It hun om a, muhdah hun om hi. Kido hun om a, kilem hun om hi.
10Pasianin eite' manlahpih dingin hong piak nasep ka thei hi.

nuntakna hu nei a, mihing le ganhing nuntakna a kimanna bangmah om lo
hi.

om lo hi. I sih khit ciangin bang piangding cih theihtheihna bangmah om lo
hi.

(Mik 4:1-3)

Isaiah 6
Isaiah' Maangmuhna le Amah A Kisapna
1Kumpi Uzziah a sih kumin, a sang mahmah, a lian kumpi tokhom tungah
Topa a tu ka mu hi. Ama kumpi puanpi pen biakinn sungteng a dim hi.
2Ama kiimah serafim van mite ading uh hi. Tuatein kha guk ciat nei uh hi;
nih tawh a mai liahin, nih tawh a khe tuamin, nih tawh a leeng uh hi.
3Amaute
khatlekhat kisamin: “Vanglian Topa, siangtho, siangtho, siangtho;
leitung khempeuh ama minthanna tawh kidim,” ci-in awng uh hi.
meikhu tawh a kidim hi.
5Tua ciangin keimah in, “Gim ngahpa hita ing! Bang hang hiam cih leh a
mawknapi ka hi hi; ka kama ka thugen khempeuh a mawkna vive hi a, a
Vanglian Topa, Kumpipa ka mukha khinta hi,” ka ci hi.
am khat a khutah tawi-in keima kiangah hong leeng hi.
7Amahin ka muk hong bi a, “En in, hihin na muk sukha zo hi; na mawhna
beita a, na khialhna kimaisak zo hi,” hong ci hi.
8Tua ciangin, “Kua sawlding a, eite a dingin kua va paiding ahi hiam?”
Topa' cihna aw ka za hi. Tua ciangin ken, “Hih lai-ah kei om ing! Kei hong
sawl in,” ka ci hi.
9Tua ciangin amah in, “Pai inla, hih mite tungah, ‘Zaza napi tel lo; mumu
napi thei lo,' va ci in.
10Amautein a mit uh tawh a muh loh nading, a bil uh tawh a zak loh nading,
a lungsim uh tawh thu a theihtel loh nading, amaute kihei-in damna a ngah
loh nadingun hih mite' lungsim mawlsak inla, amau' bil uh ngongsak inla, a
mit uh va sisak in,” hong ci hi.
11Tua ciangin keimah in, “Topa aw, bang tanvei sawtding ahi hiam?” ka ci
hi. Amah in, “Khuapi-ah a teng kuamah om loin hawm suakin, innte-ah
12Topain gamlapi-ah mite khinkhia-in, leitungah a kinusia mun tampi a om
dong, hiding hi.
13Mi sawmah khat bang a omlai tei hangin, taak kung le tawsaw kungte a
zong kisusiading hi,” hong ci hi.

hiam?” a ci hi. Hezekiah in, “Amaute, a gamlapi, Babylon gam panin kei

4Amah in, “Amautein na inn sungah bang teng mu ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi.
Hezekiah in, “Amautein ka innsunga a om khempeuh a vekin mu khin uh hi.

Isaiah 63
Topa' Phulak Ni
1Edom gam, Bozrah khua panin puan ausan silhin a hong pai, a puansilhna-
ah minthanna mel nei-in, ama thahatna tawh a hong paipa kua ahi hiam? A
pen Topa ahi keimah ka hi hi.
2Bang hangin na puan san a, na puansilhte, leenggah cilna-ah leenggah a cil
amaute ka tuancil hi. Ka puan tungah amaute' si hong kithehgawp a, ka puan
4Ka mite ka hotkhiatding hunta ka sa a, a galte uh gimpiakding a hun hita
hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi.
5Hong huhding mi ka zong a, ahi zongin kuamah om lo hi. Kei a hong huh
ding a om loh ciangin lamdang ka sa hi. Ahi zongin ka hehnain hong
bangsak a, amaute' sisan leilakah ka thehthang hi.

in kei hong khem loding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih manin a lungkhamna panun
amaute a honkhia hi.
9Vantung mite' hotkhiat hi loin, Topa mahmahin amaute honkhia hi. A itna
amaute hoihtakin a kem hi.
10Ahih hangin amautein lehdo uh a, ama kha siangtho a dahsak uh hi. Tua
ahih ciangin amah pen amaute' gal suak a, amahmahin amaute a do hi.
11Tua ciangin amautein hun lui lai, ama nasem Moses' hun a phawk uh hi.
Ama mi a makaite honkhia-in, tuipi sung panin a paikhiatpih Topa koi-ah
omta ahi hiam? Amaute' tungah ama kha a piapa,
12Moses tungtawnin a vangliatna zangin na lianpipi a sempa, ama mite' mai-
ah tuite khenkhamin, a minthan' tawntung nadingin hih bang nate a sempa,
tu-in koi-ah omta ahi hiam, ci uh hi.

Isaiah 64
1-2Nangma
langte tungah na min na theihsaknading le nangma omna-ah
vantung balkekin hong paisuk lo na hi hiam?
3Kote' lamet lohpi-in nang hong pai-in a lauhuai nate na bawl ngei a, na mai-
ah mualte a ling hi.
4Amah a ngakte a dingin na a sempa' thu tanglai pek panin kuamahin thei
ngei lo, kuama bilin za ngei lo a, kuama mitin nang simloh Pasian dang mu
ngei lo uh hi.
5Thuman
nasep lungdam takin a semte, nangma deih bangin a nungtate,
nangmahin na limbawl hi. Kote tungah nang na heh a, ahi zongin kote ka
khial lai veve uh hi. Tanglai pek a kipanin ka mawh ngitnget uh hi. A tua
6Kote khempeuh mawhnei mi ka hi khin uh a, ka gamtat hoih khempeuh uh
uh a, ka mawhna hangun huih letkhiat nahthel keu ka bang uh hi.
8Ahi zongin Topa aw, nang pen kote'Pa na hi hi. Kote pen tungman bang hi-
in, nang pen beelseekpa bang na hi a, kote khempeuh nangma bawl mite ka
hi uh hi.

khempeuh nangma mi ka hihna uh hong ngaihsun in.

Isaiah 65
1Keima mite' thungetna a pia dingin a baihsa-in kei om napi-in, amautein
hong ngen lo uh hi. Amaute' muh dingin kei om napi-in, amautein hong
zong beek lo uh hi. Minamte tungah, “Hih lai-ah om ing, hih lai-ah om ing,”
lo uh hi.
2A hoih loin gamta-in, amau' deih bang a zui teitei mite,
3ka
amau' beel sungah dawibiakna sa mehtui a koih mite,
mawhna le a pu a pate uh mawhnate ka thukkikding hi. Amautein mual
manin amau' gamtatna tawh kizui-in ka thukding hi, ci hi.
8Topain hih bangin ci hi: “Leenggahzu pen leenggah bom panin kingah a,
hi.
in mualtung gam a luahding uh hi. Keima na hong sem, keima teel mite, tua
gamah tengding uh hi.

pen,
12namsau tawh a si dingin ka hong sehding a, hong that dingte' mai-ah na
thu man lohding mah na utzaw uh a, a sia na gamta uh hi.
13Tua ahih manin Topa Pasianin hih bangin ci hi: En un, ka nasemtein ne
ding uh a, ahih hangin note na gilkialding uh hi. Ka nasemtein dawnding
uh a, ahih hangin note na dangtakding uh hi. Ka nasemte lungdamding uh
a, ahih hangin note na maizumding uh hi.

19Jerusalem' hangin ka lungdamding a, ka mite' hangin ka kipakding hi. Tua
khua sungah kahna aw le cimawhin kikona aw om nawn loding hi.
20Naupangte a ngeksih om loding a, sauveipipi kinungtading hi. Kum za bek
a nungtate a khansihin kingaihsunding a, kum zacing loin a site, keima
gimpiakna lim hiding hi.
21Amautein inn lamding uh a, a sungah tengding uh hi. Amautein leenggui
lo bawlding uh a, agah neding uh hi.
22Amautein inn lamding uh a, tua inn-ah midang teng, cih om nawn loding
hi. Amautein leenggui suanin adang khatin ne, cih om loding hi. Bang hang

bangin buhkung neding hi. Leivui pen gulpi' an hitading a, mite hong tu
uh a, kisusia loding uh hi, Topain ci hi,” a ci hi.
Isaiah 66
Topa' Thukhenna le Zion' Mailam Daupaina
1Topain hih bangin ci hi: Vantung pen keima tokhom hi a, leitung pen keima
ahi hi, Topain ci hi. Ahih hangin kiniamkhiatin, lungsim a kitamzan mipa,
keima thu-ah lau-in a ling kelkel pa, keima deih mipa ahi hi.
3Biakna-in bawngtal a gopain mihing zong that hi. Biakpiakna-in tuuno a
gopain ui ngawng zong at hi. An tawh biakpiakna a bawlpain vok si zong
thupha a pia hi. Hih mite amau ut bang ciatin gamta uh a, amau' kihhuai
gamtatna uhah nuam a sa uh hi.
4Tua
ciangin kuamahin hong dawng lo uh a, thu ka gen ciangin kuamahin hong
ngai lo uh hi. Keima thu man lohding mah utzaw uh a, a sia-in gamta uh hi,
a ci hi.
5Ama thu-ah lau-in a ling mite aw, Topa' thu za un: Keima tungah note nong
hawlkhiading uh a, zahpihna tawh note hong hopihin, “Lungdamin na om
6Ngai un, khuapi sunga gamlumna! Biakinn sunga awging! Topain a galte
kibang a, nausuak gimna a tun ma-in amahin tapa khat a nei hi.
8A tuaci bang kuan za ngei na hi uh hiam? A tuaci bang kuan mu ngei na hi
9Nausuah hun tungsak napi-in suaksak loding ka hi hiam, Topain ci hi. Nau
a suakkhiasak keimahin naugil khakcipding ka hi hiam, na Pasianin ci hi.
10-11Naungek
in a nu' nawi teepin nuam a sak mah bangin, Jerusalemin
a ci hi.
12Topain hih bangin ci hi: Tu-in gunpi bangin nopsakna le tuiletkhia bangin
minamte' hauhna ama tungah ka tungsakding hi. Note pen a nu' nawi teepin,
a ang-ah kipua a, a khuk tungah a diang naungek na bangding uh hi.
13A nuin ata a hehnep bangin note kong hehnemding a, notein Jerusalem
14Hih thu a hong piang na muh uh ciangin na lungdamding uh hi. Note hong
huhna, ka galte tungah ka hehna ka lahna thu na theiding uh hi, ci hi.
15Bang hang
17Biakna huan sungah a pai dingin amaute kisiansuahin a kisiangthosak, a
laizang a om pen a zuite, voksa le kihhuaina le zusa a nete beimang khawm
ding hi, Topain ci hi.
18Bang hang hiam cih leh amau' nasepnate le amau' ngaihsutnate ka thei a,
minthanna muding uh a,
19amaute' lakah lim khat ka khaiding hi. Amau' sung panin, minamte tung,
Tarshish mite tung, Put mi le Lud mite tung, Meshek mite tung, Tubal mi le
Javan mite tung, ka min hoihna a za ngei lo, ka minthanna a mu ngei lo tuipi
gei-a om gam mite tungah a suakta lai mite ka sawlding hi. Amautein
20Israel mitein beel siangtho sungah an tawh amau biakpiakna tawi-in Topa'
panin Topa' tungah piak dingin na sanggamte khempeuh uh, sakolte, leengte,
taalte, le late, kalaoh hatte tungah hong pua-in ka mual siangtho Jerusalemah hong paipihding uh hi, Topain ci hi.
21Amaute
kimkhat zong, siampite le Levi mite a suak dingin ka lading
hi, Topain ci hi.
ding hi. Tua mah bangin na suan na khakte uh le na min uh kipding
hi, Topain ci hi.
23Khadet
khempeuh hong paiding uh hi, Topain ci hi.
24Amaute a ciah uh ciangin kei hong lehdo mite' luanghawmte ending uh hi.
mit ngei loding a, amaute pen mi khempeuh' kih hiding hi, a ci hi.

Jeremiah 2
1Topain kei hong hopih a,
2“Pai inla, Jerusalem khuamite' zak dingin va taangko in. Topain kong cihin-
ah: Na khangno lai-a nong kipiakna, na mothak lai-a nong itna, a kikho nai lo
3Israel mite pen Topa a dingin a tuam om hi a, ama anlaknaah a anpalte ahi
uh hi. Amaute a ne peuhpeuh a mawh suak uh a, gimna a thuak uh hi,
Topain hong ci hi, ci-in va gen in,” hong ci hi.
4Jakob suan le Israel innkuan khempeuhte aw, Topa' kammal ngai dih un.
5Topain hih bangin ci hi: “Na pute na pate uh kei kiang panin gamlapi-ah
mu uh ahi hiam?
lo uh hi.
hi. Ahih hangin no nong pai uh ciangin ka gam na ninsak uh a, ka neihsa

milimte a bia uh hi.
11Gam khat peuhpeuhin pasian ahi taktak beek lo a pasian-te uh nangawn a
khek ngei peuhmah uh hiam? Ahih hangin ka mitein a minthanna uh ahi
keimah, bangmahin a kimang lo na peuh tawh hong khek tazen uh hi.
12Tua

13Bang

lo hi.
16Tham loin, Memfis le Tahpanhes mitein zong a luguh a suktapsak zo uh hi.
17Israel aw, Topa na Pasianin lampi-ah hong makaih laitakin amah na nusiat
hiam? Nail gun tui a va dawn lelding na hi hiam? Assiria gamah na pai
ding na hi hiam?

23Bangci bangin nangmah in, ‘Kei ka nin kei hi. Baal pasian-te' nung ka zui
kei hi,' bang hangin ci theiding na hi hiam? Mualkuam zangah a om na
lampi totte ento inla, na hihsate mu dih in. A suktai a totai kawikawi kalaoh
huk na bang tazen hi.
24Gamlak
nuam a sa, lano hukte na bang tazen hi. A huk laitakin kuain
khamzoding ahi hiam? Amah a hih nuam peuhpeuhin haksa loin, a ut
hunhunin a ngah lelding uh hi.
nangmah in, ‘Bang phamawh ahi hiam? Gamdang pasian-te ka it a, amau'

26“Guta khatpeuh a kimat ciangin a zum bangin, Israel mite, a kumpite, a
uliante, a siampite, le a kamsangte uh zong a maizumding uh hi.
27Amautein singtawng khat kiangah, ‘Nang pen ka pasian na hi hi,' ci uh a,
suangtum khat kiangah, ‘Ka pianna ka nu na hi hi,' peuh a ci uh hi. Bang
Ahih hangin haksatna a tuah uh ciangin, ‘Tho inla hong hon in,' hong ci uh
hi.
28“Note-a' dinga na bawl uh na pasian-te uh koi-ah om ahi hiam? Haksatna
cih leh Judah gam aw, na khuapi zahzah uh pasian na nei tazen uh hi.
29Kei na hong mawhsakna uh bang thu teng tawh ahi hiam? Na vekpi-un kei
nong langpan' khin uh hi, Topain kong ci hi.
30Na
tate uh thuhilhin ka sat hangin a mawkna suakzota hi. Amaute
kibawlpha tuan lo uh hi. Humpinelkai hawk bangin na namsaute un na
kamsangte uh a that khinzo uh hi.
31No Israel mite aw, Topa' kammal limtakin ngai dih un. Israel-te a dingin
ka hi hiam? Tua ahihleh bang hangin ka mite in, ‘Ko ka suakta uh hi; nang
kiangah kong pai nawn keiding uh hi,' ci uh ahi hiam?
32Nungak khatin a kizepnate mangngilh thei ahi hiam? A kipi mothakin a
loh ni tampi sung a hong mangngilh uh hi.
34Mawhnei lo mizawngte' sisan na puan tungah baang hi. Amautein na inn
hong luhngei beek lo uh hi. “Tua bang teng hinapi-in
35nang in, ‘Kei ka mawh kei hi, kei tungah Pasian heh nawn lo hi,' na ci hi.
En in, ‘Kei ka mawh kei hi,' na cih manin nang tungah thu kong khending hi.
36Bang hangin na lungsim kheel ziauziau na hi hiam? Assiriain nang hong
ka nialzo hi; amaute' hangin na gualzo ngei keiding hi.

Jeremiah 5
Jerusalem le Judah' Mawhnate
1Jerusalem
thuman gamtat leh thuman a zong mi khat beek na mu uh hiam, zong dih un.
Na muh uhleh tua khua' mawhna ka maisakding hi.
2“Topa a nuntak bangin,” ci-in a kiciam uh hangin a zuaupi uh ahi hi.
3Topa aw, nangmahin thuman en gige hi lo na hi hiam? Nangmahin amaute
na sat hangin a awlmawh tuan kei uh hi. Na sukgawp hangin na thuhilhna a
nuam kei uh hi.
4Tua
ciangin keimah in, “Hih mite mihai hi a, a hehpihhuai ahi hi.
Topa' lampi thei lo uh a, amau' Pasian' deihna a thei kei uh hi.
5Miliante kiangah pai-in ka va kihoding uh hi. Amautein Topa' lampi thei
uh a, amau' Pasian' deihna thei uh hi,” ci-in ka ngaihsun hi. Ahih hangin a
vekpi-un ka ukding nial khin uh a, ka hakkol kuaitanin ka henna khaute
sutat khinzo uh hi.

inn-ah a hon om uh hi.

hici bang minam tungah thukkik loding ka hi hiam?

Jeremiah 6
Jerusalem le Judah A Siatna
1Benjamin' suante aw, na suahtak nadingun tai un. Jerusalem khua taisan un.
2A melhoih, a ngeek dikdek Zion tanu ka susiading hi.
3Kumpite, a galkapte uh tawh ama kiang hong tungding uh a, a kimkotah
giahphual satin a deih peuhpeuh uh a lading uh hi.
4Amaute in, “Jerusalem khua a sim dingin kisa un. Tho un, sun ciangin i sim
ding hi,” a ciding uh hi. Ahih hangin amau mah in, “Citciat aw, zekai lua
hang! Ni tum dektakta a, i liimte sau keeita hi.
5Kithawi un, zan ciangin i simding a, a kumpi innte uh i susiading hi,” a ci
ding uh hi.

tawlnga lo hi. Khua sungah ngongtatna le suksiatna ka za ngitnget a, cinatna
le liamna bekbek ka mu hi.

Jeremiah 8
1“Tua
hun ciangin, Topain kong cihin-ah, Judah gam kumpite' guhte,
uliante' guhte, siampite' guhte, kamsangte' guhte le Jerusalem khuamite'
2Amautein a it uh, a na a sepsak uh, a delh uh, a zon uhleh a biak uh ahi ni
le kha le vana om nate khempeuh mai-ah a kiphokhiading hi. Tua guhte
kikhawm nawn loding a, kiphum nawn loding hi. Leilak a ek kinusia bang
3Hih a gilo minamte' lakah a omlai suntengin ka hawlkhiatna munah nuntak
ding sangin sihding a teelzawding uh hi, Vanglian Topain kong ci hi.
4“Jeremiah aw, Topain hih bangin gen hi, ci-in amaute kiangah va gen in. Mi
khat a puk ciangin thokik buang hi lo ahi hiam? Mi khatin lam a khialh
hiam? Zuau pasian milimte lenkip uh a, hong kilehkik nuam lo uh hi.
6Amau' thugente ka ngaihsak a, kuamahin thuman gen lo uh hi. A gitlohna
uh panin kuamah kisik lo a, ‘Bang hih ka hi hiam?' ci lel uh hi. Sakol galsim
ding a tai bangin amau' tum ciatin a pai uh hi.
7Gun vapite nangawnin a lal hunding thei uh a, sumkuangte, phialphiahte,
Topa' ngeina kipte a thei kei uh hi.
8Bangci bangin note in, ‘Ko ka pil uh a, Topa' thukham ka nei uh hi,' ci thei
ding na hi uh hiam? En un, thuman lo laitheitein tua thukham zuauthu a
suah uh hi.
9Na mipilte uh maizumding uh a, lungmangin a cih nading a thei keiding uh
hi. En un, amautein Topa' thu nial uh hi. Bang pilna nei nawn ahi uh hiam?
10Tua
ahih manin a zite uh midangte ka piaksakding a, a lote uh zong
siampite dongin thuman lo khin uh hi.
11Amautein ka mite' thuaknate thupi simsak lo uh a, hoihna a om keei lopi,
‘Hoih hi, hoih hi,' ci mawkmawk uh hi.
12Hih a kihhuai nate a sep uh ciangin a maizum beek uh hiam? Maizum beek
lo uh a, kisuangthei beek lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin a site lak mahah amau
zong siding uh a, gim ka piak ni ciangin a kilawnkhiading uh hi, Topain
kong ci hi.
13“Topain kong cihin-ah, amaute ka susia khinding a, a lote uhah leenggah a
14“Tua
khuapi muanhuaite va beel ni; tua lai-ah va si ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh
a, i dawn dingin gu tui hong pia khinzo hi.
15Nopna i zong a, nopna i ngah kei hi. Cidamna i lamen a, siatna bek i ngah
hi.
hamna awgingin gamlelei lingsak hi. Amautein i gam le a sunga omteng,
hong susia khinding uh hi,' a ciding uh hi.
zo lo gul guneite kong khahding a, note hong tuding hi,” Topain a ci hi.

mite' kithahlupna hangin a sun a zanin ka kapkapding hi.
2Sehnel gamlakah khawlnading bukno khat nei thei-in ka mite nusia-in a

3A leii uh thalpeu bangin zang uh a, zuauthu bekbek a lawn khiakhia uh hi.

4Mi khempeuh a inn vengte uh kidawm uh hen la, a sanggamte uh muang kei

uh a, kisikzo nawn lo uh hi.

ngaihsun veve mawk uh hi.

minam khat tungah ka phu la loding ka hi hiam?
ham zong kiza nawn lo a, vana leeng vasate le gamsate a taimangta uh hi.

khuapi ninkholna ka bangsakding a, se-alte' tenna mun ka

Jeremiah 17
1Topain a genna-ah, “Judah mite' mawhna sik laikung khat tawh kigelh hi.
tungah khuakin ki-at hi.
2A tate un singniim nuai khempeuh le mualsangte' tunga a biakna taute uh le
a nusian uh Asherah milimte phawk veve uh a,
khempeuh uhah na bawl uh mawhnate hangin na neih na lam uh le na sum
na paite uh, na galte uh ka tuahmangsakding hi.
4Note kong piak na gam uh zong na taanding uh a, na theih ngei loh uh gam
hehna kitawhkuang a, a mit nawn keiding hi,” a ci hi.
5Topain kong cihin-ah: “Mi bek muangin mi' hatna bek suang a, Topa tawh a
lungsim a kilehngat miin hamsiatna a ngah ahi hi.

Jeremiah 32
Jeremiahin Anathoth Khua-ah Lo Khat Lei
1Nebukhadnezzar
kumin Topain Jeremiah a hopih hi.
2Tua hun pen Babylon kumpipa' galkaptein Jerusalem khua a sim laitak hi a,
hangin nangmahin thu genkhol a, ‘Topain a cihin-ah: En un, hih khuapi,
Babylon kumpipa' khut sungah ka piading a, amahin a lading hi.
kimu-in a ki-ending uh a, a kihoding uh hi.
5Amahin Babylon khua-ah Zedekiah lading a, ama tungah na ka sep mateng
tua lai-ah omding hi. Khaldea mite na do uh hangin na zo keiding uh
hi, Topain hong ci hi,' ci-in bang hangin thu hilh na hi hiam?” ci-in thong
sungah a khum hi.

bangmah om loding hi.

Jeremiah 48
1Moab gam tawh kisai-in Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasianin a genin-ah:
“Nebo mitein gimna a thuakding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a gam uh a
kisiading hi. Kiriathaim khua kila khinzo a, a kulhpite uh cim khinta hi. A
mitein maizumna thuak uh a,
2Moab gam a minthanna beita hi. Heshbon khua-ah a galte un a simnading
uh vaihawm uh a, ‘Hong pai un, Moab gam i beimangsakding hi,' a ci uh hi.
3Ngai dih un! Horonaim khua-ah mi kiko a, ‘Ngongtatna le siatna lianpi,' a ci
uh hi.
4“Moab gam kisusia khinta a, a kahna aw uh Zoar khua dongin a kiza hi.
5Luhith mual kahtohna lampi-ah a paikawmun a kap uh hi. Horonaim khua-
ah a tuahsuk laitakun khuapi siatna hangin a kikona aw uh a za uh hi.
6‘Tai

taimang un!' a ci uh hi.

tawh, kipai khiatpihding hi.

le giat pha a, a sahna zung li pha-in a sung a hawm ahi hi.
23Mang kawlsing a vekpi-in a kimkotah zakhat om a, sawmkua le guk bek a
kilang hi.
24Kumpi
nihna Zefaniah, le kongpi uk biakinn upa thum a paikhiatpih hi.
a kimu kumpipa' uliante sagih, galkap zumlai a kem galkap mangpa' lai-atpa
le khuasunga a kimu midang sawmguk, khuasung panin a paikhiatpih hi.

Kah La 1
1Khatvei lai-in mi a dimtakin a tenna Jerusalem khuapi bangzah takin gamdai
ahi hiam? Leitung bupin a zahtak khuapi tu-in meigong tawh a kibangta hi.
Leitung a om khuapi khempeuhte' lak panin a thupi pen khuapi tu-in salin a
2Amah
Amah a it ngeite khempeuh a hehnemding khat beek a om nawn kei hi. A
kipawlpihte khempeuhin amah khemin, tu-in a langpan' khinta uh hi.
3Judah mite, a huhding a nei lo silate bangin a inn panun kihawlkhia hi.
Amaute gam dangah teng uh a, amau' gamding a om kei hi. Galtein umcih
uh a, a suahtak theih nading uh lampi a om kei hi.
kei hi. Tua lai-a lasa numeitein gimna thuak uh a, siampite a tau uh hi. Khua
kongpi-ah kuamah om nawn lo a, Jerusalem khuapiin gimna a thuak hi.
5A galte gualzo uh a, amaute a nuaisiah gawp uh hi. Mawhna tampi a neih
dingin a kipuakhia hi.
6Jerusalem a minthanna teng a maimang zota hi. A makaite uh, lonona mun
mu loin a vak kawikawi, sabengte a muh ciangin tailahpi-in a tai teitei sazuk
7Tu-in Jerusalem kisiazota a, nidanga a thupinate a nung phawkkik hi. Galte
in a nuihsan uh hi.
8A minthanna teng a beita hi. A guaktangin om ahih manin a maizum hi.
9A
kuamahin a hehnem zo kei hi. A galtein zo ahih manin Topa kiangah
hehpihna a ngen hi.
10A galtein a neih a lam khempeuh a laksak khinmang hi. Biakinnpi sungah
lut uh a, Topain Gentail-te a paiding a phal lohna munah a lut uh a mu hi.
11Amaute, a thum kawmsa-in annek zong dingin a paikhia uh hi. A nuntak
theih nadingun a sum a pai uh tawh an a khek uh hi. Khuapi in, “Hong en
in Topa aw, ka thuakna teng hong mu in,” ci-in a kiko hi.
12A kiim a pamah a pai mi khempeuh kiangah, “Hong en in, kei' thuak zahin
gimna a thuak, Topain a heh laitakin a hong thuaksak gimna a thuak kei
longal, midang kuamah om lo hi,” ci-in a kiko hi.
ka thuak tawntung hi.

a cimawhta ka hi hi.
15Topain ka galkap a thahat pente nuihsan lel a, amahin kei a hong sim

le a hong hanthawnding kuamah om lo hi. Galtein hong zo khin a, ka mite a
cimawh uh hi.

kihhuai na khat bangin kei a hong gimneih uh hi.
lo ka hi hi. Mun khempeuhah a om mite aw, ka thugenna hong ngai un. Ka

19Ka kipawlpihte ka sapsap hangin a hong huh nuam kei uh hi. A nuntakna
ding uh an a zonna lamun siampite le makaite kongzing lakah a si uh hi.

tautau a, ka lungsim a gim mahmah hi.

hi.

maw,” ci-in a nui uh hi.

hagawi uh hi.

A Mawhpa Siding

5“Gentehna-in mi a hoih mahmah, a thuman, a diktat mi khat om hi.

23Leinuai a thukpenna munah amaute' han om hi. A galkap khempeuh gal

24“Elam zong, a kimkotah a galkapte' han tawh, tua lai mahah om hi. Amaute

tu-in amaute si-in mindai-in a om uh hi.
25Galsung a a site lak mahah Elam lum a, ama kimkotah a galkapte' han om
hi. Amaute, Pasian a thei loin, gal sungah si uh hi. A hin lai-un mite a lausak
ngeite hi uh a, ahi zongin tu-in amaute si-in mindai-in om uh a, galsung a site
mah tawh a kibangin gimna a thuak uh hi.
26“Meshek le Tubal zong tua lai mahah om uh a, a kimkot uhah a galkapte
uh' han om hi. Amaute khempeuh zong Pasian a thei lo, galsung a a si ahi uh
hi. Ahi zongin a hin lai-un midangte a lausakzo ngeite ahi uh hi.

Hosea' Zi le A Tate

hi,” a ci hi.

tuangte, le galsimna tawh hi loin, amaute' Topa Pasian ahi kei mahmahin
amaute ka honkhiading hi,” a ci hi.

phuak in; bang hang hiam cih leh no Israel mite, ka mi na hi nawn kei uh a,

Hosea 2
Topain A Citak lo A Mite A Itna
1Tua ahih ciangin na Israel mipihte, “Pasian' mi,” ci inla, “Topain a hehpih
mite,” zong ci in.
2Tate aw, na nu uh zolbawl un. Amah ka zi hi nawn lo a, kei zong ama pasal
3A
gamtat hoih lohna a khawl kei leh, a nu sung pan a suah laitakin a
guaktangin a ommah bangin, a puanteng hawkkhiatsakin a guaktangin ka
omsakding a, a keu, bangmah a po zawh lohna gamlak bangin ka bawlding
a, dangtakin a siding hi.

16Vana aksi sangin a tamzaw sumbawl mi na om khinta uh hi. A kha zalin a

hi. Na mite, mualtung tengah kithehthang a, inn-ah a kaikhawmding

ahi hi. Na thuakna thu a za mi khempeuhin lungdamin a khut uh beengding
uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na gitlohna a thuak kha lo kuamah om lo hi.
Habakkuk
Habakkuk 1
ahi hi.
na hi hiam? Gimna thuak ung, ci-in bang tanvei hong kikoding a, hong hon
loin, om nilohding na hi hiam?
3Bang hangin hih bang siatnate le lungkhamnate hong musak na hi hiam?
Kisuksiatna le kisukgawpnain hong umcih a, kitotna le kiselna, mun citengah
om hi.
4Thukhamin thu neizo loin a mawkna suak a, thu a manin kisem ngei lo hi.
Thutang thute kilehhei-in, migilotein thuman mite zo zawsop hi.
5Tua ciangin Topain a mite kiangah thu gen a, “No, a thuman lo ka minamte
aw, na kiim uha a om minam dangte en dih un; lamdang na sa mahmahding
lamdang khat tu-in a bawlding ka hi hi.
6A omkhong thei lo, a kihtakhuai Khaldea mite, a vang ka liansakding a,
leitung khempeuhah amaute pai-in gam khempeuh a zo mangkhinding uh hi.
7Amaute lauhuai-in, kihtakhuai mahmah uh a, a gen khempeuh uh nial theih
hi lo hi.
lei-ah a khe phut uh hi. Muvanlaiin sa a bawh bangin a galte a leenlak uh hi.
9“A susiagawp dingin hong kuankhia uh a, a sukkhakding uh mi khempeuh
lau mahmah uh hi. A galmatte uh tam mahmah a, sehnel zahin kisim zo lo hi.
10Kumpite, simmawhbawl uh a, uliante nuihsan lel uh hi. Kulh muanhuaite
la uh hi.
11Tua ciangin huihnung bangin paisuak uh a, amau' hatna bek a suang uh
hi,” a ci hi.
12Topa aw,
a cil pek a kipan a tawntungin Pasian na hi a, nang pen a
tawntungin keima Pasian, a SiangthoPa na hi hi. Topa aw, kote gim a hong
ding bekin amaute' tungah vang a pia bek na hi hi.
13Ahi zongin hih a gilo a zuautat mite bangci thuakzawh na hi hiam? Hih
bang siatna a mu dingin na mit siangtho lua a, a gamtatsia mite na thuakzo
hangin daicip na hi hiam?
14Bang hangin tuipi ngasa bang lelin mihingte bawl a, a ukding a om lo
ganhing note bangin omsak na hi hiam?
15Amautein ngasa mat bangin sikkawi tawh mite man uh a, a ngen uh tawh
lungdamin a awng uh hi.
16A ngente un amau' deih peuhpeuh ngahsak ahih manin, amautein a ngente
uh bia-in biakpiakna zong a pia uh hi.
17Amautein a namsau uh zangin, hehpihna mel nei loin mi thatding ahi uh
hiam?
Habakkuk 2
Topain Habakkuk A Dawnna
5Hauhna pen zuaupi hi a, a huaiham mite kiphasakin omkhong thei lo uh a,
lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin minam dangte a ban banin simin a uk uh hi.
6A zawhna gammitein
amau a zo mite simmawh bawlin, “No a' ahi lopi
kimlai no a dingin na la uh a, ahi zongin tu-in gimna na thuakding uh hi.
nuam lailai na hi uh hiam?” ciding uh hi.
7Notein na phawk ma-un note mahmah leiba neite na suakding uh a, na
ding a, na nate uh hong laksakmang khinding hi.
8Notein minam dang tampite' na na sut uh a, tu-in a omlai mitein note' na
hong sutding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh notein mi thatin, khuapite le a
sunga teng mite na bawlsia uh hi.
9Mi' van na suhna uh tawh na mite uh hausakin, lauhuaina le siatna a ngah
loh nadingin na innkuan uh bawl na hih manun gim na ngahding uh hi.
dangte na suksiatna uh tawh, note mahmah' siatnading a bawl na hi uh hi.
11Note
innkamtein zong kikopihding uh hi.
manun gimna na ngahding uh hi.

zawh uh minamte' nasepnate a mawkna suakin, amau' sepsateng
ahi hi.

hehna uh tawh na gamvengte uh niamkhiatin na mindaisak uh a,
16Tua

hi. Topain gimpiakna hai, note hong dawnsakding a, na minthanna uh
mindaina a suakding hi.

19Sing khatpeuh a kibawl na khat kiangah, “Khanglo in,” ci-in, a pau thei lo
suangtum kiangah, “Tho in,” ci na hih manun gimna na ngahding uh hi. Hih
limtakin a kizut hangin a sungah nuntakna om lo hi.
20Topa, a biakinn siangtho sungah om hi; leitung mi khempeuh ama mai-ah
dai dide-in omta uh hen.

7Kush gammite a lau mahmahna, Midian gammite a linna ka mu hi.

hiam?

om a, na keekin leitung kapkham hi.
hong zu hi. Leinuai-a om tuite ging zuazua a, tuihualtein a sangpipi banto hi.
11Na thaltang leeng a muh ciang, na teipi tee zalzal a muh ciangin, ni le kha a
omna sanah a khawlcip uh hi.
12A hehsa-in leitungah na pai a, a sinso sa-in minamte na tuancil hi.
13Na mite a honkhia dingin na paikhia a, na teel kumpipa, a honkhia dingin
na kuankhia hi. Migilote' makaipa na sugawp a, a nungzui khempeuh tawh
zong na sumai hi.

lo-ah an a piang kei zongin, tuu khempeuh a si khin a, ganbuk khempeuh a

Zefaniah
Zefaniah 1
Topa' Heh Thukna Ni
1Amon'
tapa Josiah, Judah gam kumpi ahih laitakin, Topain Zefaniah'
tungah hih thu a pia hi. Zefaniah'pa Kushi hi a, Kushi'pa Gedaliah hi a,
Gedaliah'pa Amariah hi a, Amariah'pa pen Kumpi Hezekiah ahi hi
2Topain hih bangin thu gen a, “Leitung a om na khempeuh ka susiading hi.
3Mihing le ganhing, vana leeng vasa le tui sunga ngasa, a vekpi-in ka susia
ding hi. Migilote ka susiading a, leitung a om mihing khempeuh ka susia
4“Judah
sem siampite ahi a, keima siampite ahi zongin, a vekpi-in ka sumaiding hi.
5Innkhum zangah kahto-in, ni, kha, le aksi a bia mi khempeuh ka susiading
pasian' min tawh a kiciam teiteite zong, ka susiading hi.
nawn lote, ka susiading hi,” a ci hi.
7Topa Pasian' mai-ah gamdai takin om un! Topa' ni hong naita hi. Topain
biakna-a sa gawh bangin a mite a go dingin kithawi a, a gawhding mite
8Topain hih bangin thu gen a, “Tua bangin mite a kigawh ni-in, uliante le
kumpipa' tapate, le gamdangte' ngeina a zuite khempeuh, gim ka piading hi.
uh vante tawh, a topa uh' inn a dimsakte khempeuh, tua ni mahin gim ka pia
ding hi,” a ci hi.
10Topain hih bangin thu gen a, “Jerusalem khua-a om Ngasa Kulh kongpi-ah
mite' kikona na zading uh a, tua khuapi Veng Nihna sungah mite' kahna le
mual neute tungah a puak zaizai na zading uh hi.
ding uh hi.
loin, a ngeina bangun omcip a, ‘Topain a pha hitaleh a sia hitaleh bangmah
bawl ngei lo hi,' a ci mite, gim ka piading hi.
13Amau' neihsa khempeuh kisutding a, a innte uh kisuksiatsakding hi. Inn a
lam hangun a sungah teng kha loding uh a, leenggui a suan hangun a
leenggahzu dawn kha loding uh hi,” a ci hi.

15Tua
ni pen heh mahmah ni, lungkham sinkham ni, tuahsia-in kisuksiat

18Topa' heh thuk ni hong tun ciangin a ngun le a khamte un amaute honkhia
thakhat thu-in leitung a teng mi khempeuh a sumaiding hi.

4Gaza khuapi-ah kuamah om nawn loding a, Ashkelon khuapi kisusiading
5Tuipi gei-ah a gual ten, no Filistia gammite aw, gimna na ngahding uh hi.
hi. Mi khempeuh a beimang dongin hong susiading hi.
6Tuipi gei-a om leitang aw, tuute' gamtatna mun, gamlak na suak lelding hi.
7Judah mi a omlaitein na gam sung luahding uh a, amautein tuucinna-in
amaute' Pasianin amaute ompihding a, citheisakkikding hi.
