Zefaniah 3
Jerusalem A Mawhna le A Nopsakkikna
1Ama
mite mah nengniamin, thumang loin a tatsia, Jerusalem khuapiin
2Topa' thu ngai nuam lo a, a thuhilhna sang nuam lo hi. Topa muang nuam lo
a, a Pasian naih nuam lo hi.
3A uliante, humpinelkai gilkial bang a, a thukhente, keivom gilkial bang uh
gamsate tawh kibang uh hi.
4A
kamsangte kihisak uh a, kamsang citak hi lo uh hi. A siampitein a
siangtho nate ninsak uh a, amau angsungding bek a khualna-un Pasian'
thukham lehhei uh hi.
5Ahi zongin tua khuapi sungah Topa omin, a thuman na bek sem a, a khialin
hi. Ahi zongin tua lai-a mihing thuman lote, a sia-in gamta teitei uh a,
maizumna mel theithei lo uh hi.
6Topain hih bangin thu gen a, “A kiphasak mite ka nilkhia a, a gal panmunte
uh ka susia hi. A kongzing lampite uh ka kinusiacipsak a, tua lampi kuamah
in tawn nawn lo hi. A khuapi uh kisia gawpin kinusia a, a sungah kuamah om
nawn lo hi.
7Tua ahih manin ka mitein kei hong zahtakin ka thuhilhna ngaiding uh a,
mangngilh loding uh hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi. Ahi zongin a gamtatsiat ngei
bangun gamtalai veve uh hi,” a ci hi.
8Topain hih bangin thu gen a, “Tua ahih ciangin minamte ka mawhsak ni
ka hehna ka thuaksakding, ka lungsim ka khensat khin hi. Ka hehluatna
thu hong ngenin, lungsim kikhatin ka na hong semding uh hi.
10A gamlapi Ethiopia gam pekah a om, a kithehthang ka mite nangawnin
11Tua
bangmah om nawn loding hi. Note lak panin a kiphasak, a kihisak mite ka
nawn keiding uh hi.
12Note
lakah a kiniamkhiat, mineute bek, ka suaktasak laiding a, keima
13Israel mi a omlai sunte, midangte tungah gilo nawn loding uh a, zuauthu
cithei-in lungmuangin omding uh a, kuamah kihta nawn loin omding uh
hi,” a ci hi.
14Zion tanu aw, nakpitakin la sa inla, Israel aw, lungdamin kiko in. Jerusalem
launading bangmah om nawn lo hi.
16Tua ni ciangin Jerusalem khuapi kiangah, “Zion khuapi aw, lau kei in. Na
ding hi. Note' hangin Topa lungdamin la sading a,
a, “Note a dingin a lauhuai thu ka beisak khin a, na mindaina teng uh kong
19En un, tua hun ciangin no a hong bawlsiate gim ka piading a, a khebaite
honkhia-in, a kipaikhiatpih mite ka ciahpihkikding hi. Amau' maizumna uh
minthanna ka suaksakding a, mi khempeuhin amaute a phatding uh hi.
20Tua hun ciangin, a kithehthang na mite uh kong kaikhawmding a, leitung
mi khempeuhin note hong phatding uh hi. A tawpna-ah note na cithei kik
ding uh hi,” Topain ci hi, a ci hi.
Haggai
Haggai 1
1Persia gam uk kumpi Dariasin a uk a kum nihna kum, a kha gukna a ni
Shealtiel' tapa Zerubbabel, Judah gam ukpa le Jehozadak' tapa Joshua,
2Vanglian Topain thu gen a, “Hih mite in, biakinn lamkikding hun nai lo hi,
ci uh hi,” a ci hi.
4“Ka mite aw, ka biakinn a siacipin a om laitakin, inn hoihpipi sungah note
na omding uh kilawm sa na hi uh hiam?
5Tua ahih ciangin Vanglian Topain ka hong cihin-ah: Tu laitak a na omzia uh
6Khaici tampi na tuh uh hangin an tawm bek na la uh a, annekding na neih
tei uh hangin na khamding uh na nei kei uh hi. Dawnding leenggahzu na
neih tei uh hangin na khamding uh na nei kei uh hi. Puansilhding na neih
tei uh hangin a lumkhopding na nei kei uh hi. Sum thalawhtein zong a
khamkhopding uh thalawh zo lo uh hi.
7Tua ahih ciangin Vanglian Topain ka hong cihin-ah: Tu laitak a na omzia uh
bia theiding uh hi.
9“An
hau dingin na kilamet uh hangin tawmcik bek na nei uh hi. Na
hi. Bang hangin tuacih ka hi hiam? Note khempeuh, nomau' innding ciat
lamin na manlah uh a, ka biakinn a siapi-in na koihdakna hang uh ahi hi.
10Tua thu hangin guah zu lo a, leitang panin bangmah khangkhia zo lo hi.
11Keimahin gam sung teng, mualtung khempeuh, leitang pana a piang kung
khempeuh, mihing, ganhing, le mite' nasepna khempeuhah keuna ka tungsak
hi,” a ci hi.
12Tua ciangin Sheatiel' tapa Zerubbabel, Jehozadak' tapa Joshua ahi siampi
lianpen pa, le salsuahna panin hong ciahkik mi khempeuhin Topaahi amau'
gamta-in, Topa zahtakin a lau uh hi.
13Tua ciangin Topa'kamtai Haggaiin mite tungah Topa' thugente gensawn a,
“Topain note kong ompih hi,” ci hi, ci-in a gen hi.
14Tua hi a, Topain Judah gam ukpa Zerubbabel, siampi lianpenpa Joshua, le
lungsim a guan hi. Vanglian Topa, amau' Pasian' biakinn a lam dingin hong
kithawi uh a,
15Dariasin kumpi a sep a kum nihna kum, a kha gukna a ni sawmnih le ni li
ni-in biakinn lam hong kipan uh hi.
Haggai 2
1Tua kum mah, a kha sagihna, a ni sawmnih le ni khat ni-in kamsang Haggai
2Judah
gam ukpa Zerubbabel, siampi lianpenpa Joshua, le mi khempeuh
3“Nidanga
biakinn a hoihna dan a ciamteh theilai na om uh hiam? Tu-in
bangci na sa uh hiam? Note' muhna-ah a gen taak het lo tawh kibangding hi.
6“A sawt loin vanpi le leipi, tuipi le leitung ka lokgawpding hi.
7Minam
ding hi.
8Leitung a a om ngun le kham khempeuh keima-a' ahi hi.
9Biakinn thak pen a lui sangin hoihzaw-in thupizawding hi. Hih biakinn-ah
10Gam
uk kumpipa Dariasin a uk a kum nihna mah, a kha kuana a ni
sawmnih le ni li ni-in kamsang Haggai tungah Topain thu gen leuleu a,
11“Hih thu tawh kisai-in siampite' ngaihsutna dong in:
12Mi khatpeuhin biakna-a a kipia sa siangtho themkhat, a puantualpi thep
an siangtho a suakding hiam?” ci-in a dongsak hi. Tua bangin a kidot ciangin
siampite in, “Tua puantualpiin a sukkhak ante, biakna an siangtho suak tuan
loding hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi.
13Tua ciangin Haggai in, “Mi khat in, misi tawh a kisukkhak manin mi nin a
a nin a suakding hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Siampite in, “A nin suakding hi,”
ci-in a dawng uh hi.
14Tua
ciangin Haggaiin thu gen a, “Topain hih bangin ci hi: Tu-a nong
piang ahih manin, biakna tau tungah a piak uh na khempeuh a nin suak hi.
na kipat ma-un bangci na hi uh hiam?
16An seu sawmnih phading ci-in ansal-ah na pai uh ciangin seu sawm bek na
17Na an ciin khempeuh uh cingteek sakin ka kausansak a, tuate nangawn a
18Tu-in, kha kuana a ni sawmnih le ni li ni, biakinn bulpi a kiphuh khit, tuni
a kipanin limtakin ngaihsun un.
hi, ci hi,” a ci hi.
Zerubbabel' tungah Topa' Kamciamna
20Tua kha a ni sawmnih le ni li ni mahin Topain Haggai tungah a nihveina
22Kumpipa' gam khempeuh lumletin a vangliatna uh a beisakding ka hi hi.
pukding uh a, amaute khatlekhat kithatlumding uh hi.
23Ka nasem Zerubbabel aw, tua ni ciangin nang hong la-in ka mite' kumpi
na hi hi, Vanglian Topain ci hi, ci-in gen in,” a ci hi.
Zekhariah
Zekhariah 1
1Persia
gam uk Kumpipa Dariasin a uk a kum nihna, a kha giatna
Berekhiah' tapa hi a, ama pu Iddo ahi hi.
2Topain Zekhariah kiangah, “Mite tungah hih bangin thu gen in: ‘Na pu na
4Na pu na pate uh bang nawn kei un. Nidanga kamsangtein amaute kiangah
ka thu gen uh a, gamtatsia gamta loin, a mawh nawn loh nading hilh uh hi.
Ahi zongin amautein ka thu ngainuam loin, ka thu hong mang lo uh hi.
5Tu-in na pu na pate uh koi-ah om ahi hiam? Tua kamsangte nungtalai sa na
hi uh hiam?
6Ahi
zongin ka nasem ahi kamsangte' tungtawnin ka hilhkholhna le ka
thupiaknatein note dongin hong sukhaloding sa na hi uh hiam, ka ci hi. Tua
ahih ciangin a tawpna-ah amaute kisik uh a, hih dinga ka lungsimah ka
uh hi,' ci in,” a ci hi.
Kamsangpain Sakolte a Muhna
7Dariasin a uk a kum nihna kum, kha sawm le khatna ahi Shebat kha ni
musak hi.
a om mui singkungte lakah amah khawl a, ama nungah sakol dang a san, a
gial, a kang om hi.
9Tua ciangin keimah in, “Sia aw, hih sakolte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” ci-
in ka dong hi. Amahin hong dawng a, “Bang a cihnopna hiam cih kong lak
ding hi.
10Hih sakol tung tuangte pai kawikawi-in leitung a en dingin Topain a sawl
ahi hi,” hong ci hi.
in, “Leitung khempeuh ka en kawikawi khin uh a, leitung khempeuh
khuaphawk loin nuamtakin om uh hi,” ci-in thu a zasak uh hi.
12Tua ciangin Topa' vantungmi in, “Vanglian Topa aw, Jerusalem khuapi le
hehpih loin bang tanvei omlaiding na hi hiam?” ci hi.
14Vanglian Topain
siangtho Jerusalem, nakpitakin itin ka lunghimawh hi.
15Tua bangin nuamtakin a om hithiat minamte tungah ka heh mahmah hi. Ka
mite tungah ka hehna ki-ip tentanin ka om laitakin, hih minam dangtein ka
mite' gimna nasiasak semsem uh hi.
16Tua
zong kiciangkikding hi, VanglianTopain ci hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi.
17Tua ciangin vantungmiin ka taangkonading hong genkik leuleu a, “Ama
ama khuapi-in a neihkiknading, Vanglian Topain gen hi, ci-in gen in,” hong
ci hi.
Kamsangpain Saki Li le Sek tawi Mi Li Mu
18Ka khuadak leh saki li ka mu hi.
19Bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, ci-in vantungmi kiangah ka dong hi. Amahin
vangliatnate a cihnopna ahi hi,” hong ci hi.
21Hih mite, bang hihding ahi hiam, ci-in ka dong hi. Amahin hong dawng a,
minamte, tu-in hih sek tawi litein lausakin a lawnthalding ahi hi,” hong ci
hi.
Zekhariah 2
Kamsangpain Tehna Khau a Tawi Mi Khat Mu
1Ka muhna dang khat leuleu-ah, a khut sungah tehna khau a tawi mi khat ka
mu hi.
2Koi-a paiding na hi hiam, ci-in ka dot ciangin amah in, “Jerusalem khuapi a
sauna ka theih nadingin a teh dingin a paiding ka hi hi,” hong ci hi.
dawntuah hi.
4Tua ciangin vantungmi a masapain a dawntuahpa kiangah, “Va tai inla,
kulhhuam sungahta zo loding uh hi.
5Tua khuapi a hu dingin meikulh bangin Topa mahmah a omnading, le tua
khua sungah a minthanna tawh a tennading thu, Topain kam ciamzo hi, ciin va gen in,” a ci hi.
6Topain ama mite kiangah, “Mun khempeuhah note kong thehthang khin hi.
Ahi zongin tu-in Babylon panin taikhia-in Jerusalem-ah ciahkik un.
7Babylon-ah a om mite aw, Zion-ah tai un,” ci hi.
8Hih bangin maang ka muh khit ciangin,
ama mite' na a sutgawp minam
a, Topa' mite a su mi peuhpeuhin a mit nauta bangin a manphapen khat a su
ahi hi.
9Topa mahmahin note hong suding a, nidanga note' na hong sepsak mitein
uh hi.
10Topain hih bangin hong ci hi: “Jerusalem mite aw, lungdamin la sa un.
Note tawh a hong omkhawm tading ka hi hi,” ci hi.
13Mi khempeuh aw, Topa' mai-ah gamdai-in om un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a
Zekhariah 3
1Topain maang hong musak a, Topa' vantungmi mai-ah siampi lianpenpa
Joshua' mawhna a zong dingin a kiangah Satan zong a om ka mu hi.
2Topa' vantungmiin Satan kiangah, “Satan aw, Topain nang hong mawhsak
sung panin a kiteenkhia singkhuah tawh kibang hi,” a ci hi.
3Joshua ahihleh vantungmi mai-ahding a, puan a nin mahmah a silh hi.
4Vantung miin ama sawltak van midangte kiangah, “Hih mipa' silh a puan
kiangah, “Na mawhna teng kong paihkhiatsak khin a, tu-in na silh dingin
puan thak ka hong piading hi,” a ci hi.
5Tua ciangin a sawltak van mite thu pia a, Joshua' lu tungah dial siangtho a
khipsakding uh a sawl hi. Topa' vantungmi tua munah a din sung mahin,
siangtho zong a silhsak uh hi.
7Vanglian Topain hih bangin ci hi: “Ka thukhamte zui-in kong sawl thute na
sep leh, ka biakinn sung le biakinn huang sungteng na ukding a, hih ka
ding hi.
no a dangtein zong ngai un. Note pen mailam thuhoihnading lim na hi uh
9Joshua'
10Tua ni ciangin note khempeuhin leenggui le theikungte hau-in nuam na sa
samding uh hi, Vanglian Topain ci hi,” a ci hi.

5amah in, “A cihnopna thei lo na hi hiam?” ci-in hong dawng a, kei zong,
“Sia aw, ka thei kei hi,” ci-in ka dawngkik hi.
6Tua
ciangin vantungmiin kei kiangah, “Topain Zerubbabel tungah hih
zong hi lo, keima tung panin na ngah vangliatna bek tawh na ma na tunzo
ding hi.
7Thuhaksa pente nangawnin na ma hong khaktan zo loding hi. Biakinn na
lamkikding a, mite in, ‘Hoih mahmah hi,' ci-in a ot ngeingai laitakin a
khupna suang na ciangding hi, hong ci hi,” a ci hi.
9Amah in, “Zerubbabelin biakinn bulpi phut khin a, biakinn lam zong a zo
theiding uh hi.
10A maa uh a telh loh manun ka mite lungkia uh a, ahi zongin Zerubbabelin
biakinn lam nasep a makaihna a muh uh ciangin a lung uh damkikding hi,”
hong ci hi. Vantung mi in, “Meivak sagihte pen, leitung khempeuh a
etna Topa'mittang sagih ahi hi,” hong ci hi.

a cihnopna ahi hiam?” ci-in ka dong hi.
13Amah in, “Thei lo na hi hiam?” ci-in hong dong a, kei zong, “Sia aw, thei
kei ing,” ci-in ka dawng hi.
14Tua ciangin amah in, “Leitung khempeuh' Topa' na a sem dingin Pasianin
teelin sathau a nilh mi nihte a cihnopna ahi hi,” hong ci hi.

hi,” ci-in ka dawng hi.

Zekhariah 6
Sakolleeng Li A Muhna
1Tua
panin sakolleeng li hong paikhia ka mu hi.
2A leeng masa pen sakol sanin kai a, a nihna, sakol vomin kai a,
3a thumna, sakol kangin kai a, a lina, sakol gialin kai hi.
4Tua ciangin vantungmi kiangah, “Sia aw, hih sakolleengte bang a cihnopna
ahi hiam?” ci-in ka dong hi.
5Tua ciangin amahin hong dawng a, “Hihte pen huihleeng li a cihnopna hi a,
leitung khempeuhte' Topa' kiang panin a hong paikhia ahi uh hi,” hong ci hi.
6Sakol vomtein a kaih leeng pen leilu lam Babylon-ah a paiding hi a, sakol
kangte, nitumna lam, sakol gialte, leitaw lam, sakol sante, nisuahna lam
7Tua sakolte, paikhia-in leitung teng a etding uh ngaklah mahmah uh hi. Tua
ahih manin vantungmi in, “Pai unla, leitungteng va en un,” ci-in thu a pia hi.
Amaute zong pai-in va en uh hi.
paitein Topa' hehna damsak hi,” hong ci hi.
10Amah in, “Babylon gam salsuahna pan a hong ciahkik Heldai, Tobijah, le
Jedaiahte' hong piak leengte la inla, tua na lak ni mahin Zefaniah' tapa
Josiah' inn-ah paipih in.
Jehozadak' tapa, siampi lianpen a sem Joshua khusak in.

a, kithutuakin, kilemin na semkhawmding uh hi,” ci hi,' va ci in.

phawk nadingin biakinn sungah omding hi,” hong ci hi.
15Gamlapi-a a teng mite hong pai-in Topa' innlam nasep hong huhding uh hi.
na zuih nak-uhleh tu-a ka gen bangin a hong piangding ahi hi.

Malakhi
Malakhi 1
Topain Israel-te A Itna
1Topain Malakhi tungtawnin Israel-te tungah thu gen hi.
2Topa in, “Note kong it hi,” ci hi. Ahi zongin note in, “Kote hong bangci it na
hi hiam?” na ci uh hi. Topain hong dawng a, “Esau le Jakob unau hi a, ahi
zongin Jakob le a suan a khakte itin,
3Esau le a suan a khakte ka mudah hi. Esau' neih mualtung gamte ka susia a,
gamsate tungah ka pia hi,” ci hi.
ding hi,” ci le-uh, Topa in, “A ut uhleh lam uh hen; ahi zongin ka susia kik
veveding hi. Midangte in, ‘Gam gilo, Topa' heh tawntungna minamte,' ci-in
koding uh hi,” ci-in a dawngding hi.
5Note' mit mahmah tawh hih thupiang na muding uh a, “Israel gam pualam
nangawnah Topain vangliatna nei hi,” na ciding uh hi.
6Vanglian Topain
siampite tungah hih bangin hong ci hi: “Tapain apa
zahtak a, nasempain a topa kihta hi. Kei pen napa uh hinapi, bang hangin
hong zahtak lo a, na topa uh hinapi, bang hangin hong kihta lo na hi uh
hiam? No siampitein kei hong simmawh napi-in, ‘Bang hong ci simmawh ka
hi uh hiam?' na cilai uh hi.
7Note
hinapi-in, ‘Kong zahtak bawl lohna uh bang om ahi hiam?' na ci uh hi. Ka
biakna tau simmawhbawl na hih manun hong zahtak bawl lo na hi uh hi.
8Ganhing
a mittawpite tawh kei nong biak uh ciangin, a hoihmahin
kingaihsun na hi uh hiam? A khebai, a cina ganhingte tawh nong biak uh
ciangin, a hoihmah kisa na hi uh hiam? Tua bang ganhing khat peuhpeuh,
ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi.
uh hong pia loding hi; tua pen nomau' khialhna ahi hi.
10Vanglian Topa in,
“Ka biakna tau tungah, bangmah-a kimang lo mei na
khak le-uh cin ka ut hi. Note tungah ka lungkim kei a, nong piak uh
11Leitung khempeuhah a om minam khempeuhin kei hong zahtak uh a, kei a
pia uh hi. Mi khempeuhin kei hong zahtak uh hi.
biakna tau tunga na piak uh ante na thupi ngaihsut loh uh ciangin, keimah a
hong simmawh na hi uh hi.
13Note in, ‘Hihte cimtak khin hang,' ci-in nong nap nitsan lel uh hi. Keimah
peuh nong paipih uh hi. Tua bangte, a sang dingin hong ngaihsun na hi uh
hiam?
a, minam khempeuhin kei hong zahtak uh hi,” a ci hi.
Malakhi 2
1Vanglian Topain hih bangin ci hi: “Siampite aw, note a dingin hih lai-ah
thupiakna khat om hi.
2Na gamtatna uh tawh kei nong zahtakding uh hi. Ka thugente ngai loin,
A taktakin ci lehang, notein ka thupiaknate thupi lak lo na hih manun na
3Na
suanlekhakte uh nakpitakin ka thuhilhding a, note ahihleh, na
lo ahihna thu, hih thu kong genna-ah na theiding uh hi.
5“Amaute a nuntaknading le a nopsaknading thu ka ciam a, amautein kei
6Amaute
zuauthu gingkhia lo hi. Ka deihna bangin amaute gamta uh a, a khialding mi
tampite, thuman lamah a paisak uh hi.
7Siampite'
Amaute pen, Vanglian Topa' kamtaite ahih manun, mitein keima deihna a
8“Ahi zongin, no siampite na hih uhleh lampi man panin na pial khin uh hi.
Na thuhilhnate un mi tampi tak khialsak hi. Note tawh ka bawl thuciamna na
palsat khin uh hi.
9Tua ahih manin, notein ka thuhilhna zui loin, keima thu na hilh uh ciangin
zong a kibangin hilh loin mi na deidan mah uh bangin, kei zong mi
khempeuh mai-ah simmawhna le niamkhiatna kong ngahsakding hi,” a ci hi.
hiam? Tua hinapi-in bang hangin eite khatlekhat tungah citak loin, i pu i pate
tawh a bawl, Pasian' thuciamna palsat ihi hiam?
11Judah mite citak loin, Pasian tungah a thuciamna uh palsat uh a, Israel
mite' lak le Jerusalem khua sungah siatna tampi gamta uh hi. Topain a it
mahmah biakinn ninsak uh hi. Topa ahi lo, pasian dang a bia numeite, zi-in
la-in a tenpih uh hi.
12Hih bangin a gamta mi peuhmah, a kua a kua hitaleh, Topain sugawp hen
sang nawn lo ahih manin Topa' biakna tau, khitui tawh na kawtsak uh a,
kapin thumin na om uh hi.
14Bang hangin hong sang lo hiam, na ci uh hi. Na khangnolai uha na tenpih
na zite uh tungah na cihtak lohna uh amahin hong thei a, na zite uh tungah
na cihtak tawntungnading uh Pasian tungah thu ciamin, na zite uh zong na
lawmnu mah uh hinapi-in amaute tawh na thuciamna uh na pelhna hang uh
ahi hi.
15Pasianin na zite uh tawh pumkhat, lungsim khat ahi dingin hong bawl hi lo
ahi hiam? Hih bangin a hong bawlna pen bang a deihna ahi hiam? Pasian' mi
lai-un na tenpih na zi uh tawh na thuciamna uh na palsatkhak loh nadingun
kidawm un.
16Vanglian Topain hih bangin ci hi: “Zi makna ka deih kei a, mi khatpeuhin
a khangno lai-a a tenpih a zi tungah tua bang gitlohna a gamtatna ka mudah
na thuciamna uh palsat kei un,” ci hi, a ci hi.
17Thu na gengenna uh tawh Topa na gimsak uh hi. Note in, “Bangci gimsak
ka hi uh hiam?” na ci uh hi. “Topain a sia-in a gamtate a hoihin ngaihsun a,
a gen Pasian koi lai-ah om ahi hiam?” ci-in na dotnate uh tawh na gimsak uh
hi.

zawhthawh bawlte, le kei hong zahtak lo mi khempeuhte' langkhatah
Sawm-ah-khat Piakna

aw, a siacimit na hi nai kei uh hi.
7Na pu na pate uh mah bangin ka thukhamte panin note na pialkhia uh a, ka
bangci kiheiding ka hi uh hiam?' na ci uh hi.
8Keimahin note kong dotnop thu pen, mi khatpeuhin Pasian' na guksakding
kilawm ahi hiam? Kilawm lo hinapi-in notein nong guksak uh hi. Ahi zongin
note in, ‘Bang hong guksak ka hi uh hiam?' na ci uh hi. Sawm-ah-khat piakna
le biakpiaknateah nong guksak uh hi.
10Ka biakinn-ah an a om theih nadingin sawm-ah-khat a kimin hong paipih
un. Kei hong ze-et un; vantung kongkhakte hongin, note a dingin na hoih
tampi kong piakna na muding uh hi.
11Lo panin a piang na ante uh, kauphe ka nesak nawn keiding a, na leenggui
uh gahpha mahmahding hi.

(Luk 16:13)

(Luk 12:22-31)

kei hong lehhekding hi,” a ci hi.

Marka 16
Thawhkikna
(Mat 28:1-10; Luk 24:1-12; Jhn 20:1-10)
1Sabbath
ni a bei khit ciangin Magdala khuami Mary, James nu Mary, le
Salome-tein Jesuh' luang a va zut nadingun paknamtui a va lei uh hi.
2Nipi ni zingsang tung nisuah phetin hanah a pai uh hi.
3Amaute khatlekhat kikum uh a, “Han kongvang hukna suangtum kuan hong
likkhiatsakding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi.
4Tua laitakin a khuadak uhleh a suangtum a kilikkhia khinsa-in a mu uh hi.
5Han sungah a lut uhleh, a taklam pang uhah, puanpak a silh tangval khat a
tu mu uh a, lamdangsa-in a lau uh hi.

khuami Jesuh na zong uh hi. Amah kithokiksak khin a, hih lai-ah om nawn lo
hi. Amah a kisialna mun hong en un.
7Tu-in pai unla, Peter le Jesuh' nungzui dangte kiangah hih thu va gen un.
amah na muding uh hi, ci hi, ci un,” a ci hi.

Luka 1
1A lian mahmah Theofilas aw: Eite lakah a piang ngeisa thu a kigente, mi
tampiin amau siamna zah ciat tawh lai-in a gelh uh hi.
2A kipat cil a kipanin amau' mit mahmah tawh a mu mitein hong gente uh a
gelh uh ahi hi.

siampi nasep a sem hi.

Luka 6
(Mat 12:1-8; Mrk 2:23-28)
1Sabbath ni khatin mangbuh lo nawkin Jesuh le a nungzuite a pai uh hi. A
nungzuitein mangbuhvuite zut uh a, a khutsung uhah nuai-in a ne uh hi.
2Amaute lakah a om Farisi mite pawlkhat in, “Sabbath ni-in i hih dingin a
kilawm lo gamtatna bang hangin gamta na hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi.
3Tua
ciangin Jesuhin amaute kiangah, “David le a kikholhpihte a gilkial
laitakun David' gamtatna thu sim ngei lo na hi uh hiam?
Ompihna Anlum la-in ne a, ama kikholhpihte zong a nesak hi,” ci-in a dawng
hi.
5Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Mihing Tapa pen Sabbath ni a Ukpa ahi hi,” ci-in a
thugen a khum hi.
(Mat 12:9-14; Mrk 3:1-6)
6Sabbath a ni dang khatin kikhopna inn khatah Jesuh pai-in thu a hilh hi. A
khut taklam a zaw mi khat tua lai-ah na om hi.
uh thu zong nuam uh ahih manin, Sabbath ni-in hih mipa a damsak hiam, ciin na encik gige uh hi.

kiangah, “Ding inla, mihonte mai hih lai munah hong pai in,” a ci hi. A mipa
zong hong pai-in mihon mai-ah a hongding hi.

ci hi.

Ka Paina-ah Nong Pai Thei Keiding uh Hi
21Tua ciangin Jesuhin amaute kiangah, “Kei ka paikhiading hi. Notein kei
na hong zongding uh a, ahi zongin na mawhna uh na sihpihding uh hi. Ka
paina-ah note na hong pai thei keiding uh hi,” a ci hi.
22Tua ahih manin Jew mi uliante in, “‘Ka paina-ah note na hong pai thei kei
ding uh hi,' ci ahih manin amahmah kithattawmding a cihna hiding hiam?”
a ci uh hi.
23Tua ciangin Jesuhin amaute kiangah, “Note pen nuailam mi na hi uh a, kei
pen tunglam mi ka hi hi. Note pen hih leitung mi na hi uh a, kei pen hih
leitung mi ka hi kei hi.

Ka Tuute KemIn

ciangin, “Ka tuute na kem in,” a ci leuleu hi.

hangin Peter zong a dah suak hi. Tua ahih manin, “Topa aw, nangmahin na
khempeuh na thei a, nangmah ka hong itna thu zong na thei hi,” ci-in a dawn
ciangin Jesuh in, “Ka tuute na kem in.

4Mi khat' nasemte tungah kuain thu khen theiding na hi uh hiam? A gina le

5Mi pawlkhattein ni khatpeuh adang sangin thupi zaw hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh
a, pawlkhattein ni khempeuh kibangkim hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh hi. Tua ahih
manin a kuamah peuhin amau' hoihsakna thu ciantakin theita uh hen.

ahi uh hi. An khempeuh a ne miin zong Pasian' tungah lungdamna ko-in ne
uh ahih manin Topa a pahtawina mahin a ne uh ahi hi. Nek dingin kilawm lo
hi, ci-in a ne lo mitein zong Pasian tungah lungdamna mah ko ahih manin
Topa a pahtawina mahin a ne lo uh ahi hi.

Rom 16
Aituam Hopihnate
1Kenkhrea khua-a om pawlpite lakah na a sem, thu upna sungah i sanggamnu
manin, Pasian' mitein a hih dingin a kilawm ahih mah bangin Topa' thu
hoihtakin na huh un.

na hopih sak un.
6Note a dingin nakpitakin na a sem Mary zong na hopih sak un.

1 Korin Masa 6
Thu Um lote' Mai-ah Kikhiatna
1Note khatlekhat thu na kineih uh ciangin Pasian' mi siangthote khensakzaw
loin lawki thukhente' mai na kitun ngam uh hi.
2Pasian' mitein leitung mite' thu a khensakzawding ahihlam thei lo na hi uh
thu neute khen thei lo lawmlawm na hi uh hiam?
3Eite pen vantung mite' thu nangawn a khensakding ihih lamtak thei lo na hi
bangmahin a kisim lo mite' mai kitunding na hi uh hiam?
5Note a dingin zumhuai mahmah hi. Note khatlekhat na kithuneihnate uh a
6Tua hinapi, khatlekhat thu kineihin zum na kitun uh a, lawki thukhente na
khensak tazen uh hi.
7Note khatlekhat zum na kitut mahmah uh zong a gina het lo na hihna uh
hi uh hiam?
8Note
khatlekhat kisu-in, khatlekhat na kisut zawsop uh a, na sanggamte
teekteek nangawn uh tawh thu na nei uh hi.
9Migilote, Pasian' Ukna sungah a lut hetloh nading thu na thei uh hi. Note
kihaibawl kei un. Numei tawh a paktatte, milim biate, mi zi ahih kei leh mi
pasal tawh a mawhte, pasal le pasal a khialte,
10a gutate, a huaihamte, zukhamte, mi gensiate, ahih kei leh mi' na a sutte
khat beek, Pasian' Ukna sungah lutthei het loding hi.
11Note pawlkhat, tua bangin na gamta uh hi. Ahi zongin note pen i Topa
kisiangsak khinsa, Pasian' tungah a kipiasa, Pasian tawh a kipawlsa mite na
hi uh hi.

zongin na khempeuh hihding kilawm lo hi. Kei zong ka ut khempeuh ka hih
13“An pen i gilpi a'ding hi a, gilpi zong an a'ding mah hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci
ding hi. Pumpi pen paktatna-in zatding hi lo a, Topa' na sepna-in zatding
hizaw hi. Topain pumpi a'ding na hong sem hi.

1 Korin Masa 9

Efesa 2
1A beisa hunah na thuman lohna uh le na mawhna uh hangin kha thu tawh
kisai-ah a si na hi uh hi.

zui-in nungta-in, i pumpi le i lungsim deihna bangin i gamta hi. Tua ahih

8Note' upna hangin Pasian' hong hehpihna tawh hotkhiatna a ngah na hi uh
hi. Note' thalawhna hangin a ngah hi loin Pasian' hong piakkhong ahi hi.
9Note' hanciamna tawh a ngah hi lo na hih manun na kisialh nading uh a thu
om lo hi.

dingin a na ngaihsut kholhsa ahi hi.

hi uh a ci Jew mite in, vun a ki-at lo mite a hong cih uh, na pian' na patun
Gentail mi ahi notein nidanga na omzia uh phawkkik dih un.

thute zong a ngah dingte na hi kei uh a, Pasian a nei lo, lametding bangmah
nei loin leitungah a om na hi uh hi.

Efesa 6
1Tate aw, na nu na pate uh thu na manding uh Khristian ngeina hi a, ahi
2-3Thupiakna a lian khat in, “Na nu le napa zahtak in,” cihna hi a, khapna
leitungah na khan a sauding hi,” na ci pah hi.
4Pate aw, na tate uh a hehtheih nadingin bawl kei unla, Khristiante ngeina
5Silate aw, launa le linna tawh na leitung tote uh thu mang unla, Khrih' na na
tawh na sem un.

1 Thesalonika Masa 3
1A tawpna-ah ka thuakzawh nawn loh uh ciangin Athen khua-ah kei le Silas
omin,
2Khrih Lungdamna Thu hilhna-ah Pasian a dingin kote tawh na a semkhawm
i sanggampa Timoti hong paisak le-ung hoihpending hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun uh
hong paisak ka hi uh hi. Hih bang bawlsiatna pen i thuakding mah hi, ci-in
notein zong na theih uh ahi hi.
uh bangin tu-a na thuak bangte teekteek mah uh a thuakding hi hang, ci-in
ka hong genkholhsa uh ahi hi.

1 Johan Masa 4
Pasian' Kha le Khrih' Galte
1Ka it lawmte aw, kha ka nei a ci mi khempeuh' thugen um kei unla, tua
3Ahi zongin hih thu a nial mi peuhmah, Pasian Kha' sawlna tawh thugen hi lo
uh hi. Hih bang mite pen Khrih' Gal hi a, hong paiding hi, ci-in na zaksa uh
mah bangin tu-in leitungah a hong om khinta ahi uh hi.

a zokhin na hi uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung mite a panpih
5Kamsang a kineihkhemtein leitung thu gen uh a, amaute pen Pasian a thei
a ngai uh hi.
6Ahi zongin note pen Pasian' mite na hi uh hi. Pasian a thei mi peuhmahin
kote' thugen hong ngai uh a, Pasian' pawl ahi lo mi peuhmahin kote' thugen
kilamdanna i theithei hi.

3 Johan Thumna 1
Hopihna
2Ka lawm it Gaias aw, nang na ci damin na vai khempeuh zong na maa pai
lungkhamna om loding hi, ci-in ka thei hi.
3Nang a mantakin a gamta na hih takpi mah bangin, i Khristian mipih hih lai-
ka nuam mahmah hi.
4Tate bangin ka hong neih mite a mantakin a gamtatna uh ka zakna hangin
ka lungdamna sangin adang lungdamna lianzaw bangmah om lo hi.
5Ka hong it lawm Gaias aw, na theih ngei loh hinapi-in i Khristian mipihte
lungsim takpi tawh na na huh hi.
6Amaute na limbawlna thu, hih lai-a pawlpite kiangah hong gen uh hi. I biak
Pasian' deihna tawh kituakin a khualzinna uh nuamtakin a zoptheih
nadingun na huh in.

pen a ut Diotrefesin ka thugen hong mang nuam lo hi.

12Mi khempeuhin Demetrias phatkim uh a, a manin ama gamtatna mahmah
in hih thu a manna hong kilangsak hi. Kotein zong ama hoihna ka thei uh a,
tua ama hoihna ka gennate uh a thuman ahi hi.

1Tua ciangin, tokhom tungah a tupain a taklam khutah a tawi laizial tawn

ciaptehna sagihte lakhia-in a laizial pheltheiding hi,” a hong ci hi.
6Tua upate' huamsung, ganhing lite le kumpi tokhom kikalah Tuuno ading
ka mu hi. Tua Tuuno pen a kigo lumsa tawh kibang a, leitung khempeuhah a

7Tua Tuuno va pai a, tokhom tungah a tupain a taklamah a tawi laizial a va
la hi.

ah a kun uh hi. Amautein harp lasakna khat ciat le Pasian' mi siangthotein

tawi uh hi.

10Pasian' na a sem dingin siampi za le kumpi za na pia a, amautein leitung
ukin a omding uh hi,” a ci uh hi.

hi,” a ci uh hi.

nuntakna a nei khempeuh inla a sakna uh ka za a, amaute in, “Tokhom

Amen.
Esclarecimento
Trata-se de iniciativa particular, com os seguintes objetivos: (i) colaborar para
divulgação dos diversos textos bíblicos disponíveis, e, (ii) facilitar o acesso a esses textos,
inclusive por meio de download.
Todo esforço em tornar a Palavra de Deus acessível a todos, em quaisquer localidades e
Espírito Santo. Ele inspirou o profeta Jeremias a dizer “não ensinará jamais cada um ao seu
próximo, nem cada um ao seu irmão, dizendo: Conhece ao SENHOR, porque todos me
conhecerão, desde o menor até ao maior deles, diz o SENHOR” (Jer. 31:34).
Jesus, também, falou assim: “e será pregado este evangelho do reino por todo o mundo,
para testemunho a todas as nações” (Mat. 24:14).
Muitas organizações foram constituídas com o propósito de fazer a Bíblia disponível nas
diversas línguas. Não é uma tarefa simples. Anos de trabalho, dedicação e entrega são
necessários para esta tão extraordinária missão.
O texto deste trabalho está disponível na internet, em páginas eletrônicas de
organizações que produzem ou divulgam bíblias, sem acréscimos de notas ou comentários.
todos os que amam a Palavra de Deus, o esforço em contribuir para amplificar sua divulgação.
Se possível, faça download do texto, para que sejamos, também, guardiões da Bíblia, e,
com isso, preservando-a para as futuras gerações.
Divulga a Palavra de Deus, ela mostra o Caminho e permite a todos, que se conheça Sua
vontade, em todos os lugares e épocas.
Marcel da Glória Pereira
2022, Vitória/ES - Brasil
Capa: Pôr do sol nas montanhas. Trata-se de imagem disponibilizada na internet,
dentre as que não informam haver restrição ao uso.

posted on 31 August 2020 at 9:51 pm Lomkholna: Myanmar, News, TedimPost, Zomi
NewsIn Brief: Thuthak tomkim ~ The Tedim Post (31 Aug)
2019-2020 hun sungin Political Partyte lak pan facebook ading sum tam a zang penpen nga om hi, ci-in Irrawaddy Newsin a kankhiatna uh pulak uh hi. USDPin US dollar 3,100, UBPin dollar 600, PPPin dollar 500, CNLDin dollar 200 leh NLDin dollar 100 cih bangin zang uh hi, cih pulak khia uh hi.
August 30, 2020 ni Leitung bupah Covid-19 natna ngah Tein 250 val(25,057,670), asi Tein 8 val (843,826) leh adam kik Tein 160 val (16,470,973) phata hi.
More: Opinion: A lunglut huai Zogam MP Candicatete ~ Pu Go Sawm Khup
August 29, 2020 ni-in Arsenal teamin Liverpool teamte zoin FA Community Shield ngah uh hi. Arsenal teamte adingin Community Shield 16 vei a ngahna uh ahih banah Manchester United zomah Community Shield tamvei angah pen team zong ahi uh hi. Source : 7day news, , RFA, Eleven Media, The Myanmar Times, Irrawady News. Thukai khawm : Lia Lu Lun, Lia Shang Shang.

ZOMI DAILY
posted on 13 July 2020 at 11:23 am Lomkholna: News, TedimPost, Zomi
NewsIn Brief: Thuthak tomkim ~ The Tedim Post (13 July)
2020-2021 laisin kumah Zato siamah(Nurse) dingin mimal 4,300 kisamding hi ci-in Union Minister U Myint Htwein gen hi. Zato siamah pen 2017-2018 kumin 1,700 leh 2018-2019 kumin 3,500 kiim sapna kinei ci hi.
June 29, 2020 ni-in Myanmar Army leh RCSSte kikapna hangin khuasung mi khatin sihlawh ahihmanin Shan State, Kyaukme khuapiah mipi 1000 valin lungphona nei uh hi.
Myanmar gamah Covid-19 natna hong tunzawh kha 3 sungin mimal 470in kisih bawlna(Suicide) hangin si uh ci hi.
Myanmar Army leh AAte kidona hangin Rakhine State leh Chin State, Paletwaah galtai mi 81,637 bang om hi, ci-in UN(United Nations)in gen hi. Chin State, Paletwaah galtai mi mimal 8000 val bang om ci hi.
USAin Japan tungah US Dollar Billion 23 man Gal vanleng F-35A namte 63, F-35B namte 22 leh F-135 namte akigawm 105 zuak dingin kithukimna nei uh hi.
India gamah July 11, 2020 ni nai 24 sungin Covid-19 natna ngah 27000 kibehlap hi. Tulaitak India gam pen Leitung bupah Covid-19 natna ngah tampen 3 na hi-in India gambupah natna ngah Tein 8 val (849,553), asi Tul 20 val(22,674) leh adam kik Tein 5 val(534,621) phata uh hi.
July 10, 2020 ni-in Singaporeah kiteelna om a, abeisa hun a azo ahi People's Action Party(PAP) mahin zo leuleu hi. PAP partyin Singapore gam pen kum 60 sung bang a makaih khin ahi hi.
2020 kumsungin huih siangtho lohna hangin Asia gam, khuapi 11ah mimal 153,600in sihna thuak uh a, sumtang US Dollar 82.4 billion bang supna om hi, ci-in huih lam tawh kisai thukan ahi Greenpeace kipawlnain gen hi.
July 12, 2020 ni Leitung bupah Covid-19 natna ngah Tein 120 val(12,741,287), asi Tein 5 leh lang val (565,719) leh adam kik Tein 70 val (7,023,260) phata hi. Source : 7day news, Eleven Media, Myanmar Times, DVB News.
Reader Interactions

{"id":24422,"date":"2020-07-13T11:23:38","date_gmt":"2020-07-13T03:23:38","guid":{"rendered":"https:\/\/zomidaily.com\/?p=24422"},"modified":"2020-07-13T11:23:38","modified_gmt":"2020-07-13T03:23:38","slug":"thuthak-tomkim-the-tedim-post-13-july","status":"publish","type":"post","link":"https:\/\/zomidaily.com\/thuthak-tomkim-the-tedim-post-13-july\/","title":{"rendered":"Thuthak tomkim ~ The Tedim Post (13 July)"},"content":{"rendered":"
NewsIn Brief: Thuthak tomkim ~ The Tedim Post (13 July)\n
2020-2021 laisin kumah Zato siamah(Nurse) dingin mimal 4,300 kisamding hi ci-in Union Minister U Myint Htwein gen hi. Zato siamah pen 2017-2018 kumin 1,700 leh 2018-2019 kumin 3,500 kiim sapna kinei ci hi.\n
June 29, 2020 ni-in Myanmar Army leh RCSSte kikapna hangin khuasung mi khatin sihlawh ahihmanin Shan State, Kyaukme khuapiah mipi 1000 valin lungphona nei uh hi.\n
Myanmar gamah Covid-19 natna hong tunzawh kha 3 sungin mimal 470in kisih bawlna(Suicide) hangin si uh ci hi.\n
Myanmar Army leh AAte kidona hangin Rakhine State leh Chin State, Paletwaah galtai mi 81,637 bang om hi, ci-in UN(United Nations)in gen hi. Chin State, Paletwaah galtai mi mimal 8000 val bang om ci hi.\n
USAin Japan tungah US Dollar Billion 23 man Gal vanleng F-35A namte 63, F-35B namte 22 leh F-135 namte akigawm 105 zuak dingin kithukimna nei uh hi.\n

Facebook azangden mipite Category khenpi 4in kikhenthei, nang koisungah kihel?
posted on 31 July 2017 at 10:06 am Lomkholna: News, Sawltak, Tech
Facebook azangden mipite Category khenpi 4in kikhenthei, nang koisungah kihel?
Researchers ten Facebook azangte hoihtak akankhiat uhciangin khenpi 4 (Group 4)in kikhenthei ci uhhi. Facebook User tepen tua Category 4 lakpan khatzawkzawkah kihel hamtang uh cihi. Tualeh bangci bangin Category khensuk uhhiam, endih ni.
Facebook Users tepen anuai abangin Category 4in khensuk uh a, min atuamtek vawh uhhi. Tuate pen: Relationship builders, Selfies, Town criers, Window shoppers

ZOMI DAILY
Suicide leh Murder Videote a encikdingin Facebookin nasemding mi 3000 behlapding
posted on 6 May 2017 at 1:39 pm Lomkholna: News, Sawltak, Tech
Suicide leh Murder Videote a encikdingin Facebookin nasemding mi 3000 behlapding
Facebook's CEO and Co-founder ahi Mark Zuckerbergin Wednesday niin agenkhiatnaah kalsimin Reports tulthen millions tampi kingahdenin tuate a encikding, Global Community Operations Teamah ahuhdingin mi 3000 kibehlapding cihi.
Tulaitak Global Community Operations Teamah nasem bekbekpen mi 4500 aomkhinsa hi a, tuatengin zolo uh ahih manin mi 3000 aki behlapding ahihi.
Mark Zuckerberg ngiatin ama Facebook Profile tungah Wednesday niin “If we're going to build a safe community, we need to respond quickly” cih gelhkhia hi.

About Us
Zomi Laisiangtho is a community-driven website dedicated to serving the Zomi community by providing easy access to religious texts, hymns, and other community-focused resources. We&#x27;re guided by the values of faith, service, and community.

We would love to hear from you. Whether you have suggestions, feedback, or would like to support us, please contact us.

Filippi — Chapter 4
← Back to Filippi
Filippi — Chapter 4
Chapter: 4
Filippi — Chapter 1Filippi — Chapter 2Filippi — Chapter 3Filippi — Chapter 4
Export
CopyA−18A+Reading mode
1Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw, note ka hong it mahmah a, nakpi takin ka hong goih hi. Notein nakpi takin kei na hong lungnuamsak uh a, note ka hong angtan&#x27;pih mahmah hi. Tua hi a, sanggamte aw, Topa sungah kiptakin nungta un
Copy
2Euodia leh Sintikhe, Topa&#x27; hangin a kilemkikding uh ka thum nuam hi
Copy
Copy
4Topa sungah lungdam tawntung un, ka hong cihsa bangin tu-in zong lungdam un, ka hong ci kik hi
Copy
Copy
Copy
Copy
8Sanggamte aw, a tawpna-ah ka hong gennop thu in, a hoih leh a phattaak thute tawh na lungsim uh na kidimsak un. Tuate in: A man, a dik, a tang, a siangtho, a deihhuai, leh a pahtakhuai thute ahi hi
Copy
9Keima genna leh ka gamtatna panin thei-in na san&#x27; uh thute, nomau pumpi mahmah tawh na zui un. Tua hi leh nopsakna a hong piathei Pasianin note hong ompihding hi.
Copy
Filippi Mite&#x27; Na Khakte&#x27; Hangin Lungdam Zaksakna
10Topa&#x27; hangin ka lungdamna lian mahmah hi. Hun sauveipi khit ciangin kei na hong phawkna uh na hong langsakkik thei uh hi. Kei hong kinloin omngei uh teh, a ci ka hi kei a, na hong kinna uh na hong lahnading uh hun om theilo, ka cihna ahi hi
Copy
11Bangbangin omta leng a lungkim thei dingin a kisinsa ka hih manin hihbang ka hong gen ciangin ka kitangsapna a hong pulak nuam ka hi kei hi
Copy
12Cihmawhna leh cihtheihna a sinsa ka hi hi. Tua ahih manin ka hau a ka zawng zongin, ka vah a ka kial zongin, koi mun koi mun hita lehah a lungkimthei dingin a kisinsa ka hi hi
Copy
13Khrihin a hong piak vangliatna tawh hihte khempeuh nawkzawhnading thahatna a nei ka hi hi
Copy
Copy
15Na theihsa uh mah bangin Lungdamna Thu ka hilh cil lai-in note&#x27; gam Masedonia panin ka paikhiat hunin no Filippi pawlpite bek mahin kei na hong huh uh a, ka ngahna leh ka piakkhiatnate, note bek mahin a hong theihpih na hi uh hi
Copy
16Thesalonika khua-ah cimawhin ka om lai-in huhna nong puak uh khatvei bek hilo hi
Copy
17Note tung panin na tampi ka ngahnop man hilo a, note&#x27; hamphatna a kibehlapnading ka deihna hizaw hi
Copy
Copy
Copy
20IPa Pasianin a tawntungin minthan&#x27;na ngahta hen. Amen.
Copy
Vaikhakna
21Khrih Jesuh sungah a om mi siangthote khempeuh na na hopihsak un. Kei tawh a omkhawm kamsangte khempeuhin zong note hong hopih uh hi
Copy
22Hih lai-a om Khristian khempeuh, a diakdiakin kumpi nasem i lawmtein note hong hopih uh hi
Copy

Privacy Policy
Effective Date: July 23, 2023
1. Introduction
We do not repurpose personal data for other uses, nor do we sell, lease, or disclose your personal information to third parties, except when required by law or when necessary to safeguard the rights, property, or safety of Zomi Laisiangtho, our users, or others.
Zomi Laisiangtho does not actively use tracking technologies, such as cookies or web beacons, to gather personal data. However, third-party services integrated into our website—such as analytics tools, social media widgets, or embedded videos—may use these technologies.
We may also release your information when we believe it is appropriate to comply with the law, enforce our site policies, or protect our or others&#x27; rights, property, or safety.
Zomi Laisiangtho may modify this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we make changes, we will revise the &quot;Effective Date&quot; (or &quot;Last updated&quot;) at the top of this page.
